Bismillahirrahmanirrahim


TK IT Miftahussalam looking for a kindergarten teacher, managing class for our early students range 3 to 6 years old.


We are currently seeking a teacher who can communicate in English on daily basis. As we are now still on developing a bilingual (English) environment, you will play an important role as part of our team.


Job Description

  • Working Hours: Monday – Friday, 08.00 – 13.00

  • Probation Period: max 3 months
requirements:
Qualifications

  • Female Muslimah

  • Able to read and teach the Qur’an
  • Passionate about teaching and nurturing early learners
  • Caring, friendly, warm, and communicative person

Compensation & Benefits Salary:

  • IDR 1,500,000/month

Dexa Group has evolved from a small company established in 1969 to one of Indonesia’s largest ethical pharmaceutical companies at the beginning of the 21st century and has become a prominent, well-respected player in the domestic pharmaceutical market.

Providing better health care by applying expertise was the foundation on which its founders built this Company. Honesty, trust, dedication and commitment to providing patients with the highest quality of ethical pharmaceutical products and OTC are preserved as the guiding principles, based upon which the highly professional management team and the motivated, competent staff of Dexa Group have developed the Company in the spirit of mutual respect, teamwork and innovation over more than four decades.

responsibilities:
1. Mencari & Mengembangkan Project RAC Inverter & LCAC


  • Melakukan pencarian proyek yang berpotensi menggunakan produk RAC Inverter dan LCAC melalui canvassing, networking, dan relasi dealer.
  • Mengidentifikasi kebutuhan customer untuk unit AC skala rumah, ruko, perkantoran kecil, dan proyek light commercial.


2. Menjalin Hubungan dengan Kontraktor & Customer


  • Membangun dan menjaga hubungan dengan kontraktor, owner, konsultan, serta pelanggan potensial yang membutuhkan solusi AC RAC & LCAC.
  • Memberikan penjelasan teknis terkait kapasitas, model, dan keunggulan produk Gree.


3. Menawarkan Produk & Edukasi Produk


  • Menjelaskan fitur dan keunggulan RAC Inverter serta LCAC, termasuk efisiensi energi, durabilitas, dan aplikasi penggunaannya.
  • Membantu memberikan opsi produk yang sesuai kebutuhan ruang dan spesifikasi proyek.


4. Koordinasi dengan Dealer & Tim Internal Gree


  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim dealer untuk memastikan ketersediaan unit, harga, promo, serta dukungan teknis untuk proyek RAC & LCAC.
  • Menyampaikan update aktivitas project kepada supervisor atau pihak terkait.


5. Follow-Up Penawaran & Negosiasi


  • Menyusun dan mengajukan penawaran harga untuk RAC Inverter dan LCAC.
  • Melakukan negosiasi sederhana sesuai kebijakan dealer/Gree hingga proses closing.


6. Monitoring Progres Project


  • Memantau seluruh tahapan proyek, mulai dari survey, pemilihan produk, penawaran, hingga pemasangan.
  • Berkoordinasi dengan teknisi dealer jika ada kebutuhan survey kapasitas ruang (site survey).


7. Penguasaan Produk Gree (RAC Inverter & LCAC)


  • Menguasai spesifikasi teknis, seri produk, keunggulan, dan aplikasi RAC Inverter serta LCAC.
  • Memastikan selalu update terhadap harga, promo, dan program project yang berlaku.


8. Laporan Aktivitas


  • Membuat laporan aktivitas harian atau mingguan terkait prospek, kunjungan customer, serta progres proyek RAC dan LCAC.

company_desc:
Gree Electric Appliances Indonesia adalah perusahaan pembuat pendingin udara internasional yang memadukan riset dan pengembangan, pemasaran, serta layanan terpadu. Gree Indonesia masuk ke Indonesia pada bulan Juli, 2015 dan berkantor pusat di Jakarta.

Gree Indonesia memiliki 12 cabang yang tersebar di Pulau Jawa, Bali, Sumatera dengan kantor cabang di Jakarta, Bekasi, Bandung, Semarang, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, Bali, Lampung, Pekanbaru, Medan dan terus berkembang di beberapa kota besar di Indonesia.

Gree merupakan merek industri pendingin udara asal China yang dinobatkan menjadi "World Brand" (merek dunia) dan satu-satunya perusahaan pendingin udara yang masuk ke dalam "China Top 100 Listed Company" oleh majalah Fortune selama 12 tahun berturut-turut.

Pada Mei 2020, Gree Electric Appliances masuk dalam daftar Forbes yang menempati urutan ke-246 dalam daftar 2.000 perusahaan terbesar dunia dan merupakan produsen AC terbesar di dunia.

Memiliki total 14 pabrik yang tersebar di China, Brazil dan Pakistan, Gree telah mendapatkan kepercayaan konsumen atas kualitas produknya dengan tetap menjadi pilihan 400 juta pengguna global di 160 negara.

Berbagai kategori produk yang dimiliki oleh Gree antara lain RAC (Residential Air Conditioner), LCAC (Light Commercial Air Conditioner), CAC (Commercial Air Conditioner), HA (Home Appliances). Produk Gree sendiri juga telah digunakan dalam event internasional seperti FIFA World Cup, Russia Olympic Games hingga China Olympic Games.

Sejak masuk ke Indonesia, produk berkualitas Gree telah berhasil meraih berbagai penghargaan dalam negeri. Adapun penghargaan yang didapatkan, antara lain, The Best Air Conditioning of the Year, Peraih Penghargaan Pertama di Indonesia, Peraih Penghargaan Pusat Rekor Indonesia, Top Innovation Choice Award 2020, Digital Popular Brand Award 2020, Indonesia Brand Champions 2020, Indonesia Best Quality Product, Brand Choice 2021 dan Rekor Muri Garansi Purnajual Terlama.

Garansi peraih "REBI Award" Platinum Warranty Gree, juga diyakini sebagai garansi purna jual terlama di industri pendingin udara di Indonesia, yaitu garansi satu tahun ganti unit baru, garansi 5 tahun servis dan suku cadang, ditambah 10 tahun untuk unit outdoor atau kompresor.

Selama berdiri di Indonesia, Gree telah meyakinkan pengguna di pasar Indonesia dengan memenangkan proyek-proyek besar di Indonesia, seperti Pabrik Chevron Pekanbaru, Grand Mercure & Hotel Ibis Yogyakarta, Menara Satoria di Surabaya, Landmark Pluit dan Sudirman Suites di Jakarta hingga banyaknya dealer yang tersebar di seluruh pulau Jawa, Bali dan Sumatera.

company_desc:
Enseval as Indonesia's largest Healthcare Product Distribution Company has been reached all areas in Indonesia through its 48 branches. Furthermore, Enseval also expanded its contribution of Indonesia’s better health service through selling raw materials for pharmaceuticals and cosmetics purpose, as well as medical and health diagnostic tools.


Enseval has the vision to be a leading and integrated distribution and logistics company through service excellence, competent people and advanced technology. This vision is followed by the company’s mission to contribute in improving the quality of health and delivering the best health care products for Indonesia.


Through the passion and commitment for providing better quality of health for Indonesia’s families, Enseval has been grown to have 46 branches all over big cities in Indonesia and five subsidiaries that run business in various areas:


PT Tri Sapta Jaya – operates in distribution sector for pharmaceutical and health care products. The company focus is more to expand its delivery line in lower market segments and more remote areas.


PT Millenia Dharma Insani – providing health services through building clinics namely Mitra Sana. The main idea of this company is to offer affordable and integrated health facilities, consisting clinics, pharmacies, and mini markets.


PT Enseval Medika Prima – focus more in marketing and trading sectors, particularly trading and marketing of health devices.


PT Global Cemindo Megatrading – is a company that concentrates in selling raw materials, as due to rapid growth in such business sectors.


PT Renalmed Tiara Utama – the company mission is to acquire the business from third parties to supply materials and hemodialysis machines for kidney failure patients to multiple hospitals and clinics.


With its contribution in enhancing quality of life in Indonesia for more than 42 years, Enseval touches so many people lives in so many different ways

responsibilities:
About the Role

You’ll play a key role in ensuring execution across Dealls and KantorKu runs smoothly and on track. As Project Manager, you’ll help teams stay aligned, organized, and accountable — making sure priorities are clearly tracked and delivered on time.


This role is focused on coordination, clarity, and follow-through across multiple teams and initiatives.


What You’ll Do

  • Join cross-functional meetings and document key decisions, action items, owners, and timelines.
  • Maintain clear tracking of ongoing initiatives and ensure visibility across teams.
  • Follow up on action items to ensure timely completion.
  • Collect and consolidate weekly progress updates from teams.
  • Identify delays or blockers and support teams in resolving them.
  • Escalate issues when needed to keep projects on track.
  • Help maintain alignment across teams on priorities and execution timelines.
requirements:
What We’re Looking For

  • 1–3 years experience in project coordination, operations, or similar roles.
  • Strong organizational and time management skills.
  • Detail-oriented with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.
  • Clear and structured communication skills.
  • Proactive and comfortable following up to ensure completion.
  • Able to work across teams and interact with different levels of stakeholders.


Profile Fit

  • Consistent and disciplined in tracking progress and follow-ups.
  • Calm, structured, and solution-oriented.
  • Assertive in communication while maintaining professionalism.
  • Comfortable working with cross-functional teams, including senior stakeholders.


Why Join

You’ll work closely with multiple teams and gain visibility into how a fast-growing company executes. Your role will directly contribute to ensuring initiatives move forward effectively and deliver real results.
company_desc:
Dealls is Indonesia's largest job portal & mentoring platform. We help people easily find jobs to top Indonesian companies for internship and full-time roles.


As you might have already heard about us, we are revolutionizing how Indonesian engage with employers. Many Indonesian students are talented, ambitious, but never found a better opportunity for themselves. Our team is driven by the vision to democratize information and knowledge, thus opportunities. We think what we build will allow Indonesian students to have a chance to self develop and have a better future.

Our founder is a Harvard graduate, and has gathered a strong team with burning passion to help Indonesian discover opportunities they deserve! 🚀 In 1 year, we amassed 2mio+ users, got funded by YCombinator, and awarded the Best App of 2021 by GooglePlay, beating 3 unicorns and tens of others.

We are looking for passionate and committed individuals who look forward to working in a fast-paced entrepreneurial environment. Join us to have the opportunity to make decisions to drive a huge difference and impact for Indonesia youths! Here in Dealls, you’ll work closely with our board members. We are preferably looking for applicants who are proficient in both Bahasa and English.

company_desc: Shinhan Bank, which has set new standards with continuous and innovative challenges in the Korean banking industry, and CHB, an industry that has long been established in Korea, became one on April 1, 2006 and Integrated Shinhan Bank was launched with the motto "Pride of Finance from Korea. At the end of June 2007, Shinhan Bank now stands as an undisputed financial industry leader with total assets of 198.6996 trillion, 10.76 trillion winning equity, 1,038 branches and 15 million customers. To offer a comprehensive range of financial services effectively, we divide our customers into 7 groups (Retail, PB, WM, SMEs, (Large) Companies, IB segments) and pursue specific business models. To meet the financial needs of customers with high-class financial expertise, we have built and operated a channel network optimization. By providing customers with the best value, gaining deep trust from shareholders, offering respected work to employees and fulfilling the mission as a corporate citizen owned by the community and nation, Shinhan Bank aspires to become the No. 1 Bank that can lead not only in Korea but also in Asia and something that can be proud of in the minds of customers and for the nation.

responsibilities:
Durianpay was established in 2020 with a vision to build a modern business payments stack that enhances both customer and merchant experiences in the region. Beyond payments, we provide a one-stop solution for checkout, promos, reconciliation, and more.

We are seeking a Partnership Senior Associate — Growth to join our Partnership team. This role focuses on acquiring new payment partners, driving commercial negotiations, and optimizing partnership economics to fuel Durianpay’s revenue growth. You will conduct market research to identify new collaboration opportunities, lead commercial discussions with prospective and existing partners, and use data-driven analysis to ensure our partnerships deliver strong unit economics at scale.


Job description and responsibilities:

  • Conduct market research to identify and evaluate potential payment partners (banks, e-wallets, card networks) based on market share, technology capabilities, and pricing competitiveness.
  • Build and maintain relationships with partner counterparts, enabling commercial momentum and timely decision-making on new integrations and expansions.
  • Support commercial discussions and negotiate partnership terms to secure favorable economics for Durianpay.

responsibilities:
About The Role

At Tentang Anak, we move super fast because we work for the needs of 80 million Indonesian children & families that can’t wait. We seek people who are hungry to solve the problem, accountable & bring speed in everything they do.

Tentang Anak is on a mission to help 80 million children in Indonesia grow up healthier, happier, and better supported. We do this by building trusted products across multiple categories, from nutrition and skincare to children's intellectual property (books, play kits, educational tools, and more). 

While we are proud of how far we’ve come, we believe that building a lasting brand means continuously improving every product and experience we offer. For this reason, we are looking for Business Owners to take full ownership of each of our core consumer verticals: Nutrition, Skincare, or Children’s IP Products.

You will not be responsible for all three, you will focus on one vertical only, selected based on your personal strengths, interest, and fit with the business. You will work alongside other vertical owners and report directly to the leadership team. This is a rare opportunity to take full ownership of a high-potential business inside a mission-led, fast-growing brand.


What This Role Is (and Is Not)

This is a business leadership role, designed for someone who can take full end-to-end responsibility for making a vertical succeed.

You will drive cross-functional execution, and be accountable for your vertical’s P&L, product portfolio, channel performance, and consumer retention. You will work closely with the Head of Brand and CEO to build your business in a way that is both strategically sound and operationally realistic.

We are open to candidates from any industry. You do not need an FMCG background. What matters most is your ability to think clearly, move quickly, work collaboratively, and care deeply about product quality and customer trust. 

This is a true P&L ownership role, not a brand marketing position. You will shape product direction, pricing, GTM strategy, retention, and execution plans, with full accountability for performance. We’ll support you with tools and expertise, but the business outcomes are yours to lead.

We’re open to candidates from outside FMCG. You might come from startups, consumer tech, DTC, education, retail, or media. What matters is your clarity of thinking, business instincts, and ability to lead cross-functional work.


What You Will Own

You will act as the Business Owner of your vertical:

  • P&L and Growth: Drive revenue, margin, and sustainable customer economics
  • SKU Portfolio Strategy: Lead new product decisions, positioning, and lifecycle planning
  • Pricing & Value Proposition: Set strategies that balance affordability and perceived quality
  • Channel Execution: Work with Sales and Growth to scale online and offline distribution
  • Retention & Consumer Loyalty: Own repeat usage, CX feedback, and parent trust
  • Cross-Functional Prioritization: Coordinate across Brand, Ops, Product Dev, and Finance


What Success Looks Like (6–12 Months)

  • You grow your vertical’s revenue and margin, while improving retention
  • You launch or relaunch key SKUs with strong PMF and commercial pull
  • You align the team behind 2-3 clear priorities per quarter, and execute them end-to-end
  • You build repeatable playbooks that can scale your vertical faster


Why Join Tentang Anak

  • Own your own business line inside a mission-led brand
  • Low ego & intellectual environment, close access to founders and function heads
  • Speed + structure, learn the FMCG playbook, but execute with startup agility
  • Make a real difference, help shape how parents across Indonesia make product decisions
  • Clear path to grow, top performers will step into leadership roles
requirements:
Who Will Thrive in This Role

  • You’re passionate about one of our verticals (nutrition, skincare, or IP content)
  • You’re not just strategic, you also get things done and solve problems proactively
  • You’re comfortable with numbers, trade-offs, and fast iterations
  • You balance business logic and good taste, you care about how products perform and feel
  • You value humility, ownership, and clarity in how you lead
company_desc:
Imagine a career where you play a pivotal role in ensuring the success and bright future of 80 million children in Indonesia. Tentang Anak is not just a company; it's a mission, a movement, and an opportunity to be part of something truly extraordinary.


Tentang Anak, at its core, is driven by a mission to advance the well-being and development of 80 million children throughout Indonesia. Founded by a team of experts, including pediatricians, child psychologists, and early childhood educators, we are steadfast in our commitment to supporting children with the most reliable education and products. From educational tools (e.g., applications, books, flashcards, puzzles) to essential skincare, Tentang Anak aims to accompany and provide the best solutions for parents and their children, from the moment they wake up until they fall asleep.


Our products are the one and only in Indonesia that are developed by experts, backed by science, and offered at affordable prices. We are humbled by the love our products receive from parents, consistently ranking our Educational Tools and Skincare highly on e-commerce platforms, making them best-sellers. We will continue to innovate and provide better solutions for parents at every step of their journey. We are dedicated to creating a brighter, healthier, and happier future for the children of Indonesia.


Our employees, whom we call TAmily, are a group of relentless and passionate individuals who share the same mission and ambitions. Are you ready to join us in this mission?

responsibilities:
About us:

FIT HUB is a venture-backed technology driven health and wellness startup based in Jakarta, Indonesia. Founded in 2020, FIT HUB’s mission is to democratize access to Health and Wellness for all Indonesians. We believe that everyone should have access to improving their health and wellness, so we’ve built FIT HUB from the ground up to make exercising friendly, affordable, and fun for new gym-goers and fitness-enthusiasts alike. 


The Opportunity: 

As Account Receivable Intern, you will be part of the Finance team to streamline operations and enhance the overall efficiency of the AR function to ensure accurate cash collection from customers.


What You Will Do:

  • Maintain accurate AR records and documentation.
  • Support a high AR reconciliation rate, aiming for 99.9% accuracy, particularly in B2C & B2B collections.
  • Prepare and provide daily data for the lead to analyze the AR process.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure accurate and timely reporting.
requirements:
What We Need:

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
  • Preferably has prior internship experience in Finance.
  • Excellent in data processing using ms excel/google spreadsheet able to use formula excellently (if, sumif, vlookup, pivot).
  • Understanding of basic accounting principles is helpful for managing accounts and receivables.
  • High attention to detail to ensure accuracy in daily reconciliation and ability to handle large transactions.
  • Strong verbal and written communication skills to interact with internal teams.
  • Can join immediately.
company_desc:

Kami percaya bahwa perubahan besar dimulai dari mereka yang menemani perjalanan member setiap hari. 🤝

Didukung oleh ratusan karyawan, setiap peran di FIT HUB memiliki dampak nyata bagi pengalaman dan perkembangan member.

Kami membuka peluang bagi setiap individu untuk berkembang dan membangun karier jangka panjang di dunia kebugaran.

company_desc:
OT is a consumer goods company that produces various kinds of daily necessities. Starting from a traditional health drink with high-quality standardized ingredients and processes. OT has grown more modern without leaving the positive and noble values ​​that were initiated by the company's founders.

Various products ranging from food and beverages, to personal care products, have long been part of the lives of Indonesian consumers. Some of them are Formula, Tango, Teh Gelas, MintZ, Blaster, Oops, and Kiranti.

In fact, because of their quality, OT products have been present in the international market and can be enjoyed by foreign consumers.

By staying focused on consumer needs and continuing to innovate, OT has launched superior products that have won various awards through survey institutions that are recognized nationally and internationally.

All of these achievements cannot be separated from the support of consumers, employees, and the values ​​that we believed in since the beginning. All the trust and hard work from various parties have shaped OT into a company that is highly committed to always trying to improve products and work processes to meet consumers' needs.

company_desc: ETIFE, Furnishings with Fashion

responsibilities:
Engineering Lead 

(Full-time, Hybrid, Bandung Indonesia) 

 

Nice to Meet You! We are Dropsuite, a NinjaOne Company! 

 

In this role, you will lead a team of talented engineers to scale our platform and drive it to new heights of performance and reliability. You will be responsible for maintaining the system is in peak operational condition, ensuring SLAs are consistently met and service quality never falters. Additionally, you will collaborate closely with Product Manager, and The Architect to ensure that platform design and architecture adhere to the highest engineering standards, delivering a robust and future-proof foundation.  

 

Work Arrangement 

  • Full-time position  
  • Hybrid work model (2 days per week in the office)  
  • Monday to Friday, 5-day work week (flexible work schedule)  
  • Eligible to reside and work in Bandung (Indonesian citizenship only) 

 

This position is open exclusively to candidates who reside in and are authorised to work in Indonesia. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. 

 

Key Accountabilities 

  • Collaborate with Product Manager, Architect and cross-functional teams to deliver new features effectively and on schedule. 
  • Lead, manage, and mentor a team of engineers, fostering growth and ensuring alignment with company objectives. 
  • Oversee the development and maintenance of the Dropsuite platform, ensuring it meets high-quality standards for performance and scalability. 
  • Conduct thorough design and code reviews, ensuring adherence to Dropsuite's code standards and best practices. 
  • Understand architectural considerations and design solutions that align with overall system architecture. 
  • Drive innovation by introducing new ideas and conducting PoC to enhance the functionality and performance of Dropsuite’s backup engine platform. 
  • Demonstrate consistent progress toward project goals and timelines, ensuring transparency and accountability. 
  • Create detailed project plans, provide accurate estimations, and effectively manage stakeholder expectations throughout the development lifecycle.
requirements:
Qualifications and Competencies  

  • 8+ years of experience in Software Engineering  
  • Strong knowledge on Software Design patterns and principles 
  • Various API Architecture styles especially RESTful and GraphQL would be additional advantage. 
  • 2+ years of experience in a leadership role, managing teams of 5 or more 
  • Experience with big data and large-scale applications is a plus 
  • Familiarity with Agile methodologies and experience using Jira (preferred) 
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English 
  • Experience working in global, cross-functional teams is an advantage 
  • Proven ability to serve as both a hands-on developer and an effective people leader 
  • Proficient in project management and team coordination. 

 

Why Join Us 

At Dropsuite, now proudly part of NinjaOne, we are on a mission to safeguard business information and help businesses stay in business. We are a global, fast-growing, partner-centric company building secure, scalable, and highly usable cloud backup technologies for businesses of all sizes. Today, we perform billions of backups daily for organizations across more than 100 countries. 

  

As we enter an exciting new chapter with NinjaOne—a leader in endpoint management, security, and IT automation—our combined strengths enable us to drive even greater impact, innovation, and global scale. Together, we are building a world-class platform that empowers IT teams with simplicity, performance, and reliability. 

  

At our core, we are a team of hungry owners: we are tenacious in our pursuit of excellence and take full ownership in everything we do. We are deeply customer-focused, collaborative, and solutions-driven. We play as a team—respecting, supporting, and elevating one another every step of the way. 

  

Join us as we shape the future of IT and data protection—powered by passion, purpose, and the spirit of ownership. 

 

Rewards That Go Beyond 

  • Competitive compensation  
  • Health insurance for you and your dependents  
  • Social Security (BPJS Ketenagakerjaan)  
  • Hybrid work model   
  • 12 Days of Annual Leave   
  • Entitled to Indonesia Public Holidays  
  • Other leave benefits, such as Wedding leave  
  • Free lunches in office 
  • Growth opportunities  
  • Work in a global company with meaningful work, highly skilled colleagues and an amazing culture 

 

Diversity and Inclusion Statement 

Dropsuite is an Equal Employment Opportunity and Affirmative Action Employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender perception or identity, national origin, age, marital status, protected veteran status, or disability status. 

  

As part of our recruitment process, we may collect personal data to support hiring-related activities such as screening, assessment, and communication. This information is collected solely for recruitment purposes and handled in accordance with applicable data protection and privacy regulations. responsibilities:
About the Role

You’ll support day-to-day execution and personal operations to ensure everything runs smoothly and on schedule. As Executive Operations Associate, you’ll manage calendars, coordinate logistics, and handle light administrative tasks, helping maintain focus and efficiency across daily priorities.


This role is suited for someone who is highly responsive, detail-oriented, and dependable in handling fast-moving tasks.


What You’ll Do

  • Manage scheduling, calendar coordination, and reminders.
  • Arrange travel logistics (flights, accommodation, transport).
  • Handle bookings such as meals, classes (e.g., pilates), and other personal logistics.
  • Respond quickly to messages and coordinate follow-ups when needed.
  • Support light administrative tasks (documents, simple coordination, basic tracking).
  • Ensure daily activities and commitments run smoothly and on time.
requirements:
What We’re Looking For

  • At least 2 years of experience in administrative, operations, or assistant roles (fresh graduates welcome).
  • Highly responsive and reliable in handling tasks and communication.
  • Strong attention to detail and organization.
  • Comfortable managing multiple small tasks simultaneously.
  • Clear communication skills and ability to follow instructions accurately.


Profile Fit

  • Consistent and dependable in execution.
  • Calm, organized, and proactive.
  • Able to handle routine and ad-hoc tasks efficiently.
  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.


Why Join

You’ll gain exposure to how a fast-moving team operates on a daily basis. This role offers a strong foundation in operations, coordination, and execution with opportunities to grow into broader operational responsibilities over time.
company_desc:
Dealls is Indonesia's largest job portal & mentoring platform. We help people easily find jobs to top Indonesian companies for internship and full-time roles.


As you might have already heard about us, we are revolutionizing how Indonesian engage with employers. Many Indonesian students are talented, ambitious, but never found a better opportunity for themselves. Our team is driven by the vision to democratize information and knowledge, thus opportunities. We think what we build will allow Indonesian students to have a chance to self develop and have a better future.

Our founder is a Harvard graduate, and has gathered a strong team with burning passion to help Indonesian discover opportunities they deserve! 🚀 In 1 year, we amassed 2mio+ users, got funded by YCombinator, and awarded the Best App of 2021 by GooglePlay, beating 3 unicorns and tens of others.

We are looking for passionate and committed individuals who look forward to working in a fast-paced entrepreneurial environment. Join us to have the opportunity to make decisions to drive a huge difference and impact for Indonesia youths! Here in Dealls, you’ll work closely with our board members. We are preferably looking for applicants who are proficient in both Bahasa and English.

responsibilities:
About The Role:

At Tentang Anak, we move super fast because we work for the needs of 80 million Indonesian children & families that can’t wait. We seek people who are hungry to solve the problem, accountable & bring speed in everything they do.


This role is responsible for leading the trade marketing strategy, budget, and team to drive sell-out performance, revenue growth, and market share expansion. It acts as a key link between brand strategy and sales execution, ensuring strong product availability, visibility, and conversion across Indonesia’s offline trade channels.


Job Description:

  • Strategic leadership: Provides vision, frameworks, and execution excellence, elevating trade marketing to a growth driver.
  • Revenue impact: Ensures availability, visibility, and conversion at POS, directly improving sell-out and market share.
  • Efficiency: Owns and optimizes trade spend, driving ROI and reducing waste.
  • Retailer partnerships: Unlocks stronger JBP agreements, securing better shelf space, category captaincy, and win–win growth.
  • Capability building: Mentors and upskills existing TM manager & supervisor, professionalizing the function and creating succession readiness.
  • Cross-functional enabler: Acts as bridge between Sales, Marketing, and Supply Chain, reducing silos and aligning priorities.
requirements:
• 10+ years of consumer goods experience, with proven success in trade marketing or channel development in Indonesia.
  • Excellent communication and collaboration abilities, with experience working cross-functionally.
  • Analytical and data-driven mindset, with strong strategic planning and problem-solving skills.
  • Proven ability to balance brand aspiration with commercial reality, and know how to win at point of sale.
  • Led teams and managed trade spend budgets with measurable ROI.
  • Data-driven, collaborative, and comfortable challenging assumptions with facts
  • Thrive in fast-paced, high-growth environments and take full ownership from strategy to execution.
company_desc:
Imagine a career where you play a pivotal role in ensuring the success and bright future of 80 million children in Indonesia. Tentang Anak is not just a company; it's a mission, a movement, and an opportunity to be part of something truly extraordinary.


Tentang Anak, at its core, is driven by a mission to advance the well-being and development of 80 million children throughout Indonesia. Founded by a team of experts, including pediatricians, child psychologists, and early childhood educators, we are steadfast in our commitment to supporting children with the most reliable education and products. From educational tools (e.g., applications, books, flashcards, puzzles) to essential skincare, Tentang Anak aims to accompany and provide the best solutions for parents and their children, from the moment they wake up until they fall asleep.


Our products are the one and only in Indonesia that are developed by experts, backed by science, and offered at affordable prices. We are humbled by the love our products receive from parents, consistently ranking our Educational Tools and Skincare highly on e-commerce platforms, making them best-sellers. We will continue to innovate and provide better solutions for parents at every step of their journey. We are dedicated to creating a brighter, healthier, and happier future for the children of Indonesia.


Our employees, whom we call TAmily, are a group of relentless and passionate individuals who share the same mission and ambitions. Are you ready to join us in this mission?

responsibilities:
About The Role

At Tentang Anak, we move super fast because we work for the needs of 80 million Indonesian children & families that can’t wait. We seek people who are hungry to solve the problem, accountable & bring speed in everything they do.


Tentang Anak is on a mission to help 80 million children in Indonesia grow up healthier, happier, and better supported. We do this by building trusted products across multiple categories, from nutrition and skincare to children's intellectual property (books, play kits, educational tools, and more).


We’re looking for a New Product Development Manager to own the end-to-end product development process across our Personal Care and Nutrition categories, from consumer insight and formulation to launch readiness and continuous improvement.


If you’re passionate about building science-backed products, working with experts, and bringing innovations to market fast, this role is for you.


What You’ll Own

  • End-to-End Product Development: Lead the entire product development lifecycle — from identifying consumer needs and product concept creation to formulation, testing, and successful market launch.
  • Consumer Insight & Innovation Pipeline: Translate market trends, competitor analysis, and consumer insights into high-impact product concepts that address real parenting and child health needs.
  • Formulation & Scientific Collaboration: Work closely with doctors, nutritionists, and technical experts to develop evidence-based formulations that deliver real functional benefits and align with Tentang Anak’s brand promise.
  • Product Validation & Testing: Oversee prototype development, sampling processes, and consumer panel testing to ensure products meet quality, safety, and performance standards before commercialization.
  • Cross-Functional Project Leadership: Drive alignment across Brand, Marketing, Regulatory, Supply Chain, and Manufacturing partners to ensure smooth and timely product development.
  • Launch Readiness & Market Execution: Ensure all regulatory approvals, quality standards, documentation, and production readiness are completed to support successful product launches.


What Success Looks Like

In your first 6–12 months:

  • Successfully launch new Personal Care or Nutrition products that achieve strong early market traction.
  • Build a structured product development pipeline with clear milestones and timelines.
  • Reduce development cycle time while maintaining high product quality and regulatory compliance.
  • Deliver products that achieve strong consumer acceptance through panel testing and feedback loops.
  • Establish strong collaboration with medical experts, suppliers, and internal teams to accelerate innovation.
requirements:
You’re a Fit If

  • You have 5–8 years of experience in Product Development, R&D, or Product Innovation within FMCG, personal care, nutrition, or pharmaceutical industries.
  • You have hands-on experience developing and launching consumer products from concept to market.
  • You understand product formulation, regulatory standards, and manufacturing processes.
  • You are highly structured and detail-oriented, but able to move fast in a startup environment.
  • You can manage multiple stakeholders and projects simultaneously while maintaining execution excellence.
  • You’re passionate about creating impactful products that improve children and family health.


How We Work

We are lean, fast-moving, and highly accountable. Everyone on the team owns their outcomes and works closely with others to deliver meaningful impact.

responsibilities:
About The Role

At Tentang Anak, we move super fast because we work for the needs of 80 million Indonesian children & families that can’t wait. We seek people who are hungry to solve problems, accountable, and bring speed in everything they do.


Tentang Anak is on a mission to help 80 million children in Indonesia grow up healthier, happier, and better supported. We do this by building trusted products across multiple categories, from nutrition and skincare to children's intellectual property (books, play kits, educational tools, and more).


We’re looking for a Demand Planning to play a pivotal role in our Supply Chain team by owning demand forecasting, inventory planning, and cross-functional alignment. This role will ensure Tentang Anak maintains optimal inventory levels, supports fast business growth, and minimizes operational risks across our product categories.


If you're passionate about turning data into actionable insights, working cross-functionally, and building scalable forecasting systems in a fast‑moving environment, this role is for you.


What You’ll Own:


Demand Forecasting & Planning

Lead the development, maintenance, and continuous improvement of demand forecasting models using historical data, market trends, and business inputs to support accurate planning decisions.


Cross‑Functional Demand Alignment

  • Coordinate the monthly forecast cycle and biweekly S&OP (Sales & Operations Planning) by facilitating demand alignment meetings with relevant functions
  • Review and validate commercial team building block inputs (ads, live shopping, affiliate, KOL for online; new outlet pipeline, consumer promo, visibility/loyalty programs) — challenge assumptions when growth is too high/low vs. historical trend


Inventory Optimization & Supply Balance

  • Monitor inventory levels and translate the aligned forecast into supply planning inputs
  • Monitor offline channel sell-in projection using distributor inventory target per SKU


Demand Analytics & Business Insights

  • Conduct daily demand monitoring: identify which SKUs are overperforming or underperforming, spot abnormal channel behaviour, and determine whether variances are temporary or structural.
  • Perform layered “why” analysis for top forecast errors — identify the top error SKU up to channel source (online vs. offline) level


Reporting & Stakeholder Communication

  • Prepare and present the biweekly S&OP demand review: explain what is triggering demand movement, and what is expected next
  • Produce management BR (Business Review) pre-read: summarise demand highlights, forecast projection, and key risks ahead of the BR session
  • Maintain and publish the monthly Forecast Accuracy Scorecard by channel, brand, and SKU; communicate top misses and root


Forecasting Process Improvement

  • Identify recurring causes of forecast error and propose process or assumption improvements to reduce bias over time
  • Contribute to improving the statistical forecasting model by reviewing anomaly removal logic and refining baseline calculation methods
  • Develop scalable forecasting templates and documentation that support the team as the product portfolio grows


What Success Looks Like:

In your first 3–6 months:

  • Master monthly forecast cycle and daily demand monitoring
  • Host S&OP presentation and actively contribute to management Business Review (BR)
  • Improve forecast accuracy across key product categories (lag-3 months)


In your first 6–12 months:

• Reduce stock‑out and overstock situations through proactive planning

• Build structured demand planning cadence with cross‑functional teams

• Deliver clear demand visibility for Supply Chain and Business teams

• Develop scalable forecasting models that support rapid business growth
requirements:
You’re a Fit If

• You have 1 year of experience in Demand Planning, Supply Chain, or Forecasting. Fresh graduates from a strong analytical major are welcome to apply

• You have strong analytical skills and are comfortable working with data

• You have experience working cross‑functionally with multiple stakeholders

• You are detail‑oriented and structured, but able to move fast in a startup environment

• You are proactive, adaptable, and comfortable navigating ambiguity

• Basic knowledge of coding, data analytics, or machine learning is a plus

• Background in Engineering or Supply Chain fields is preferred


How We Work

We are lean, fast‑moving, and highly accountable. Everyone on the team owns their outcomes and works closely with others to deliver meaningful impact.

We prioritize:

• Speed with quality

• Data‑driven decision making

• Strong ownership & accountability

• Cross‑team collaboration

• Continuous improvement mindset

At Tentang Anak, your work will directly contribute to ensuring Indonesian families have consistent access to products that support children’s growth and development.

responsibilities:
About The Role

At Tentang Anak, we move super fast because we work for the needs of 80 million Indonesian children & families that can’t wait. We seek people who are hungry to solve problems, accountable, and bring speed in everything they do.


Tentang Anak is on a mission to help 80 million children in Indonesia grow up healthier, happier, and better supported. We do this by building trusted products across multiple categories, from nutrition and skincare to children's intellectual property (books, play kits, educational tools, and more).


We’re looking for a Corporate Planning to turn strategic priorities into results, ensuring our company’s key initiatives run on time, within budget, and with measurable business impact. This role is perfect for someone who thrives at the intersection of strategy, data, and execution.


What You’ll Own


Strategic Planning & Business Rhythm

  • Drive company-wide OKR rollout, ensuring alignment across departments and 100% adoption.
  • Lead and coordinate annual Strategic Plan with strong cross-functional alignment.


Process Agility & Automation

  • Lead initiatives to streamline core company processes through automation and AI adoption.
  • Identify and prioritize new workflows for digitization to drive continuous improvement.


Financial & Performance Analysis

  • Partner with the Finance team to assess company performance, budget health, and ROI of strategic initiatives.
  • Build business performance dashboards, analyze variance, and highlight opportunities for growth and cost optimization.
  • Translate financial data into actionable recommendations for management.


Strategic Project Management

  • Manage high-impact corporate projects end-to-end — from design to execution — ensuring milestones are delivered on time and within scope.
  • Provide structured updates and insights to the COO for informed decision-making.


What Success Looks Like

  • 100% department-level OKR rollout and ≥90% on-time Business Review reporting.
  • ≥80% adoption rate of automation tools across teams, reducing manual processing by ≥30%.
  • Quarterly performance reports and actionable insights delivered to leadership.
  • Financial and operational recommendations contribute to growth and profitability targets.
requirements:
You’re a Fit If You

  • Have 5+ years of experience in corporate planning, business operations, management consulting, or strategic finance.
  • Are highly structured, analytical, and data-driven, with strong financial literacy.
  • Communicate clearly and confidently with senior leaders — able to influence without authority.
  • Move fast but think deeply; can balance precision with agility.
  • Are proactive, pragmatic, and comfortable with ambiguity.
  • Thrive in a culture that values humility, ownership, and continuous learning.


How We Work

We’re a lean, high-ownership team. We operate with clear priorities, fast decision cycles, and open feedback. Everyone is expected to move independently yet think collectively — driving outcomes, not just activity. Collaboration is direct and respectful, with minimal bureaucracy and high accountability.

company_desc: Arta Intra Teknologi (AIT) is a specialized IT partner committed to helping B2B enterprises eliminate operational complexities. AIT provides integrated financial solutions that combine SaaS technologies with advisory support, designed to meet customized requirements in financial management. AIT supports retail business, logistics, and other B2B entities in ensuring operational efficiency and payment optimization. With a focus on innovation and client success, AIT empowers companies to make smarter financial decisions and streamline operations at scale.

responsibilities:
PT Mitramas Infosys Global (“MIG”) is a leading technology solutions provider. Established by industry principals with over 20 years of experience, MIG serves as a trusted partner to global technology providers and local IT talent within the Indonesian financial services industry. By leveraging extensive industry and government networks, MIG is looking to extend its business into verticals and segments by leveraging its core strengths in partnership development to capitalize on Indonesia’s growing economic momentum.



You are expected to be able to:

  • Strategic Support: Assist senior management in driving business strategy and developing long-term implementation plans.
  • Market Analysis: Conduct deep-dive analysis of market landscapes, with a specific focus on financial services and infrastructure sectors.
  • Product Origination: Synthesize product origination strategies & supporting research.
  • High-Impact Delivery: Produce comprehensive reports and deliverables within project timelines of 4–6 weeks.
requirements:
• Final year student or Bachelor’s graduate (S1) in a relevant field.
  • Experience up to 2 years of professional experience.
  • Proficiency in Excel modeling and financial analysis.
  • Ability to create high-quality, "consulting-style" PowerPoint decks and reports.
  • Strong understanding of business processes and financial fundamentals.
  • Strong ownership of tasks, aptitude for working independently, organizational experience (internal/external campus), and a professional work ethic.
  • Professional proficiency in English.
  • Knowledge of the financial services & infrastructure sectors or prior experience in consulting.
company_desc:
Founded in 2003, Mitramas Infosys Global (MIG) is a technology solutions and IT services provider based in Jakarta. Specializes in the financial services industry, MIG operates up to 20 service points across major islands in Indonesia, offering a wide variety of essential hardware and software solutions from Core Banking Systems, PC, ATM to business process applications and analytics serving both Government body, State-Owned Enterprise, as well as Private Owned companies.


Driven by the spirit of delivering top-notch and high-efficiency services to clients, MIG has since evolved to provide IT on-site assistance, enabling companies achieving its digital aspiration goals via top selected talents in software developments, and data analytics spaces to complement its existing hardware and software solutions.


This place offers vast opportunities for young talents to grow and to get exposures across extensive applications of technology in the real-world industries. To top it off, we also provide on-the-job learning opportunities prior to job allocation, allowing our talents to gain a competitive advantage as part of our commitments to serve our clients excellent services.

responsibilities:
Role Overview

As KOL Lead, you will play a pivotal role in connecting Tentang Anak with influential individuals (Key Opinion Leaders) who resonate with our brand values. This role will lead the strategy and execution of KOL partnerships to enhance brand awareness and drive sales conversion.

  1. Develop and Execute KOL Strategy: Lead the creation and implementation of a strategic KOL plan that aligns with brand goals and sales targets.
  2. Identify and Build Relationships: Research, identify, and engage with the right influencers, creators, and experts who can authentically represent Tentang Anak and amplify its reach.
  3. Campaign Management: Plan, manage, and execute KOL campaigns across various platforms, ensuring brand consistency and effective communication.
  4. Sales Conversion: Work closely with brand and commercial teams to ensure KOL activities drive measurable sales and engagement results.
  5. Performance Tracking: Monitor the performance of KOL campaigns, analyze key metrics, and optimize strategies to maximize ROI.
  6. Negotiation and Collaboration: Negotiate contracts, terms, and collaborations with KOLs to ensure a mutually beneficial partnership.
  7. Trend Awareness: Stay up-to-date with market trends, emerging influencers, and competitor activities to keep Tentang Anak at the forefront of influencer marketing.
requirements:
1. Proven experience in KOL/influencer marketing, and 1 year of experience managing team or in a leadership position, preferably within the parenting, beauty retails, or FMCG industries
  2. Strong network of influencers and a keen understanding of KOL dynamics.
  3. Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.
  4. Ability to manage multiple campaigns and projects simultaneously in a fast-paced environment.
  5. Data-driven mindset, with experience in tracking performance and optimizing campaigns.
  6. Familiarity with social media platforms and trends that drive engagement and sales.

company_desc:
Didirikan dengan nama PT Sanghiang Perkasa, selama ini kami dikenal masyarakat sebagai Kalbe Health Foods Division dari PT Kalbe Farma Tbk., perusahaan farmasi terkemuka di Indonesia. Guna meningkatkan kinerja perusahaan dan lebih mendekatkan diri kepada konsumen, pada tahun 2007 kami melakukan perubahan brand identity perusahaan. Melalui proses seksama, nama Kalbe Farma Health Foods Division akhirnya diubah menjadi Kalbe Nutritionals. Corporate brand identity baru yang membawa nama Kalbe ini mempertegas kepercayaan kami sebagai perusahaan yang sudah memiliki reputasi tinggi. Wajah baru tersebut sekaligus mempertajam komitmen kami dalam bidang bisnis makanan kesehatan dan komitmen akan pentingnya kehidupan.  


Nurturing Life Through Science (Memelihara Kehidupan Melalui Ilmu Pengetahuan) adalah pernyataan tegas semangat kami untuk tiada henti mendayagunakan kemajuan ilmu pengetahuan demi lebih baiknya kehidupan manusia. Semangat itu akan menjadi sumber motivasi dan inspirasi kami untuk mengembangkan brand-brand yang terpercaya, pengembangan produk yang intensif dan layanan pelanggan yang unggul.  


Karena sadar akan pentingnya mempromosikan bahwa hidup ini adalah anugerah yang harus dijaga kemuliaan dan keindahannya, kami meluncurkan produk-produk makanan kesehatan di setiap titik kritis tahap pertumbuhan dan perkembangan manusia. Mulai sejak dalam kandungan, masa pertumbuhan dan perkembangan, masa puncak karir, sampai pada tahap usia emas mereka saat kinerja tubuh mulai berkurang. Kami ingin memastikan bahwa di sepanjang titik kritis kehidupan manusia itu, produk Kalbe Nutritionals dapat hadir menemani konsumen agar bisa menikmati hidup sebagai perjalanan yang penuh berkat. Live the Best of Your Life. 


More information and any question please visit : Website : www.kalbenutritionals.com

responsibilities:
About The Role

At Tentang Anak, we move super fast because we work for the needs of 80 million Indonesian children & families that can’t wait. We seek people who are hungry to solve the problem, accountable & bring speed in everything they do. As we scale our technology to deliver even greater impact, we’re looking for a Technical Lead who will drive engineering excellence, mentor a growing team, and help shape a product that truly improves parenting in Indonesia.


What You’ll Own

  • Technical Leadership
  • Lead by example with hands-on code development while guiding system design and architecture
  • Design, develop, and maintain robust systems (monolithic and microservices), including commerce transactions, content delivery, and user personalization
  • Ensure code quality, system scalability, and security in all solutions
  • Conduct thorough, high-standard code reviews to maintain best practices across the team
  • Make sound architectural decisions that balance ideal solutions with business needs and timelines
  • Team Mentorship
  • Coach engineers of all levels, helping them develop both technical skills and product thinking
  • Foster a product engineering mindset in the team—every engineer understands the “why” behind their work
  • Model ownership, clarity, and effective collaboration
  • Cross-functional Collaboration & Delivery
  • Work closely with Product, Design, QA, and other departments to deliver impactful features quickly without sacrificing quality
  • Help define, refine, and improve engineering processes (planning, sprints, retrospectives) to maximize team velocity and clarity
  • Unblock engineers and ensure delivery aligns with business priorities


What Success Looks Like (6 - 12 Months)

  • The team consistently ships high-quality features and bug fixes with minimal rework
  • Engineering practices mature, with clear standards and shared understanding
  • Technical debt is managed proactively, with critical systems stable, secure, and performant
  • Junior and mid-level engineers grow under your mentorship, taking on more ownership and responsibility
  • Product and business teams see engineering as a true partner in delivering value



How We Work

At Tentang Anak, we value:

  • Product Engineering Mindset: Every engineer understands the user and the business
  • Ownership and Clarity: We take responsibility for outcomes and communicate clearly
  • Collaboration: We work as one team, across engineering, product, design, and business
  • Continuous Improvement: We learn from failures, share feedback, and get better together
requirements:
You’re a Fit If You…

  • Have 5+ years of backend or full-stack engineering experience, ideally in fast-paced product environments
  • Have 2+ years leading or mentoring engineers in a team setting
  • Are excited to stay hands-on with code, balancing leadership with active contribution
  • Demonstrate strong knowledge of system design, including microservices, performance tuning, monitoring, and secure architecture
  • Know when to follow best practices strictly and when to compromise to deliver pragmatically
  • Write clean, maintainable, well-tested code, and demand the same from others
  • Communicate clearly and collaborate effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders
  • Care about the user experience and can translate business goals into practical engineering plans
  • Are excited to help millions of families in Indonesia with your work


Bonus Points For

  • Experience with e-commerce platforms or payment integrations
  • Experience working in or integrating with retail business flows (e.g., ERP systems, distribution, retail operations)
  • Background in mobile backend APIs and building user-engaging features
  • Familiarity with cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and automated testing



Seniority & Scope

  • This is a senior individual contributor role with technical leadership responsibility.
  • You will lead a small-to-medium engineering team (typically 2 - 4 developers), mentoring them while staying hands-on with code development.
  • You’ll be responsible for technical direction, system design, code quality, and delivery outcomes within your squad or functional area.
  • You’ll work closely with the Engineering Manager (EM), Head of Engineering (HoE), Product team, and COO to align priorities with business goals, ensuring a balance of technical excellence and pragmatic delivery.
company_desc:
Imagine a career where you play a pivotal role in ensuring the success and bright future of 80 million children in Indonesia. Tentang Anak is not just a company; it's a mission, a movement, and an opportunity to be part of something truly extraordinary.


Tentang Anak, at its core, is driven by a mission to advance the well-being and development of 80 million children throughout Indonesia. Founded by a team of experts, including pediatricians, child psychologists, and early childhood educators, we are steadfast in our commitment to supporting children with the most reliable education and products. From educational tools (e.g., applications, books, flashcards, puzzles) to essential skincare, Tentang Anak aims to accompany and provide the best solutions for parents and their children, from the moment they wake up until they fall asleep.


Our products are the one and only in Indonesia that are developed by experts, backed by science, and offered at affordable prices. We are humbled by the love our products receive from parents, consistently ranking our Educational Tools and Skincare highly on e-commerce platforms, making them best-sellers. We will continue to innovate and provide better solutions for parents at every step of their journey. We are dedicated to creating a brighter, healthier, and happier future for the children of Indonesia.


Our employees, whom we call TAmily, are a group of relentless and passionate individuals who share the same mission and ambitions. Are you ready to join us in this mission?

responsibilities:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Di Tentang Anak, kami bergerak cepat karena 80 juta anak dan keluarga Indonesia membutuhkan solusi yang tidak bisa menunggu. Kami mencari talenta yang gesit, bertanggung jawab, dan bersemangat menyelesaikan masalah. Sebagai Area Sales Manager (ASM) Indonesia Timur, Anda akan memimpin strategi dan eksekusi penjualan di wilayah Indonesia Timur. Tanggung jawab utama adalah memastikan pencapaian target penjualan melalui pengelolaan distributor, retailer, dan channel modern trade.



Tanggung Jawab Utama

Perencanaan & Eksekusi Penjualan

  • Mengembangkan dan mengimplementasikan strategi penjualan di wilayah Indonesia Timur untuk mencapai target yang ditetapkan
  • Memastikan penjualan melalui distributor, retailer, dan saluran modern trade berjalan dengan lancar.
  • Memantau dan mengevaluasi pencapaian target penjualan secara bulanan, kuartal, dan tahunan.


Manajemen Distributor & Saluran Penjualan

  • Mengelola distributor, memastikan ketersediaan stok optimal dan pemenuhan pesanan tepat waktu.
  • Melakukan negosiasi terkait margin dan skema promosi bisa diperlukan


Pengembangan Pasar

  • Mengidentifikasi peluang ekspansi dan penetrasi pasar baru.
  • Meluncurkan dan mempromosikan produk baru.
  • Memastikan ketersediaan dan visibilitas produk di seluruh outlet ritel.


Data & Pelaporan

  • Menganalisis tren pasar, aktivitas pesaing, serta feedback dari pelanggan.
  • Menyusun dan menyajikan laporan penjualan, proyeksi, dan rencana aksi kepada manajemen senior.
  • Memantau tingkat persediaan, arus pesanan, serta efektivitas promosi perdagangan
requirements:
Kualifikasi

  • Minimal S1 dari jurusan manajemen, ekonomi atau bidang terkait.
  • Minimal 5–7 tahun di bidang penjualan, dengan pengalaman 2–3 tahun pada posisi manajerial (sebagai Area Sales Manager / Regional Sales Manager).
  • Pengalaman menangani distributor dan channel management di wilayah Indonesia Timur menjadi nilai tambah.
  • Memiliki pemahaman kuat tentang distribusi FMCG, modern trade, dan general trade.
  • Memiliki keterampilan analisis data penjualan dan pelaporan
  • Komunikatif, persuasif, dan memiliki kemampuan membangun relasi dengan berbagai pihak.
  • Bersedia melakukan perjalanan dinas intensif ke berbagai area di Indonesia Timur.
  • Adaptif terhadap dinamika pasar dan kompetitif.

responsibilities:
PT Metrodata Electronics, TBK (Digital Solution and Distribution Company) would like to invite you to be part of the company to develop yourself and your skills. So let’s apply for the following open positions and have career with us.

Job Description:

  • Create plan, manage, and increase product market
  • Establish product strategies and marketing activity
  • Continually monitoring and reporting on product trends, competitive trends, sales trends, and market share
  • Making weekly/Monthly Funnel report
  • Provide product presentation to customers that understand the technical concept
  • Working closely with Presales and Engineer to provide Solution Proposal and Proof of Concept (POC)
  • Working closely with sales channel, marketing and support to ensure revenue and customer satisfaction goals are meet
requirements:
Requirement:

  • Candidate must possess at least Bachelor Degree in all major
  • At least >3 years experience in Product Marketing or Account Manager in IT industry
  • Experience as a cloud Product Marketing
  • Familiar with Microsoft Products
  • Having good attitude, communication skill, and presentation skill
  • Having good Teamwork, Problem solving
company_desc: PT. Metrodata Electronics Tbk, known as Metrodata Group, is the leading information communication technology (ICT) companies in Indonesia. On 14 February 1990, Metrodata Group launched its Initial Public Offering on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX – MTDL) to raise funds for investment and working capital as well to allow public participation in its development and growth. With more than 40 years of experience in ICT, Metrodata Group has accompanied its customers as they’ve grown their business. Our professional employees continue to develop new innovations and ready to be challenges with the new era. We offer solutions in 8 areas: Cloud Services, Digital Business Platform, Big Data, Security, Business Application, Hybrid IT infrastructure, Consulting & Advisory Services, and Managed services. PT Metrodata Electronics Tbk has also been certified ISO 9001:2015. As prove, Metrodata Group has received number of awards and recognitions for its accomplishments including Forbes 50 Best of Companies 2020, Investor Award Best Listed Companies 2020: Electronics Sector, Warta Ekonomi Magazine: Living Legend Company - Leading ICT Integrator Company, 2019. We believes that a solid and customer satisfaction oriented team is the key to achieve ultimate success. To fulfill that commitment, we invite you, highly commitment professional to explore and be part of our team.

responsibilities:
About The Role

At Tentang Anak, we move fast because we serve 80 million Indonesian children and families whose needs can’t wait. As we continue to grow, maintaining trust and credibility becomes increasingly critical. Corporate communication plays a pivotal role in shaping how Tentang Anak is perceived — by parents, partners, media, and future talent.


As Corporate Communication Manager, you will lead the strategy and execution of Tentang Anak’s corporate reputation and public narrative. This role focuses on building trust, strengthening leadership visibility, managing public perception, and preparing the organization to navigate high-stakes communication moments.


You will work closely with founders and cross-functional teams to craft compelling narratives, manage media relationships, and ensure consistent corporate messaging across internal and external audiences.


This role is ideal for someone who is strategic, calm under pressure, and highly resourceful — someone who enjoys shaping narratives, managing complex situations, and building long-term corporate credibility in a fast-growing environment.



What You’ll Own


Corporate Reputation & Narrative Strategy

  • Develop and maintain long-term corporate reputation roadmap, including narrative themes, sentiment goals, and media share-of-voice targets
  • Define corporate messaging framework and communication guidelines across audiences
  • Lead corporate announcements, leadership messaging, and company positioning
  • Ensure consistency of corporate storytelling across platforms and stakeholders


Media Relations & Public Exposure

  • Build and maintain strong relationships with national, industry, and strategic media outlets
  • Secure meaningful media exposure aligned with Tentang Anak’s narrative and growth priorities
  • Manage press releases, media briefings, interviews, and public communications
  • Monitor media coverage and proactively shape public perception


Crisis & Issue Management

  • Build crisis communication playbook, SOP, and issue escalation framework
  • Conduct proactive social listening and identify early reputational risks
  • Develop response strategies and manage communication during sensitive situations
  • Act as strategic advisor to CEO and leadership team during high-risk or high-visibility moments


Founder & Leadership Thought Leadership

  • Drive founder and leadership visibility through thought leadership initiatives
  • Develop content themes, positioning, and posting cadence
  • Support leadership in public speaking, interviews, and external communications
  • Strengthen leadership credibility and industry positioning


Corporate Social Media & Content

  • Own corporate social media strategy and messaging
  • Develop professional, informative, and authoritative corporate storytelling
  • Ensure quality, clarity, and consistency across corporate content


Internal Communications & Employer Branding

  • Drive internal communication strategy and leadership messaging
  • Build internal storytelling to strengthen culture and alignment
  • Partner with People & Talent teams to develop employer branding initiatives
  • Support talent attraction and retention through strong corporate narrative


What Success Looks Like

  • Clear and consistent corporate narrative across internal and external audiences
  • Strong and positive media presence with improved sentiment and share-of-voice
  • Well-established crisis communication framework and rapid response capability
  • Increased founder and leadership visibility in relevant industry conversations
  • Strong employer branding supporting hiring and talent retention
  • Proactive issue management with minimized reputational risks
requirements:
You’re a Fit If You

  • 7+ years of experience in Corporate Communications, PR, or Reputation Management
  • Proven experience handling high-stakes communication and issues management
  • Strong strategic thinking with ability to translate vision into compelling narratives
  • Excellent copywriting, messaging, and storytelling skills across audiences
  • Experience building media relationships and securing meaningful exposure
  • Calm under pressure with strong judgement and decision-making ability
  • Highly resourceful, proactive, and solutions-oriented
  • Experience in fast-growing companies, startups, or high-visibility industries is a strong plus
  • Strong stakeholder management and leadership capability

responsibilities:
About The Role:

At Tentang Anak, we move super fast because we work for the needs of 80 million Indonesian children & families that can’t wait. We seek people who are hungry to solve the problem, accountable & bring speed in everything they do.


We are looking for a Social Media Specialist who can build credible, high-impact content systems that reach and educate millions — not just grow followers. This role will help translate expertise into trusted, scalable digital education across multiple platforms, including one of our founder’s public accounts.


What You’ll Own

Brand Positioning & Narrative Architecture

  • Help define and maintain a clear positioning across platforms
  • Ensure narrative consistency, credibility, and premium tone
  • Translate complex child-health insights into relatable, high-impact storytelling

Cross-Platform Content Engine

  • Design and execute a scalable content system (Instagram, Threads, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn)
  • Build a strong repurposing framework (1 idea → multi-format outputs)
  • Manage editorial calendar and publishing consistency

Performance & Optimization Loop

  • Track content performance and extract actionable insights
  • Run structured experiments on hooks, formats, and storytelling
  • Implement improvements within 24–48 hours when performance declines

Trend & Cultural Relevance

  • Anticipate parenting and child-health trends (6–12 months horizon)
  • Adapt trends responsibly without compromising credibility
  • Keep content culturally relevant and context-aware

Responsible Health Communication

  • Ensure all child-health content is evidence-based and carefully framed
  • Maintain high sensitivity in public communication
  • Protect long-term trust over short-term virality


What Success Looks Like (6–12 Months)

  • A repeatable content engine producing 4–6 high-quality outputs weekly across platforms
  • Improved engagement rate, saves, and meaningful audience interaction
  • At least 3 scalable content series with strong retention signals
  • Clear monthly reporting dashboards with insights and experiments
  • Fast optimization cycle (≤48 hours reaction time)
  • Audience growth driven by quality and relevance, not vanity metrics
requirements:
You’re a Fit If You

  • You deeply understand audience psychology and digital behavior
  • You’ve built or scaled content for educational, mission-driven, or founder-led brands
  • You combine strategic thinking with hands-on execution
  • You are analytical and comfortable turning data into decisions
  • You have strong aesthetic judgment (layout, pacing, storytelling rhythm)
  • You take responsibility seriously when communicating sensitive topics
  • You thrive in fast-moving, high-accountability environments


How We Work

  • High ownership, low ego
  • Fast execution cycles
  • Direct, honest feedback
  • Data-informed but human-centered
  • Accuracy and credibility matter more than speed alone


Seniority & Scope

  • Senior Individual Contributor
  • High autonomy and accountability
  • Cross-functional exposure
  • One of the channels handled includes a founder account
  • Expected to operate both strategically and operationally

Our products are the one and only in Indonesia that are developed by experts, backed by science, and offered at affordable prices. We are humbled by the love our products receive from parents, consistently ranking our Educational Tools and Skincare highly on e-commerce platforms, making them best-sellers. We will continue to innovate and provide better solutions for parents at every step of their journey. We are dedicated to creating a brighter, healthier, and happier future for the children of Indonesia.


Our employees, whom we call TAmily, are a group of relentless and passionate individuals who share the same mission and ambitions. Are you ready to join us in this mission?

responsibilities:
GreenSM is looking for dynamic and results-driven Sales Executive to support our Vehicle Business growth across B2C (direct customers) or B2B (corporate clients & partners) segments.


1. B2C SALES (Direct Customers):

  • Actively prospect and develop new customer accounts through prospecting, client visits, and field sales activities
  • Present vehicle features, EV technology benefits, and financing options
  • Negotiate and close sales deals to achieve targets
  • Guide customers through financing, insurance, and documentation processes
  • Build and maintain relationships to drive repeat sales and referrals
  • Prepare sales reports and provide market feedback


2. B2B SALES (Corporate Clients & Partners):

  • Develop and execute sales plans (monthly, quarterly, annual) to achieve targets
  • Identify and expand networks of corporate clients, partners, and distributors
  • Conduct presentations, proposals, and negotiations with decision-makers
  • Implement sales programs in collaboration with cross-functional teams
  • Manage post-sales relationships to ensure satisfaction and repeat business
  • Coordinate with Finance, Aftersales, and Operations for smooth delivery
  • Provide market insights to support business strategy
requirements:
1. B2C SALES (Direct Customers):

  • 2–4 years of experience in B2C/direct sales (automotive dealer (car or motorcycles), transport ride-hailing, financing, or leasing is preferred)
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to build trust quickly
  • Target-driven, proactive, and self-motivated
  • Basic understanding of financing (car loans, instalment plans) is a plus


2. B2B SALES (Corporate Clients & Partners):

  • 3-5 years of experience in B2B/corporate sales or key account management (preferably in automotive, transport mobility, leasing, or related industries)
  • Strong negotiation, presentation, and stakeholder management skills
  • Proven track record in achieving sales targets
  • Strong business acumen and ability to develop new opportunities


General Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Sales, Marketing, or related field (or equivalent experience)
  • Good command of English and/or local language
  • Willing to work in field settings and/or travel as required
company_desc:
GreenSM Indonesia: Leading the Way in Sustainable Mobility Solutions

GreenSM Indonesia is part of GSM, an innovative technology firm that offers Vietnam's premier all-electric multi-service platform, now expanding its revolutionary approach to Southeast Asia. We provide reliable and eco-friendly mobility solutions, including electric taxis, motorbikes, and on-demand express services.

Our Mission:

To create a sustainable, green, and convenient transportation ecosystem that empowers communities to embrace a greener, smarter future. We believe in driving positive change and shaping a technologically advanced landscape for everyone.

Key Achievements by GSM in Just One Year:

  1. Became the second-largest ride-hailing platform in Vietnam, rapidly establishing itself as a leading player.
  2. Launched a groundbreaking product that has significantly impacted the transportation industry.
  3. Earned recognition as one of Vietnam's top 10 highlights within its economy.

The Road Ahead:

GreenSM Indonesia is committed to pushing the boundaries of innovation and sustainability in transportation. Join us in our mission to pioneer the future of mobility across the region and contribute to a cleaner, more sustainable environment for all.

Together, we are creating the blueprint for a green and intelligent future.

company_desc:
Dexa Group has evolved from a small company established in 1969 to one of Indonesia’s largest ethical pharmaceutical companies at the beginning of the 21st century and has become a prominent, well-respected player in the domestic pharmaceutical market.

Providing better health care by applying expertise was the foundation on which its founders built this Company. Honesty, trust, dedication and commitment to providing patients with the highest quality of ethical pharmaceutical products and OTC are preserved as the guiding principles, based upon which the highly professional management team and the motivated, competent staff of Dexa Group have developed the Company in the spirit of mutual respect, teamwork and innovation over more than four decades.

Serving as a good corporate citizen is one of our responsibilities and being a strategic asset of Indonesia is one of our foremost desires. For along time Dexa Group has worked together with governing institutions and the Indonesian Pharmaceutical Association – championing compliance and improving the industry standards.

Ir. Ferry A. Soetikno, M.Sc., M.B.A.

company_desc:
Amartha is a technology company that has a mission of realizing shared prosperity through the development of digital financial infrastructure for the grassroots economy. Established in 2010, Amartha exists as a microfinance to connect rural micro-enterprises run by strong women with access to affordable capital.

Now Amartha is growing as a technology company that is building a microfinance ecosystem to connect more to the rapidly growing digital economy through capital, investment, and payment services. Amartha advances the bottom pyramid economy by increasing the competitiveness of micro and small entrepreneurs. In doing so, we empower more female MSMEs, create jobs and build more inclusive economic growth.
