company_desc:
Gree Electric Appliances Indonesia adalah perusahaan pembuat pendingin udara internasional yang memadukan riset dan pengembangan, pemasaran, serta layanan terpadu. Gree Indonesia masuk ke Indonesia pada bulan Juli, 2015 dan berkantor pusat di Jakarta.

Gree Indonesia memiliki 12 cabang yang tersebar di Pulau Jawa, Bali, Sumatera dengan kantor cabang di Jakarta, Bekasi, Bandung, Semarang, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, Bali, Lampung, Pekanbaru, Medan dan terus berkembang di beberapa kota besar di Indonesia.

Gree merupakan merek industri pendingin udara asal China yang dinobatkan menjadi "World Brand" (merek dunia) dan satu-satunya perusahaan pendingin udara yang masuk ke dalam "China Top 100 Listed Company" oleh majalah Fortune selama 12 tahun berturut-turut.

Pada Mei 2020, Gree Electric Appliances masuk dalam daftar Forbes yang menempati urutan ke-246 dalam daftar 2.000 perusahaan terbesar dunia dan merupakan produsen AC terbesar di dunia.

Memiliki total 14 pabrik yang tersebar di China, Brazil dan Pakistan, Gree telah mendapatkan kepercayaan konsumen atas kualitas produknya dengan tetap menjadi pilihan 400 juta pengguna global di 160 negara.

Berbagai kategori produk yang dimiliki oleh Gree antara lain RAC (Residential Air Conditioner), LCAC (Light Commercial Air Conditioner), CAC (Commercial Air Conditioner), HA (Home Appliances). Produk Gree sendiri juga telah digunakan dalam event internasional seperti FIFA World Cup, Russia Olympic Games hingga China Olympic Games.

Sejak masuk ke Indonesia, produk berkualitas Gree telah berhasil meraih berbagai penghargaan dalam negeri. Adapun penghargaan yang didapatkan, antara lain, The Best Air Conditioning of the Year, Peraih Penghargaan Pertama di Indonesia, Peraih Penghargaan Pusat Rekor Indonesia, Top Innovation Choice Award 2020, Digital Popular Brand Award 2020, Indonesia Brand Champions 2020, Indonesia Best Quality Product, Brand Choice 2021 dan Rekor Muri Garansi Purnajual Terlama.

Garansi peraih "REBI Award" Platinum Warranty Gree, juga diyakini sebagai garansi purna jual terlama di industri pendingin udara di Indonesia, yaitu garansi satu tahun ganti unit baru, garansi 5 tahun servis dan suku cadang, ditambah 10 tahun untuk unit outdoor atau kompresor.

Selama berdiri di Indonesia, Gree telah meyakinkan pengguna di pasar Indonesia dengan memenangkan proyek-proyek besar di Indonesia, seperti Pabrik Chevron Pekanbaru, Grand Mercure & Hotel Ibis Yogyakarta, Menara Satoria di Surabaya, Landmark Pluit dan Sudirman Suites di Jakarta hingga banyaknya dealer yang tersebar di seluruh pulau Jawa, Bali dan Sumatera.

role: Core Banking Solution Delivery Section Head
responsibilities:
• Participate in the presales activity including follow up opportunities, proposal development, presentation, demo and POC (Proof of Concept) to support the selling activities from technical aspect and to achieve company target. 
  • Manage project implementation by setting-up team, procedure, workflow and project controlling to ensure the solution has been implemented as stated on proposal. 
  • Manage the implementation the based products to provide excellent IT solution to fill the customers’ requirements and needs as per Service Level Agreement. 
  • Participate in identifying business opportunities to provide suggestion of improvement product Bank Vision to superiors based on analysis of customer needs and market needs. 
  • Review the result gap analysis from BA to identify the gap between existing application and expected application to give best recommendation that will be filled the customer needs and ensure the functional specification design comply with bank regulation. 
  • Monitor the development of additional customization of the based products to ensure process development comply with SOP, bank regulation and also meet the service level agreement. 
  • Manage relationship with customer to enhance long term relationship both for sales funnel and strategic opportunities. 
  • Manage the human resources within the unit, including manpower planning, hiring, people development, performance management, and employee morale to develop team Implementation. 
  • Participate in develop policy & procedures in team Implementation and give recommendation to increase efficiency of the procedures in a team of Implementation. 
  • Manage daily operation costs in unit Implementation to conform with budgetary requirements. 
  • Participate in composing Core Banking product catalogue and conducting product update at appointed/ assigned Bank. 
  • Participate in Core Banking training/ sharing session
requirements:
• Minimum Bachelor Degree from Computer Science, Electrical Engineering or relevant education.  
  • Minimum 4 (four) years of working experience in the same position.  
  • Preferable having experiences in Core Banking Solution.  
  • Minimum 2 (four) years of working experience in managerial level.  
  • Have knowledge Java and RPG programming  
  • Have basic banking knowledge  
  • Strong leadership, communication, interpersonal, problem solving and analytical skill

company_desc:
PT Indomobil Finance Indonesia ("Perseroan") adalah perusahaan yang bergerak dalam bisnis jasa pembiayaan motor, mobil, kendaraan niaga, alat berat, properti dan pembiayaan mikro dengan bentuk pembiayaan konsumen, sewa guna usaha dan anjak piutang yang didirikan pada tahun 1993.

 

Melalui strategi bisnis yang terus diselaraskan dengan tuntutan perkembangan iklim usaha, Perseroan tetap menjaga komitmen untuk menjadi perusahaan pembiayaan yang handal dan terpercaya di Indonesia.

 

BIDANG USAHA

 

Sesuai dengan Peraturan Otoritas Jasa Keuangan (POJK) Nomor 29/POJK.05/2014 Tahun 2014 tentang Penyelenggaraan Usaha Perusahaan Pembiayaan dimana kegiatan usaha Perseroan adalah:

  1. Pembiayaan Investasi
  2. Pembiayaan Modal Kerja
  3. Pembiayaan Multiguna
  4. Sewa Operasi
  5. Pembiayaan Syariah

company_desc:
Sejak toko pertama dibuka pada Juli 2005, MR.DIY saat ini menjadi salah satu ritel perlengkapan rumah tangga terbesar dan berkembang pesat di Asia Pasifik, dengan komitmen menghadirkan perubahan yang berharga bagi konsumen.


Saat ini, MR.DIY memiliki lebih dari 1100 toko di Indonesia dan 3.500 toko di seluruh dunia. Dengan lebih dari 10.000 karyawan, MR.DIY siap melayani lebih dari 188 juta pelanggan setiap tahun.


Dengan mendukung konsep “Always Low Prices,” MR.DIY menawarkan kemudahan berbelanja lengkap dalam satu tempat dengan harga hemat, menyediakan lebih dari 18.000 produk dan 10 kategori seperti peralatan rumah tangga, kebutuhan sekolah, otomotif, perkakas, elektronik, hingga perhiasan dan kosmetik, menjadikan MR DIY pilihan Utama yang LENGKAP,HEMAT, dan DEKAT bagi jutaan pelanggan untuk kebutuhan rumah tangga sehari-hari.

company_desc:
PT Ultra Sakti is a pharmaceutical manufacturing and marketing company.

The company was initially dedicated to manufacture pharmaceutical products in the form of standard and generic medicines. In responding the market needs, in 2010 the company moved into consumer goods based on market trends and created the brand ‘FreshCare’ aromatic oils with new fragrances that people are more comfortable to wear in public. In 2012, building upon the success of the FreshCare brand, the company was enlarged by adding PT Tresno Joyo, a company that specializes in traditional medicines.

Since moving to consumed goods sector, PT Ultra Sakti has manufactured and sold 3 Top Brand Product which won many awards: Freshcare, Madu TJ and HotinCream. Each year PT Ultra Sakti launches new innovative product. As sales grow up, PT Ultra Sakti now has 3 plant site (Pulo Gadung, Cikiwul, Cipendawa), and 2 dedicated warehouses (Pulo Gadung). PT Ultra Sakti plant site certified for Good Manufacturing Practice: CPOB (Cara Pembuatan Obat Yang Baik) , CPOTB (Cara Pembuatan Traditional Obat Yang Baik) from BPOM (Badan Pengawasasan Obat Dan Makanan/Indonesia National Agency Drug and Food Control).

PT Ultra Sakti is committed to produce high quality standard products as our contributions to improve the quality of life.

responsibilities:
• Lead the end-to-end product development process—from concept ideation, consumer-driven feasibility, and formulation strategy to commercial launch—ensuring alignment with brand vision, market trends, and regulatory standards.
  • Collaborate with external manufacturers, fragrance houses, and R&D partners to define product benchmarks, guide formulation, and optimize raw material and packaging selection with consumer appeal in mind.
  • Develop comprehensive product briefs that capture functional claims, target consumer insights, hero ingredients, pricing goals, and brand positioning alongside regulatory considerations.
  • Analyze COGS, material cost structures, and financial feasibility to ensure profitability, while balancing innovation with market competitiveness.
  • Oversee technical documentation, testing protocols, and regulatory submissions to meet both local and international compliance (e.g., BPOM).
  • Translate consumer insights into compelling product narratives and claims in close collaboration with the marketing team.
  • Monitor development milestones through clear documentation (submission logs, evaluation records, stability testing) and proactively resolve challenges.
  • Support the BOD in portfolio planning, pricing strategy, and building a consumer-centric innovation roadmap.
requirements:
• Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field; advanced degree preferred.
  • Minimum 1 to 4 years of proven experience in product development within the fragrance, beauty, skincare, or personal care industry.
  • Strong analytical and commercial acumen, with proven experience in cost modeling, COGS analysis, margin optimization, and business case development.
  • Demonstrated success in managing multiple product launches and cross-functional coordination across technical and commercial teams.
  • Excellent project management capabilities, with the ability to lead timelines, sample evaluations, and end-to-end product pipelines.
  • High attention to detail, a strong sense of aesthetics, and a passion for innovation in fragrance and lifestyle brands.
  • Effective communicator and collaborator, with strong interpersonal skills across internal stakeholders and external partners.

responsibilities:
• Merencanakan, mengelola, dan mengoptimalkan kampanye iklan berbayar (paid ads) di Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram), Google Ads, YouTube Ads, dan platform iklan lainnya
  • Menangani kebutuhan iklan untuk seluruh unit bisnis di Apique Group (Resique Supermarket Laundry, Apique Management, dan unit bisnis lainnya)
  • Melakukan landing page optimization untuk meningkatkan konversi dari traffic iklan, termasuk mempercepat loading speed, menyusun copy yang persuasif, dan memastikan user experience yang optimal
  • Melakukan riset kata kunci, audience targeting, dan competitor analysis untuk meningkatkan performa iklan
  • Mengelola budget iklan secara efisien untuk mencapai ROI (Return on Investment) dan KPI yang ditargetkan
  • Melakukan monitoring dan analisis performa kampanye secara berkala, serta menyusun laporan hasil iklan (daily, weekly, monthly)
  • Melakukan A/B testing pada kreatif iklan, copy, targeting, dan landing page untuk menemukan kombinasi terbaik
  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim kreatif (desain, copywriter) dan tim pengembang (developer) untuk menghasilkan landing page yang efektif
  • Memberikan rekomendasi strategi pemasaran digital berdasarkan data dan insight dari hasil kampanye
  • Tetap update dengan tren terbaru di dunia digital marketing, algoritma platform iklan, dan praktik terbaik landing page optimization
requirements:
• Minimal S1 semua jurusan, lebih disukai dari Manajemen Pemasaran, Komunikasi, Teknik Informatika, atau Sistem Informasi
  • Pengalaman minimal 2–3 tahun di bidang performance marketing / digital ads, dengan track record mengelola budget iklan dan mencapai target ROI
  • Menguasai Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, YouTube Ads, serta familiar dengan platform iklan lainnya
  • Memiliki pengalaman dalam landing page optimization menggunakan tools seperti Google Optimize, Unbounce, Instapage, atau sejenisnya
  • Terbiasa menggunakan Google Analytics, Meta Pixel, Google Tag Manager, dan tools tracking lainnya untuk memonitor konversi
  • Memiliki pemahaman tentang funnel marketing (top, middle, bottom) dan strategi retargeting
  • Mampu membaca dan menganalisis data performa iklan untuk mengambil keputusan strategis
  • Teliti, terstruktur, dan mampu mengelola multiple campaigns untuk beberapa unit bisnis sekaligus
company_sector: Professional Services / Laundry & Cleaning Services Industry
company_desc:
Apique Group is a pioneer in Indonesia’s professional laundry industry, offering a comprehensive business ecosystem, from business consulting services and the supply of laundry machines and materials, to training and human resource development. Since our establishment in 2013, we have been trusted by hundreds of business owners, from SMEs to large corporations, to help build and grow efficient, modern, and sustainable laundry operations.


With over 15 years of experience, we are committed to continuously delivering the best and most integrated solutions for the laundry industry in Indonesia. We believe that business success starts with a strong foundation: reliable systems, effective processes, and solid collaboration. Headquartered in Pejaten Barat, South Jakarta, Apique Group continues to grow and welcomes top talents to grow and contribute with us.

responsibilities:
Hi JobSeeker!

TRIVE, a subsidiary of Triputra Group, is visioned to contributing to Nation's Energy Sustainability for Better Tomorrow. Currently managing five business units : PT Triputra Energi Megatara (TEM), PT Triputra Solusi Terpadu (TRUST), PT Armada Bahtera Semesta (ABAS), PT ATW Solar Indonesia, and PT Lintas Samudra Borneo Line (LINSA).


PT ATW Solar Indonesia is an EPC company engaged in solar panels as a storage and utilization solution for solar energy. Following the rapid development of the use of solar panels, we continue to expand our operations and business

Our subsidiary company, ATW Solar Indonesia is looking for Project Admin, that will grow with us by :

  • Manage and ensure all collection of project data
  • Prepare and provide all project documents, MoM, and project financial report
  • Coordinate & schedule meeting with external party
  • Monitor & report on project progress and material delivery to ensure deliverables meet requirement
  • Coordinate with relevant function regarding project needs and documentation
requirements:
• Renewable energy enthusiast
  • Have a minimum Bachelor’s Degree from any major
  • Able to use Ms. Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
  • Attention to detail
  • Good communication and task management skills
company_desc:
Triputra Visi Energi, a sub-holding company under Triputra Group, is visioned to contributing to Nation's Energy Sustainability for Better Tomorrow. Currently managing four business units:


  • Triputra Energi Megatara (TEM) : Engaged in energy trading through collaboration with ExxonMobil, distributing diesel car engine oil to Kalimantan and other eastern parts of the country.
  • Triputra Solusi Terpadu (TRUST) : Offering value-added services as a solution partner, tailoring offers to meet specific needs in energy industry.
  • Armada Bahtera Semesta (Abas) : A vessel owner and operator, specializing in transporting and managing liquid cargo in Indonesia and Southeast Asia.
  • ATW Sejahtera, ATW Solar Indonesia, & ATW Solar Residensial (ATW) : One of leading solar energy provider that utilize and maximize solar energy for smarter society and better environment in Indonesia.


Guided by the Triputra DNA as our core values: Integrity & Ethics, Excellence, Compassion, and Humility. That lived by our spirit of work: Enjoy, Accountability, and Teamwork (E.A.T) with humble, positive, and confidence.

company_desc:
Dexa Group has evolved from a small company established in 1969 to one of Indonesia’s largest ethical pharmaceutical companies at the beginning of the 21st century and has become a prominent, well-respected player in the domestic pharmaceutical market.

Providing better health care by applying expertise was the foundation on which its founders built this Company. Honesty, trust, dedication and commitment to providing patients with the highest quality of ethical pharmaceutical products and OTC are preserved as the guiding principles, based upon which the highly professional management team and the motivated, competent staff of Dexa Group have developed the Company in the spirit of mutual respect, teamwork and innovation over more than four decades.

Serving as a good corporate citizen is one of our responsibilities and being a strategic asset of Indonesia is one of our foremost desires. For along time Dexa Group has worked together with governing institutions and the Indonesian Pharmaceutical Association – championing compliance and improving the industry standards.

Ir. Ferry A. Soetikno, M.Sc., M.B.A.

(President Director)

company_desc:
Gree Electric Appliances Indonesia adalah perusahaan pembuat pendingin udara internasional yang memadukan riset dan pengembangan, pemasaran, serta layanan terpadu. Gree Indonesia masuk ke Indonesia pada bulan Juli, 2015 dan berkantor pusat di Jakarta.

Gree Indonesia memiliki 12 cabang yang tersebar di Pulau Jawa, Bali, Sumatera dengan kantor cabang di Jakarta, Bekasi, Bandung, Semarang, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, Bali, Lampung, Pekanbaru, Medan dan terus berkembang di beberapa kota besar di Indonesia.

Gree merupakan merek industri pendingin udara asal China yang dinobatkan menjadi "World Brand" (merek dunia) dan satu-satunya perusahaan pendingin udara yang masuk ke dalam "China Top 100 Listed Company" oleh majalah Fortune selama 12 tahun berturut-turut.

Pada Mei 2020, Gree Electric Appliances masuk dalam daftar Forbes yang menempati urutan ke-246 dalam daftar 2.000 perusahaan terbesar dunia dan merupakan produsen AC terbesar di dunia.

Memiliki total 14 pabrik yang tersebar di China, Brazil dan Pakistan, Gree telah mendapatkan kepercayaan konsumen atas kualitas produknya dengan tetap menjadi pilihan 400 juta pengguna global di 160 negara.

Berbagai kategori produk yang dimiliki oleh Gree antara lain RAC (Residential Air Conditioner), LCAC (Light Commercial Air Conditioner), CAC (Commercial Air Conditioner), HA (Home Appliances). Produk Gree sendiri juga telah digunakan dalam event internasional seperti FIFA World Cup, Russia Olympic Games hingga China Olympic Games.

Sejak masuk ke Indonesia, produk berkualitas Gree telah berhasil meraih berbagai penghargaan dalam negeri. Adapun penghargaan yang didapatkan, antara lain, The Best Air Conditioning of the Year, Peraih Penghargaan Pertama di Indonesia, Peraih Penghargaan Pusat Rekor Indonesia, Top Innovation Choice Award 2020, Digital Popular Brand Award 2020, Indonesia Brand Champions 2020, Indonesia Best Quality Product, Brand Choice 2021 dan Rekor Muri Garansi Purnajual Terlama.

Garansi peraih "REBI Award" Platinum Warranty Gree, juga diyakini sebagai garansi purna jual terlama di industri pendingin udara di Indonesia, yaitu garansi satu tahun ganti unit baru, garansi 5 tahun servis dan suku cadang, ditambah 10 tahun untuk unit outdoor atau kompresor.

Selama berdiri di Indonesia, Gree telah meyakinkan pengguna di pasar Indonesia dengan memenangkan proyek-proyek besar di Indonesia, seperti Pabrik Chevron Pekanbaru, Grand Mercure & Hotel Ibis Yogyakarta, Menara Satoria di Surabaya, Landmark Pluit dan Sudirman Suites di Jakarta hingga banyaknya dealer yang tersebar di seluruh pulau Jawa, Bali dan Sumatera.

company_desc:
Founded in the 1960s in Northern Italy, MODENA is a global technology group of companies. Since 1981, MODENA has strategically shifted its operations to Asia. Its playing fields cover Home, Professional, Technology, Energy, and Mobility, which are supported by an innovative design studio in Italy and R&D centers across the world. MODENA products are manufactured and distributed, under international certifications and management systems, ensuring seamless integration into global markets.  


Today, MODENA’s vision is to become a driving force towards an interconnected world. MODENA’s product lines are continuously upgraded with a mission to elevate the everyday human experience. Highly engineered with modern designs and cutting-edge technology such as Internet of Things (IoT), MODENA is committed to bringing the smartest, most interconnected innovations to modern consumers for a better world, better future.


At MODENA, our diverse and talented team is at the heart of our growth. They bring creativity and expertise to everything we do. 


To discover more, please visit our website at www.modena.com.

company_desc:
Founded in the 1960s in Northern Italy, MODENA is a global technology group of companies. Since 1981, MODENA has strategically shifted its operations to Asia. Its playing fields cover Home, Professional, Technology, Energy, and Mobility, which are supported by an innovative design studio in Italy and R&D centers across the world. MODENA products are manufactured and distributed, under international certifications and management systems, ensuring seamless integration into global markets.  


Today, MODENA’s vision is to become a driving force towards an interconnected world. MODENA’s product lines are continuously upgraded with a mission to elevate the everyday human experience. Highly engineered with modern designs and cutting-edge technology such as Internet of Things (IoT), MODENA is committed to bringing the smartest, most interconnected innovations to modern consumers for a better world, better future.


At MODENA, our diverse and talented team is at the heart of our growth. They bring creativity and expertise to everything we do. 


To discover more, please visit our website at www.modena.com.

responsibilities:

  • Mematuhi prosedur keselamatan dan kesehatan kerja yang ditetapkan perusahaan.

company_desc:
Gree Electric Appliances Indonesia adalah perusahaan pembuat pendingin udara internasional yang memadukan riset dan pengembangan, pemasaran, serta layanan terpadu. Gree Indonesia masuk ke Indonesia pada bulan Juli, 2015 dan berkantor pusat di Jakarta.

Gree Indonesia memiliki 12 cabang yang tersebar di Pulau Jawa, Bali, Sumatera dengan kantor cabang di Jakarta, Bekasi, Bandung, Semarang, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, Bali, Lampung, Pekanbaru, Medan dan terus berkembang di beberapa kota besar di Indonesia.

Gree merupakan merek industri pendingin udara asal China yang dinobatkan menjadi "World Brand" (merek dunia) dan satu-satunya perusahaan pendingin udara yang masuk ke dalam "China Top 100 Listed Company" oleh majalah Fortune selama 12 tahun berturut-turut.

Pada Mei 2020, Gree Electric Appliances masuk dalam daftar Forbes yang menempati urutan ke-246 dalam daftar 2.000 perusahaan terbesar dunia dan merupakan produsen AC terbesar di dunia.

Memiliki total 14 pabrik yang tersebar di China, Brazil dan Pakistan, Gree telah mendapatkan kepercayaan konsumen atas kualitas produknya dengan tetap menjadi pilihan 400 juta pengguna global di 160 negara.

Berbagai kategori produk yang dimiliki oleh Gree antara lain RAC (Residential Air Conditioner), LCAC (Light Commercial Air Conditioner), CAC (Commercial Air Conditioner), HA (Home Appliances). Produk Gree sendiri juga telah digunakan dalam event internasional seperti FIFA World Cup, Russia Olympic Games hingga China Olympic Games.

Sejak masuk ke Indonesia, produk berkualitas Gree telah berhasil meraih berbagai penghargaan dalam negeri. Adapun penghargaan yang didapatkan, antara lain, The Best Air Conditioning of the Year, Peraih Penghargaan Pertama di Indonesia, Peraih Penghargaan Pusat Rekor Indonesia, Top Innovation Choice Award 2020, Digital Popular Brand Award 2020, Indonesia Brand Champions 2020, Indonesia Best Quality Product, Brand Choice 2021 dan Rekor Muri Garansi Purnajual Terlama.

Garansi peraih "REBI Award" Platinum Warranty Gree, juga diyakini sebagai garansi purna jual terlama di industri pendingin udara di Indonesia, yaitu garansi satu tahun ganti unit baru, garansi 5 tahun servis dan suku cadang, ditambah 10 tahun untuk unit outdoor atau kompresor.

Selama berdiri di Indonesia, Gree telah meyakinkan pengguna di pasar Indonesia dengan memenangkan proyek-proyek besar di Indonesia, seperti Pabrik Chevron Pekanbaru, Grand Mercure & Hotel Ibis Yogyakarta, Menara Satoria di Surabaya, Landmark Pluit dan Sudirman Suites di Jakarta hingga banyaknya dealer yang tersebar di seluruh pulau Jawa, Bali dan Sumatera.

company_desc:
Dealls is Indonesia's largest job portal & mentoring platform. We help people easily find jobs to top Indonesian companies for internship and full-time roles.


As you might have already heard about us, we are revolutionizing how Indonesian engage with employers. Many Indonesian students are talented, ambitious, but never found a better opportunity for themselves. Our team is driven by the vision to democratize information and knowledge, thus opportunities. We think what we build will allow Indonesian students to have a chance to self develop and have a better future.

Our founder is a Harvard graduate, and has gathered a strong team with burning passion to help Indonesian discover opportunities they deserve! 🚀 In 1 year, we amassed 2mio+ users, got funded by YCombinator, and awarded the Best App of 2021 by GooglePlay, beating 3 unicorns and tens of others.

We are looking for passionate and committed individuals who look forward to working in a fast-paced entrepreneurial environment. Join us to have the opportunity to make decisions to drive a huge difference and impact for Indonesia youths! Here in Dealls, you’ll work closely with our board members. We are preferably looking for applicants who are proficient in both Bahasa and English.

  2. Bertanggung jawab atas alur barang dagangan mulai dari penerimaan, pembongkaran, hingga penyimpanan stok di dalam toko, termasuk mengelola tingkat persediaan dan kekurangan stok.

company_desc:
Pada bulan Januari 2013, Trans Corp melalui anak perusahaannya, PT Trans Ritel mengambil alih 100% saham PT Carrefour Indonesia sehingga nama perusahaan pun berubah menjadi PT Trans Retail Indonesia.

PT Trans Retail Indonesia berinovasi dalam memberikan standar pelayanan kelas dunia di industri ritel Indonesia. Carrefour adalah pelopor yang memperkenalkan konsep hypermarket dan menyediakan alternatif belanja baru di Indonesia. Saat ini PT. Trans Retail dengan brand Transmart, Carrefour dan Groserindo menawarkan konsep One-Stop Shopping yang menawarkan lebih dari 40.000 produk. Pelanggan dapat memperoleh pilihan produk yang lengkap untuk memenuhi segala kebutuhan sehari-hari dengan harga kompetitif. Hal ini didukung dengan lingkungan belanja yang nyaman dengan pelayanan terbaik untuk mencapai kepuasan pelanggan.

Saat ini, PT Trans Retail Indonesia sudah beroperasi hampir 100 gerai multi format dan menyebar ke 28 kota di Indonesia. lebih dari 70 juta pelanggan setia berbelanja setiap tahunnya. Sebagai salah satu pemain ritel terkemuka, Carrefour berusaha untuk mengikuti trend yang berkembang di masyarakat.

PT Trans Retail Indonesia juga telah memberikan kontribusi dan berpartisipasi aktif dalam pembangunan daerah di sektor Pertanian dengan membeli 95% produk dari pasar domestik, meningkatkan kehidupan petani dengan menjaga hubungan jangka panjang dan memperluas akses pasar di gerai Carrefour, meningkatkan perkembangan kualitas produk lokal dengan memperkenalkan metode pertanian modern.

role: PT FIT Master (Lv. 2) - FIT HUB Jabodetabek
responsibilities:
Sudah menjadi Personal Trainer berpengalaman. Siap naik ke level yang lebih tinggi?

FIT HUB memiliki 120+ clubs di seluruh Indonesia dan merupakan salah satu gym dengan pertumbuhan tercepat.

FIT Master adalah elite track untuk Personal Trainer dengan sertifikasi internasional dan potensi pendapatan tanpa batas.

Siap naik kelas dan menuju jalur karir managerial lebih cepat? Ini kesempatan Anda!


Mengapa menjadi FIT Master di FIT HUB?

  • Stabilitas & Komisi: Gaji Pokok yang kompetitif + Tunjangan Jabatan + Komisi Tak Terbatas (Skema insentif sangat menarik!)
  • Investasi Ilmu: Pelatihan skala Nasional & Internasional senilai puluhan juta rupiah
  • Proteksi Penuh: BPJS Kesehatan & Ketenagakerjaan
  • Mobilitas Terjamin: Tunjangan Transportasi & Relokasi
  • Jenjang Karir: Kesempatan karir hingga level managerial dengan cepat


Deskripsi Pekerjaan:

  • Master of Revenue & Retention: Jadi andalan dalam mendapatkan klien baru & menjaga loyalitas mereka melalui hasil yang nyata.
  • Program Expert: Merancang program latihan khusus untuk berbagai kebutuhan para member.
  • Lifestyle Consultant: Menjadi pendamping & motivator untuk klien agar mencapai fitness goals yang diinginkan.
  • Brand Ambassador: Menjaga standar layanan premium dan wajah profesional FIT HUB.
requirements:
1. Memiliki pengalaman sebagai Personal Trainer level advance/level 2/senior PT selama minimal 1 tahun atau level elite di Mega Gym
  2. Memiliki penampilan fit dan proporsional serta menjalankan kebiasaan hidup sehat
  3. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi & interpersonal yang baik, serta mampu bekerja efektif dalam tim
  4. Memiliki kepribadian yang jujur, bertanggung jawab, dapat dipercaya, dan bersedia mengikuti training induction selama 3 minggu
  5. Memiliki minimal 4 sertifikat keahlian sebagai Personal Trainer
company_desc:
FIT HUB adalah perusahaan Health & Wellness dengan misi membuat hidup sehat lebih mudah diakses oleh semua orang di Indonesia. 💪🇮🇩

Sebagai brand gym terbesar di Indonesia dengan 130+ cabang, FIT HUB menghadirkan fasilitas dan program kebugaran yang terjangkau namun tetap berkualitas di berbagai kota.

Kami percaya bahwa perubahan besar dimulai dari mereka yang menemani perjalanan member setiap hari. 🤝

Didukung oleh ratusan karyawan, setiap peran di FIT HUB memiliki dampak nyata bagi pengalaman dan perkembangan member.

Sebagai perusahaan yang terus bertumbuh dan didukung oleh investor, FIT HUB menawarkan jenjang karier yang jelas serta benefit karyawan yang kompetitif di industri gym. 🚀

Kami membuka peluang bagi setiap individu untuk berkembang dan membangun karier jangka panjang di dunia kebugaran.

role: [POTENSI PENDAPATAN 30 JT ++] Personal Trainer Wanita - FIT HUB Solo
responsibilities:
INGIN PEKERJAAN DENGAN POTENSI PENDAPATAN 30++ JUTA!


DAN BENEFIT LAINNYA:

- Gaji pokok: Rp 2.570.000

- Tunjangan Hari Raya

- BPJS Ketenagakerjaan & Kesehatan

- Potensi Pendapatan dengan Komisi tak terbatas

- Jenjang Karir hingga Level Managerial

- Pelatihan & Sertifikasi senilai puluhan juta rupiah

- Early wage access

- Akses gym


Deskripsi Pekerjaan:

1. Mencapai target penjualan (selling) & mengajar (conduct) bulanan yang telah ditetapkan oleh perusahaan

2. Membuat program latihan untuk para klien

3. Memberikan pelayanan terbaik & menjaga relasi profesional dengan klien

4. Memotivasi klien untuk mengikuti program latihan yang telah dibuat oleh PT

5. Bersedia mengikuti & mengambil program sertifikasi fitness sesuai kebutuhan perusahaan secara rutin & berkala

6. Bersedia untuk bekerja dalam waktu yang panjang & bekerja di hari libur jika diperlukan
requirements:
1. Penampilan fit & proporsional
  2. Memiliki minat yang tinggi di bidang fitness (gym), minimal latihan 3x dalam seminggu
  3. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi & interpersonal yang baik
  4. Dapat bekerja dalam tim
  5. Bersedia mengikuti training induction selama 3 minggu
  6. Bertanggung jawab, jujur, & dapat dipercaya
  7. Memiliki kebiasaan hidup sehat

company_desc:
PT Indomobil Finance Indonesia ("Perseroan") adalah perusahaan yang bergerak dalam bisnis jasa pembiayaan motor, mobil, kendaraan niaga, alat berat, properti dan pembiayaan mikro dengan bentuk pembiayaan konsumen, sewa guna usaha dan anjak piutang yang didirikan pada tahun 1993.

 

Melalui strategi bisnis yang terus diselaraskan dengan tuntutan perkembangan iklim usaha, Perseroan tetap menjaga komitmen untuk menjadi perusahaan pembiayaan yang handal dan terpercaya di Indonesia.

 

BIDANG USAHA

 

Sesuai dengan Peraturan Otoritas Jasa Keuangan (POJK) Nomor 29/POJK.05/2014 Tahun 2014 tentang Penyelenggaraan Usaha Perusahaan Pembiayaan dimana kegiatan usaha Perseroan adalah:

  1. Pembiayaan Investasi
  2. Pembiayaan Modal Kerja
  3. Pembiayaan Multiguna
  4. Sewa Operasi
  5. Pembiayaan Syariah

responsibilities:
• Mempresentasikan Produk Oral, Injeksi, Antibiotik, Obat Generik Berlogo (OGB) kepada dokter/relasi
  • Menciptakan permintaan terhadap produk
  • Mencapai target penjualan
  • Membina serta mempertahankan hubungan baik dengan relasi
requirements:
• Pendidikan minimal D3 semua jurusan (terbuka untuk lulusan baru)
  • Memiliki pengalaman sebagai Medical Represntative atau Marketing lebih disukai
  • Memiliki SIM C dan dapat mengusahakan motor sendiri
  • Menyukai pekerjaan dilapangan, enerjik dan komunikatif
  • Bersedia ditempatkan di seluruh wilayah Genteng dan sekitarnya
company_desc:
Dexa Group has evolved from a small company established in 1969 to one of Indonesia’s largest ethical pharmaceutical companies at the beginning of the 21st century and has become a prominent, well-respected player in the domestic pharmaceutical market.

Providing better health care by applying expertise was the foundation on which its founders built this Company. Honesty, trust, dedication and commitment to providing patients with the highest quality of ethical pharmaceutical products and OTC are preserved as the guiding principles, based upon which the highly professional management team and the motivated, competent staff of Dexa Group have developed the Company in the spirit of mutual respect, teamwork and innovation over more than four decades.

Serving as a good corporate citizen is one of our responsibilities and being a strategic asset of Indonesia is one of our foremost desires. For along time Dexa Group has worked together with governing institutions and the Indonesian Pharmaceutical Association – championing compliance and improving the industry standards.

Ir. Ferry A. Soetikno, M.Sc., M.B.A.

(President Director)

responsibilities:
1. Mengembangkan dan melaksanakan strategi penjualan dan pemasaran untuk mencapai target penjualan produk perusahaan.
  2. Mengidentifikasi peluang bisnis baru di sektor industri
  3. Melakukan presentasi produk dan memberikan solusi teknis kepada pelanggan
  4. Membangun dan menjaga hubungan baik dengan pelanggan baru maupun pelanggan existing.
  5. Menjalin hubungan jangka panjang dengan end user dan distributor.
  6. Mengelola seluruh proses penjualan,Memastikan proses penawaran, pemesanan, dan pengiriman berjalan dengan baik.
  7. Melakukan kunjungan pelanggan secara rutin untuk memahami kebutuhan dan memberikan solusi teknis yang sesuai.
  8. Mencapai target penjualan bulanan dan tahunan yang telah ditetapkan perusahaan.
  9. Mengelola dan mengembangkan aktivitas pemasaran s
  10. Melakukan analisis pasar, tren industri, dan aktivitas kompetitor
  11. Menyusun laporan penjualan dan pemasaran secara berkala kepada manajemen
  12. Bekerja sama dengan tim teknis dan operasional untuk memastikan kebutuhan pelanggan terpenuhi dengan baik
  13. Meningkatkan brand awareness dan memperkuat posisi perusahaan di pasar industri Indonesia Timur

  • Pendidikan minimal DIII

company_desc:
Dexa Group has evolved from a small company established in 1969 to one of Indonesia’s largest ethical pharmaceutical companies at the beginning of the 21st century and has become a prominent, well-respected player in the domestic pharmaceutical market.

Providing better health care by applying expertise was the foundation on which its founders built this Company. Honesty, trust, dedication and commitment to providing patients with the highest quality of ethical pharmaceutical products and OTC are preserved as the guiding principles, based upon which the highly professional management team and the motivated, competent staff of Dexa Group have developed the Company in the spirit of mutual respect, teamwork and innovation over more than four decades.

Serving as a good corporate citizen is one of our responsibilities and being a strategic asset of Indonesia is one of our foremost desires. For along time Dexa Group has worked together with governing institutions and the Indonesian Pharmaceutical Association – championing compliance and improving the industry standards.

Ir. Ferry A. Soetikno, M.Sc., M.B.A.

(President Director)

company_desc:
Anteraja is a company that moves within delivery service and logistics, spanning over the far-east of Indonesia to the far-west. Of course, it’s osnly necessary that every service that we offer come with an app, and it doesn’t stop there–– our system is fully automated by a network of artificial intelligence (AI).

Not only we care about intellects and talents of our human resources, we also care about giving back to the community. Our culture is stemmed from the notion of #JadiOrangBaik, which directly translates to ‘be a person of kindness’. We believe in democratizing our services and to help independent businesses grow with the tools that we offer to them.

Our investors include PT Adi Sarana Armada. Tbk, PT Semangat Bambu Runcing, and Time Prestige International, Ltd.

company_desc:
FIT HUB adalah perusahaan Health & Wellness dengan misi membuat hidup sehat lebih mudah diakses oleh semua orang di Indonesia. 💪🇮🇩

Sebagai brand gym terbesar di Indonesia dengan 130+ cabang, FIT HUB menghadirkan fasilitas dan program kebugaran yang terjangkau namun tetap berkualitas di berbagai kota.

Kami percaya bahwa perubahan besar dimulai dari mereka yang menemani perjalanan member setiap hari. 🤝

Didukung oleh ratusan karyawan, setiap peran di FIT HUB memiliki dampak nyata bagi pengalaman dan perkembangan member.

Sebagai perusahaan yang terus bertumbuh dan didukung oleh investor, FIT HUB menawarkan jenjang karier yang jelas serta benefit karyawan yang kompetitif di industri gym. 🚀

Kami membuka peluang bagi setiap individu untuk berkembang dan membangun karier jangka panjang di dunia kebugaran.

responsibilities:
• Lead localization of interface and marketing content into Mandarin, English, and Bahasa Indonesia across front-end platforms (ads, SMS, pop-ups, etc.) and back-end systems (CRM, Seller Center, and SaaS tools).
  • Translate documents, such as pitch decks, product proposals, user research, SOPs, regulatory (OJK documents), and SaaS manuals, as well as UX/UI content.
  • Act as liaison between Chinese stakeholders and local clients, vendors, and internal teams.
  • Conduct research on market trends, competitors, and user behavior to enhance content quality.
  • Review, proofread, and edit translations to maintain high standards of accuracy, consistency, and quality.
requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in Communication, Marketing, Business or any related field.
  • Minimum 3 years of working experience in Copywriting, Marketing, Business Operations, or similar (Preferably in Fintech or E-commerce industry).
  • Fluent in Mandarin, English, and Bahasa Indonesia (written & spoken).
  • Proven experience in leading and managing teams and projects.
  • Strong copywriting skills across multiple channels (digital, print, social media, and email marketing).
  • Excellent communication, multitasking, and stakeholder management skills.
  • Detail-oriented, proactive, and able to work in a fast-paced environment.
company_desc:
Akulaku is a leading banking and digital finance platform in Southeast Asia, with a presence in Indonesia, the Philippines, and Malaysia. Akulaku exists to help meet the daily financial needs of underserved customers in emerging markets through digital banking, digital financing, digital investment, and insurance brokerage services.

In addition to the Akulaku virtual credit card and ecommerce platform, the company operates Asetku, an online wealth management platform and Neobank, a mobile digital bank supported by Bank Neo Commerce. Akulaku’s mission is to serve 50 million users across Southeast Asia by the year 2025.

company_desc:
Gree Electric Appliances Indonesia adalah perusahaan pembuat pendingin udara internasional yang memadukan riset dan pengembangan, pemasaran, serta layanan terpadu. Gree Indonesia masuk ke Indonesia pada bulan Juli, 2015 dan berkantor pusat di Jakarta.

Gree Indonesia memiliki 12 cabang yang tersebar di Pulau Jawa, Bali, Sumatera dengan kantor cabang di Jakarta, Bekasi, Bandung, Semarang, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, Bali, Lampung, Pekanbaru, Medan dan terus berkembang di beberapa kota besar di Indonesia.

Gree merupakan merek industri pendingin udara asal China yang dinobatkan menjadi "World Brand" (merek dunia) dan satu-satunya perusahaan pendingin udara yang masuk ke dalam "China Top 100 Listed Company" oleh majalah Fortune selama 12 tahun berturut-turut.

Pada Mei 2020, Gree Electric Appliances masuk dalam daftar Forbes yang menempati urutan ke-246 dalam daftar 2.000 perusahaan terbesar dunia dan merupakan produsen AC terbesar di dunia.

Memiliki total 14 pabrik yang tersebar di China, Brazil dan Pakistan, Gree telah mendapatkan kepercayaan konsumen atas kualitas produknya dengan tetap menjadi pilihan 400 juta pengguna global di 160 negara.

Berbagai kategori produk yang dimiliki oleh Gree antara lain RAC (Residential Air Conditioner), LCAC (Light Commercial Air Conditioner), CAC (Commercial Air Conditioner), HA (Home Appliances). Produk Gree sendiri juga telah digunakan dalam event internasional seperti FIFA World Cup, Russia Olympic Games hingga China Olympic Games.

Sejak masuk ke Indonesia, produk berkualitas Gree telah berhasil meraih berbagai penghargaan dalam negeri. Adapun penghargaan yang didapatkan, antara lain, The Best Air Conditioning of the Year, Peraih Penghargaan Pertama di Indonesia, Peraih Penghargaan Pusat Rekor Indonesia, Top Innovation Choice Award 2020, Digital Popular Brand Award 2020, Indonesia Brand Champions 2020, Indonesia Best Quality Product, Brand Choice 2021 dan Rekor Muri Garansi Purnajual Terlama.

Garansi peraih "REBI Award" Platinum Warranty Gree, juga diyakini sebagai garansi purna jual terlama di industri pendingin udara di Indonesia, yaitu garansi satu tahun ganti unit baru, garansi 5 tahun servis dan suku cadang, ditambah 10 tahun untuk unit outdoor atau kompresor.

Selama berdiri di Indonesia, Gree telah meyakinkan pengguna di pasar Indonesia dengan memenangkan proyek-proyek besar di Indonesia, seperti Pabrik Chevron Pekanbaru, Grand Mercure & Hotel Ibis Yogyakarta, Menara Satoria di Surabaya, Landmark Pluit dan Sudirman Suites di Jakarta hingga banyaknya dealer yang tersebar di seluruh pulau Jawa, Bali dan Sumatera.

  • Membuat laporan yang berkaitan dengan penjualan

role: Campus Director's Office & Quality Assurance Section Head (BINUS @Medan)
responsibilities:
University & Study Program License:


• Ensure the completeness of documentation and validity period related to operational license of BINUS @Campus


• Conduct license extension process for all study programs


• Provide EPSBED report data for related Government / LLDikti


• Remain abreast of trends and government regulation in education, particularly those affecting University operation and educational leadership


• Maintain relationship with internal and external parties related to education license


Accredication Activities:


• Conduct and review accreditation process (preparation, self-assessment, data collection, etc) – both national accreditation (BAN) and international accreditation (QS Star, AACSB, ABET, etc)


• Monitor and review accreditation period validity for all study programs


• Conduct accreditation extension process for all study programs


• Maintain relationship with internal and external parties related to accreditation process


Monitoring & Evaluation Activities:


• Provide report on BINUS @Campus performance according to agreed standards and ensure that it’s aligned with assigned strategies


• Propose changes for reporting systems in order to streamline procedures, improve productivity, and quality


• Provide performance data for strategic and operational planning


• Liaise between departments in relation to data collection, storage and performance management


• Provide report on monitoring & evaluation activities


Business Process and Standard Activities:


• Ensure compliance process implementation in BINUS @Campus


• Organize customer satisfaction survey and provide result review


• Conduct survey process implementation according to agreed timeline


• Receive complaints from stakeholders and communicate with related Units for solutions


• Conduct reoccurrence complaints analysis and provide report


Quality Assurance System:


• Implement quality assurance system documents in BINUS @Campus


• Communicate with related units in BINUS @Campus to fulfill the requirements of ISO 9000 or more update version


• Organize Internal audit activities and management review meeting (schedule, supporting documents and implementation)


• Monitor Internal Audit process implementation


• Coordinate with other Units and Auditor to execute internal audit


• Provide data for audit finding reports to management in BINUS @Campus to fulfill ISO 9000 requirements


• Ensure performance data is ready to be used to assess, review and monitor performance across the unit and identify areas for improvement


• Follow up internal audit findings and ensure action from related units


Management Support Activities:


• Provide Report to direct Supervisor


• Suggest improvement process related to activities in area of responsibilities (especially related to time concern, effort and cost)


• Perform activities related to Quality Management System


• Perform additional tasks related to key responsibilities as required by Direct Supervisor
requirements:
Requirements:


• Minimum Bachelor's Degree in Management or related field


• Minimum 2 years of working experience


• Have skills in Business Process & ISO


• Willing to be placed in Medan
company_desc: BINUS is a well-known and fast growing institution that has been recognized nationally and internationally. In 2019, it was awarded for the second time as the #1 Indonesian Employer of Choice in Education by Korn Ferry - SWA We endeavor to achieve a conducive working & learning environment, with a family-friendly multicultural community. We are currently looking for qualified and committed fulltime employees to be part of our big family.

Gree Electric Appliances Indonesia adalah perusahaan pembuat pendingin udara internasional yang memadukan riset dan pengembangan, pemasaran, serta layanan terpadu. Gree Indonesia masuk ke Indonesia pada bulan Juli, 2015 dan berkantor pusat di Jakarta.

Gree Indonesia memiliki 12 cabang yang tersebar di Pulau Jawa, Bali, Sumatera dengan kantor cabang di Jakarta, Bekasi, Bandung, Semarang, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, Bali, Lampung, Pekanbaru, Medan dan terus berkembang di beberapa kota besar di Indonesia.

Gree merupakan merek industri pendingin udara asal China yang dinobatkan menjadi "World Brand" (merek dunia) dan satu-satunya perusahaan pendingin udara yang masuk ke dalam "China Top 100 Listed Company" oleh majalah Fortune selama 12 tahun berturut-turut.

Pada Mei 2020, Gree Electric Appliances masuk dalam daftar Forbes yang menempati urutan ke-246 dalam daftar 2.000 perusahaan terbesar dunia dan merupakan produsen AC terbesar di dunia.

Memiliki total 14 pabrik yang tersebar di China, Brazil dan Pakistan, Gree telah mendapatkan kepercayaan konsumen atas kualitas produknya dengan tetap menjadi pilihan 400 juta pengguna global di 160 negara.

Berbagai kategori produk yang dimiliki oleh Gree antara lain RAC (Residential Air Conditioner), LCAC (Light Commercial Air Conditioner), CAC (Commercial Air Conditioner), HA (Home Appliances). Produk Gree sendiri juga telah digunakan dalam event internasional seperti FIFA World Cup, Russia Olympic Games hingga China Olympic Games.

Sejak masuk ke Indonesia, produk berkualitas Gree telah berhasil meraih berbagai penghargaan dalam negeri. Adapun penghargaan yang didapatkan, antara lain, The Best Air Conditioning of the Year, Peraih Penghargaan Pertama di Indonesia, Peraih Penghargaan Pusat Rekor Indonesia, Top Innovation Choice Award 2020, Digital Popular Brand Award 2020, Indonesia Brand Champions 2020, Indonesia Best Quality Product, Brand Choice 2021 dan Rekor Muri Garansi Purnajual Terlama.

Garansi peraih "REBI Award" Platinum Warranty Gree, juga diyakini sebagai garansi purna jual terlama di industri pendingin udara di Indonesia, yaitu garansi satu tahun ganti unit baru, garansi 5 tahun servis dan suku cadang, ditambah 10 tahun untuk unit outdoor atau kompresor.

Selama berdiri di Indonesia, Gree telah meyakinkan pengguna di pasar Indonesia dengan memenangkan proyek-proyek besar di Indonesia, seperti Pabrik Chevron Pekanbaru, Grand Mercure & Hotel Ibis Yogyakarta, Menara Satoria di Surabaya, Landmark Pluit dan Sudirman Suites di Jakarta hingga banyaknya dealer yang tersebar di seluruh pulau Jawa, Bali dan Sumatera.

company_desc:
Launched in 2020, Segari is one of the fastest growing commerce grocery start-ups in Indonesia, delivering fresh produce to consumers around Jakarta, Tangerang, and Bekasi areas.

Founded by Yosua Setiawan, Farandy Ramadhana, and Farand Anugerah, Segari was initiated to help solving Indonesia’s age-old agriculture supply chain issue and a mission to make e-grocery and the end-to-end supply chain in Indonesia to be more efficient and reliable within 15 hours delivery from farm to table.

A seamless grocery shopping experience is consistently being committed by Segari to provide a full range of high-quality groceries across fruit, vegetables, meat and staples categories at the best price.

Within less than 12 months of operation, Segari has achieved over 20 times growth in users, number of platform transactions, and revenues (AC Insights, 2021) while empowering local farmer communities and providing the best quality of fresh produce to support Indonesian moms in providing healthy and nutritious food for their families.

Follow us to know more about job openings and exciting updates on Life at Segari (Instagram: @lifeatsegari)

company_desc:
Amartha is a technology company that has a mission of realizing shared prosperity through the development of digital financial infrastructure for the grassroots economy. Established in 2010, Amartha exists as a microfinance to connect rural micro-enterprises run by strong women with access to affordable capital.

Now Amartha is growing as a technology company that is building a microfinance ecosystem to connect more to the rapidly growing digital economy through capital, investment, and payment services. Amartha advances the bottom pyramid economy by increasing the competitiveness of micro and small entrepreneurs. In doing so, we empower more female MSMEs, create jobs and build more inclusive economic growth.

responsibilities:
System Operations & Support

  • Maintain and support daily operations of finance systems.
  • Ensure finance transactions are correctly configured and processed within the system.
  • Support month-end and year-end closing activities from a system perspective.


Troubleshooting & Issue Resolution

  • Investigate, diagnose, and resolve system issues related to finance modules and integrations.
  • Perform root cause analysis and implement fixes or workarounds.
  • Escalate complex issues to relevant internal teams or vendors where necessary.


Implementation & Enhancement Support

  • Assist with system implementation, configuration, and enhancement initiatives.
  • Support automation efforts to improve finance processes.
  • Execute system changes based on approved requirements.


User Acceptance Testing (UAT)

  • Prepare and execute UAT for new features, enhancements, or system changes.
  • Validate system behaviour and ensure alignment with business requirements.


Integration Support

  • Support integrations between finance systems and other platforms (e.g. sales, warehouse, HR).
  • Monitor data flows, validate data accuracy, and troubleshoot integration issues.


Reporting & Data Support

  • Develop and maintain standard finance reports and dashboards.
  • Support data extraction and validation for finance and audit requirements.


Documentation

  • Prepare and maintain system documentation, SOPs, and user guides.
  • Ensure documentation remains up to date with system changes.


User Access Support

  • Support user access requests by validating requirements and coordinating with relevant stakeholders.
  • Assist with access-related troubleshooting and ensure alignment with defined access policies.


Collaboration

  • Work closely with Finance, Technology, and Operations teams to support system usage and improvements.
  • Coordinate with vendors and external consultants as required.
requirements:
• Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
  • Demonstrate experience with finance systems and ERP platforms (particularly NetSuite or similar ERP systems, e.g. SAP).
  • Demonstrate a strong understanding of financial processes.
  • Troubleshoot functional and basic technical issues.
  • Demonstrate familiarity with system integration concepts (APIs, data flows, logs).
  • Apply strong analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and attention to detail.
  • Communicate effectively and collaborate across teams.
  • Maintain high integrity in handling confidential financial data.
  • Apply good software engineering practices.
  • Use Python, JavaScript, XML, and leverage AI in development.

Job Description:

  • Maintain daily merchant relations, coordinate issues, and respond to merchant needs in a timely manner.
  • Drive merchant sales growth and achieve category KPIs. Be sensitive to sales fluctuations of categories and merchants, and continuously improve the sales volume and proportion of key merchants through operational strategies. Manage merchant activity, retention rate, churn warning, and retention initiatives.
  • Implement tiered operation for merchants (top merchants/mid-tier merchants/new merchants) and develop differentiated operational strategies, including differentiated management of communication frequency, negotiation intensity, resource allocation, subsidies, etc.

  • Monitor core of data categories and merchants by daily and weekly, including traffic, conversion rate, average order value, repurchase rate, etc.
  • Analyze the causes of underperforming merchants and provide actionable improvement suggestions.
  • Generate weekly and monthly category operation reports to support decision-making.

company_desc:
Hangry is not just a place for great food, but also a place for HangryMates to build remarkable careers. Founded in 2019, we've grown from an unknown local player to a company that competes head-to-head with global brands. We are a place full of people that embrace fun, challenge, ambitious goals, and collaborative working environment.


OUR DNA

  • Growth Mindset: At Hangry, we're driven by growth and challenge. We never think we are smart enough, we’re always learning and improving. Wherever you start from, you'll find abundant opportunities for development. Hangry is a safe place to learn; we foster an environment where we learn from each other, share knowledge and experiences to help everyone grow and succeed.
  • Team Spirit: We build, support, and help each other so that together we can achieve our goals. We create a place where everyone is valued and cared for. We work on highly ambitious, dynamic, and challenging projects in an environment that is positive and most importantly - fun!
  • Supportive Leadership: Our leaders at Hangry are expected to embody approachability, humility, and commitment to their employees' success. They are also expected to listen, serve, and provide helpful guidance and insights to the team. 
  • Best Ideas Win: We listen to ideas from every team member regardless of their position and seniority. It's not about who speaks, it's about the quality of the content. We have enjoyed breakthrough ideas from people across different levels and we are committed to continuing that habit.
  • Work Smarter & Faster: At Hangry, we value our time, hence we prioritize working smarter and faster. We always try to find ways to refine workflows & processes so that our team can focus on tasks that truly matter.


WHAT WE OFFER

  • Flexibility: We encourage work-life balance with our hybrid working arrangement. Other than the designated Work From Office days, HangryMates can work from anywhere. We also cap meeting hours to make sure everyone has the chance to take care of their various areas of life other than work.
  • Competitive Compensation: We conduct regular benchmarking to ensure that your skills, experience, and dedication are rewarded with compensation that is competitive in the market.
  • Health Benefit Program: Your well-being matters to us. We provide a comprehensive health benefit package, ensuring easy access to quality healthcare for you and your family (*including your spouse and two children).

  • Generous Paid Leave: We respect your personal time. Enjoy 15 days of paid leave per year to disconnect from work, recharge, and unwind; with an additional day granted on every work anniversary, up to a total of 20 leave days annually.


Join us at Hangry, where each day offers the opportunity to learn and thrive in a dynamic and challenging environment. It's more than just a job; it's a journey toward self-growth, supported by a collaborative and nurturing culture dedicated to your development.

company_desc:
Enseval as Indonesia's largest Healthcare Product Distribution Company has been reached all areas in Indonesia through its 48 branches. Furthermore, Enseval also expanded its contribution of Indonesia’s better health service through selling raw materials for pharmaceuticals and cosmetics purpose, as well as medical and health diagnostic tools.


Enseval has the vision to be a leading and integrated distribution and logistics company through service excellence, competent people and advanced technology. This vision is followed by the company’s mission to contribute in improving the quality of health and delivering the best health care products for Indonesia.


Through the passion and commitment for providing better quality of health for Indonesia’s families, Enseval has been grown to have 46 branches all over big cities in Indonesia and five subsidiaries that run business in various areas:


PT Tri Sapta Jaya – operates in distribution sector for pharmaceutical and health care products. The company focus is more to expand its delivery line in lower market segments and more remote areas.


PT Millenia Dharma Insani – providing health services through building clinics namely Mitra Sana. The main idea of this company is to offer affordable and integrated health facilities, consisting clinics, pharmacies, and mini markets.


PT Enseval Medika Prima – focus more in marketing and trading sectors, particularly trading and marketing of health devices.


PT Global Cemindo Megatrading – is a company that concentrates in selling raw materials, as due to rapid growth in such business sectors.


PT Renalmed Tiara Utama – the company mission is to acquire the business from third parties to supply materials and hemodialysis machines for kidney failure patients to multiple hospitals and clinics.


With its contribution in enhancing quality of life in Indonesia for more than 42 years, Enseval touches so many people lives in so many different ways

company_desc:
PT Ultra Sakti is a pharmaceutical manufacturing and marketing company.

The company was initially dedicated to manufacture pharmaceutical products in the form of standard and generic medicines. In responding the market needs, in 2010 the company moved into consumer goods based on market trends and created the brand ‘FreshCare’ aromatic oils with new fragrances that people are more comfortable to wear in public. In 2012, building upon the success of the FreshCare brand, the company was enlarged by adding PT Tresno Joyo, a company that specializes in traditional medicines.

Since moving to consumed goods sector, PT Ultra Sakti has manufactured and sold 3 Top Brand Product which won many awards: Freshcare, Madu TJ and HotinCream. Each year PT Ultra Sakti launches new innovative product. As sales grow up, PT Ultra Sakti now has 3 plant site (Pulo Gadung, Cikiwul, Cipendawa), and 2 dedicated warehouses (Pulo Gadung). PT Ultra Sakti plant site certified for Good Manufacturing Practice: CPOB (Cara Pembuatan Obat Yang Baik) , CPOTB (Cara Pembuatan Traditional Obat Yang Baik) from BPOM (Badan Pengawasasan Obat Dan Makanan/Indonesia National Agency Drug and Food Control).

PT Ultra Sakti is committed to produce high quality standard products as our contributions to improve the quality of life.

company_desc:
GreenSM Indonesia: Leading the Way in Sustainable Mobility Solutions

GreenSM Indonesia is part of GSM, an innovative technology firm that offers Vietnam's premier all-electric multi-service platform, now expanding its revolutionary approach to Southeast Asia. We provide reliable and eco-friendly mobility solutions, including electric taxis, motorbikes, and on-demand express services.

Our Mission:

To create a sustainable, green, and convenient transportation ecosystem that empowers communities to embrace a greener, smarter future. We believe in driving positive change and shaping a technologically advanced landscape for everyone.

Key Achievements by GSM in Just One Year:

  1. Became the second-largest ride-hailing platform in Vietnam, rapidly establishing itself as a leading player.
  2. Launched a groundbreaking product that has significantly impacted the transportation industry.
  3. Earned recognition as one of Vietnam's top 10 highlights within its economy.

The Road Ahead:

GreenSM Indonesia is committed to pushing the boundaries of innovation and sustainability in transportation. Join us in our mission to pioneer the future of mobility across the region and contribute to a cleaner, more sustainable environment for all.

Together, we are creating the blueprint for a green and intelligent future.

responsibilities:
1. Memiliki pengalaman minimal dua tahun mengelola iklan berbayar di Google Ads dan Meta Ads.

2. Mampu membuat strategi kampanye yang fokus pada konversi mulai dari perencanaan, eksekusi, optimasi harian, hingga pelaporan.

3. Memahami teknis tracking seperti pixel, event, UTM, Google Tag Manager dan conversion API agar data kampanye akurat.

4. Terbiasa membaca data performa dan mengambil keputusan cepat berbasis angka misalnya CTR, CPC, CPM, ROAS dan CPA.

5. Menguasai SEO on page dan off page.

6. Memiliki pengalaman membangun backlink berkualitas dan memahami cara mengevaluasi domain authority, relevansi dan risiko spam.

7. Memahami riset kata kunci dan mampu membuat konten yang mendukung peringkat organik.

8. Terbiasa membuat landing page yang mampu mendorong konversi misalnya struktur konten, copywriting, CTA dan load speed.

9. Mampu membuat creative iklan yang menarik dan sesuai audiens terutama untuk kampanye Meta.

10. Memahami customer journey dan mampu merancang funnel digital mulai dari awareness hingga retargeting.

11. Cekatan dalam monitoring iklan harian serta mampu melakukan A/B testing secara terstruktur.

12. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik dan terbiasa bekerja kolaboratif dengan tim desain, konten dan produk.

13. Berorientasi pada hasil dengan target utama peningkatan konversi dan efisiensi biaya iklan

company_desc:
Fintopia Indonesia (PT Indonesia Fintopia Technology) is a subsidiary of Fintopia Inc. Founded in 2015 and headquartered in Beijing, China. Fintopia Inc. provides affordable financial services for everyone, especially for those unbanked and underserved. Fintopia Inc. quickly expands across Asia with Indonesia being its second largest market by transaction volume.

Fintopia Indonesia (established in 2017), led by its product Easycash, has 24 million cumulative registered users and has provided IDR30.5 trillion of total accumulative loans since its establishment. The company has more than 4 millions total accumulated borrowers with various backgrounds, such as small business owners, farmers, students, and other professions

company_desc:
BRIK is a place where Builders can build. A fast-growing B2B industrial material tech start-up is looking for future business leaders to support turbocharging our GROWTH in Indonesia. Inviting hungry and passionate high-caliber professionals to work closely with BRIK to transform the B2B Industrial Material segment.


BRIK focuses on proprietary next-generation Industrial Materials (product) development, such as green concrete and heat reduction paints, and also build 1P/ 3P distribution channel - cutting middlemen and focusing on selling B2B direct-to-user. The company is almost profitable, and is currently on expansion mode.


If you are passionate about big old industrial sector, but you do not like working for corporates and is passionate on the action of building a 21st century startup to transform the space, this is it. Work directly with founding member team, on a fast paced environment.


BRIK is backed by Accel, B Capital, AC Ventures, Northstar, Endeavour/ Alter Global, Infra.Market, Sinarmas Land, L&W (Woh Hup), Bizongo, TUL, amongst others.


BRIK is a house of products operates under different brands such as BRIK Mix, PaintPro, BRIK Werks, and Hella.

responsibilities:

  • Mahir menggunakan N8N, Zapier, Make, atau automation tools sejenis — bisa membangun workflow dari nol

  • Pengalaman integrasi API, terutama API marketplace e-commerce Indonesia (Shopee, TikTok Shop, Lazada) menjadi nilai plus besar

responsibilities:
We are looking for a Merchandiser Fashion (Costing) to manage cost analysis, price negotiations, and vendor coordination to ensure efficient production while maintaining quality and profitability. This role requires strong analytical skills, negotiation abilities, and knowledge of fabric, trims, and garment production.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Analyze and calculate product costs, including fabric, trims, labor, overhead, and logistics, to ensure competitive pricing.
  • Work closely with design, production, and sourcing teams to develop cost-effective solutions without compromising quality.
  • Negotiate pricing with suppliers, vendors, and factories to achieve the best cost and margin.
  • Review and analyze vendor quotations, ensuring transparency and accuracy in cost breakdowns.
  • Monitor raw material costs, exchange rates, and production expenses to optimize pricing strategies.
  • Develop and maintain cost sheets, pricing reports, and margin analyses.
  • Identify cost-saving opportunities while maintaining product integrity and brand standards.
  • Coordinate sample development and pre-production approvals to validate costing accuracy.
requirements:
• Minimum 5 years of experience in fashion merchandising, costing, or production.
  • Proficiency in costing methods, price negotiations, and vendor management.
  • Skilled in Microsoft Excel, ERP systems, and cost analysis tools.
  • Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

company_desc: Universitas Ciputra memiliki komitmen bahwa disetiap alur studi/konsentrasi yang ada memiliki tujuan sama yaitu membekali setiap mahasiswa agar mampu menjadi Entrepreneur sesuai keahlian masing-masing. Pendidikan dan Praktek Entrepreneurship diberikan secara merata disemua alur studi/konsentrasi mulai dari awal perkuliahan dimulai sampai akhir perkuliahan. Entrepreneurship memiliki arti yang lebih luas dari sekedar berjualan, membuka dan menjalankan bisnis karena didalamnya terdapat unsur kreatifitas & inovasi, kemampuan membaca kebutuhan pasar (market sensitivity) dan pengambilan resiko yang terhitung (calculated risk taking). Pada era masa kini, tantangan zaman semakin berat, kompetisi global terjadi, oleh karena itu Entrepreneur yang dihasilkan oleh institusi pendidikan tinggi haruslah Entrepreneur intelektual dengan keahlian sesuai bidang yang dipelajarinya. Tuntutan zaman ini yang mendorong kami untuk semakin meningkatkan dan mengembangkan kualitas dalam segala hal diantaranya adalah penambahan dan pengembangan beberapa program yang ditawarkan ke calon mahasiswa.

company_desc:
Ukirama: Empowering Business Growth Since 2016 – Where Your Growth Matters.

Established in 2016, Ukirama provides cloud-based Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) solutions to a diverse portfolio of clients, ranging from prominent international corporations such as Ducati, Auntie Anne's, and Pierre Cardin, to numerous small and medium-sized enterprises (UMKM). Our comprehensive and user-friendly platform enables businesses to streamline operations and achieve sustainable growth through integrated tools for finance, inventory management, manufacturing, and more. Ukirama is committed to making robust ERP technology accessible to businesses of all scales, contributing to the digitalization of Indonesia's economy.

At Ukirama, we foster a collaborative and growth-oriented environment. We value continuous learning and provide opportunities for team members to develop their expertise through mentorship and engagement with experienced leaders. Individuals are encouraged to contribute their ideas and play a meaningful role in building solutions that directly impact our clients' success. Join Ukirama to be part of a dynamic team that is dedicated to empowering businesses and driving technological advancement across Indonesia.

responsibilities:
We are looking for a Back-end Engineer who will primarily support our mobile applications by building, integrating, and maintaining backend services. While the main focus of this role is backend development, you will also work closely with our mobile apps (iOS/Android) and should be comfortable collaborating on mobile-related integrations when needed.


This role works closely with the CEO on a daily basis and reports to the CTO remotely, requiring strong communication, adaptability, and ownership.


Responsibilities:

  • Develop, maintain, and optimize backend services to support iOS and Android applications
  • Build and integrate APIs used by mobile applications
  • Work with cloud infrastructure and backend services (AWS)
  • Collaborate with mobile developers using React Native or Flutter
  • Occasionally contribute to or troubleshoot Next.js backend code
  • Ensure backend reliability, performance, and scalability
  • Work closely with leadership to translate product needs into technical solutions
requirements:
Requirements:

  • 2+ years of experience in backend or full-stack development
  • Comfortable working with APIs and backend systems
  • Familiarity with AWS and basic cloud infrastructure
  • Understanding of how mobile apps (iOS/Android) interact with backend services
  • Experience working with or supporting React Native or Flutter apps
  • Has at least one published app on the App Store and/or Play Store (direct or team contribution)
  • Based in Jakarta
  • Fluent in English and Bahasa Indonesia
  • Comfortable working directly with leadership in a fast-paced environment


Join us in transforming language learning and empowering global communication.
company_desc:
PT Intermedia Multibahasa Indonesia (LingoTalk) is a language learning education technology startup based in Indonesia. Aiming to deliver only what matters, LingoTalk serves as an aggregator to produce personalized material to the users which are pre-assessed based on their needs and preferences.

Our product, B2B Corporate Training, offers specially crafted syllabus for developing employee skills and knowledge in foreign languages and Indonesian Language for Foreigners both of junior and senior level. Through an engaging learning journey, we invite our customers to identify and enhance their potential​.

company_desc: PT. Metrodata Electronics Tbk, known as Metrodata Group, is the leading information communication technology (ICT) companies in Indonesia. To fulfill that commitment, we invite you, highly commitment professional to explore and be part of our team.

responsibilities:
Lebih dari sekadar Personal Trainer, siap menjadi leader & figur strategis di dalam klub?


FIT HUB memiliki 120+ klub di seluruh Indonesia dan merupakan salah satu gym dengan pertumbuhan tercepat.


PT Leader adalah elite track untuk Personal Trainer dengan sertifikasi internasional dan potensi pendapatan tanpa batas.


Siap naik kelas dan menuju jalur karir managerial lebih cepat? Ini kesempatan Anda!


Mengapa menjadi PT Leader di FIT HUB?


  • Stabilitas & Komisi: Gaji Pokok yang kompetitif + Tunjangan Jabatan + Komisi Tak Terbatas (Skema insentif sangat menarik!)
  • Investasi Ilmu: Pelatihan skala Nasional & Internasional senilai puluhan juta rupiah
  • Proteksi Penuh: BPJS Kesehatan & Ketenagakerjaan
  • Jenjang Karir: Kesempatan karir hingga level managerial dengan cepat
  • Benefit relokasi untuk penempatan di luar domisili


Deskripsi Pekerjaan:

  • Master of Revenue & Retention: Jadi andalan dalam mendapatkan klien baru & menjaga loyalitas mereka melalui hasil yang nyata.
  • Program Expert: Merancang program latihan khusus untuk berbagai kebutuhan para member.
  • Lifestyle Consultant: Menjadi pendamping & motivator untuk klien agar mencapai fitness goals yang diinginkan.
  • Leader & Mentor: Membimbing PT junior dan membangun atmosfer kerja yang produktif serta suportif di klub.
  • Brand Ambassador: Menjaga standar layanan elit dan menjadi wajah profesional FIT HUB di mata member.
requirements:
1. Memiliki pengalaman sebagai Personal Trainer level advance/level 2 selama minimal 2 tahun atau level elite selama minimal 1 tahun di Mega Gym
  2. Memiliki penampilan fit dan proporsional serta menjalankan kebiasaan hidup sehat
  3. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi & interpersonal yang baik, serta mampu bekerja efektif dalam tim
  4. Memiliki kepribadian yang jujur, bertanggung jawab, dapat dipercaya, dan bersedia mengikuti training induction selama 3 minggu
  5. Memiliki minimal 4 sertifikat keahlian sebagai Personal Trainer

company_desc:
FIT HUB adalah perusahaan Health & Wellness dengan misi membuat hidup sehat lebih mudah diakses oleh semua orang di Indonesia. 💪🇮🇩

Sebagai brand gym terbesar di Indonesia dengan 130+ cabang, FIT HUB menghadirkan fasilitas dan program kebugaran yang terjangkau namun tetap berkualitas di berbagai kota.

Kami percaya bahwa perubahan besar dimulai dari mereka yang menemani perjalanan member setiap hari. 🤝

Didukung oleh ratusan karyawan, setiap peran di FIT HUB memiliki dampak nyata bagi pengalaman dan perkembangan member.

Kami membuka peluang bagi setiap individu untuk berkembang dan membangun karier jangka panjang di dunia kebugaran.

responsibilities:
As the Lead Pricing & Ordering Specialist, you will build the mathematical backbone of our trading and inventory strategies. This role goes beyond reporting — you will develop manual formulas and advanced models to predict market shifts, price volatility, and demand for higher education textbooks.


You will serve as the “Mathematical Engine,” bridging leadership, operations, and the Data Engineering team to ensure purchasing and sales strategies are driven by rigorous statistical proof rather than intuition.


You will also provide technical leadership in quantitative decision-making, set analytical standards, guide stakeholders in interpreting models, and mentor analysts contributing to pricing, ordering, and data-driven initiatives. In addition, you will ensure our analytics can support scalable and integrated growth ideas, including phygital bundles, B2B channels, and demand intelligence initiatives.


Key Responsibilities

  • Mathematical Modelling: Define, validate, and govern the quantitative formulas used to determine buy/sell spreads, order quantities, and capital deployment timing, ensuring they are consistently applied across the business. 
  • Advanced Forecasting: Set the forecasting methodology and standards used to predict textbook lifecycle and demand, ensuring purchasing volume decisions across academic seasons are driven by statistically sound assumptions. 
  • Data Architecture Partnership: Provide technical direction to the Data Team on data aggregation requirements, ensuring data pipelines support advanced quantitative analysis for pricing and ordering decisions. 
  • Assumption Testing: Own the stress‑testing framework for purchasing exposure and inventory risk, defining scenarios and assumptions used to evaluate market shifts and structural changes. 
  • Optimization: Define the optimization logic and metrics (e.g., weighted average cost of inventory, turnover targets, ordering cycles) used to maximize ROI across academic seasons. 
  • Quantitative Leadership: Act as the internal authority on pricing and ordering analytics, governing how quantitative insights are interpreted and applied in leadership and operational decision‑making. 
  • Cross-Functional Influence: Guide and influence operations, pricing, and data teams to ensure analytical insights are embedded into decision‑making processes and operational workflows, including translating viable ideas from internal initiatives or pilot programs into pricing and ordering decision frameworks where appropriate. 
  • Mentorship and Capability Building: Provide guidance and mentorship to analysts or junior team members contributing to pricing, forecasting, and ordering analysis, helping elevate the overall analytical capability of the organization.
requirements:
• Advanced Academic Background: Master’s in Mathematics, Statistics, Econometrics, or Physics. 
  • Experience: 
  • 5–7 years of experience in quantitative modeling, pricing strategy, capital allocation, purchasing optimization, or a related analytical field. 
  • Experience acting as a technical lead or principal contributor, setting analytical direction and decision frameworks that others execute against in pricing, ordering, or inventory‑driven environments. 
  • Statistical Mastery: Deep expertise in probability theory, regression analysis, and predictive modeling. 
  • The "Manual" Edge: While you know how to code, you possess the ability to derive formulas manually and explain the "why" behind the numbers to non-technical stakeholders. 
  • Data Savvy: Experience working with large datasets and a strong understanding of how data must be structured for high-level analysis (SQL proficiency is a plus). 
  • Business Acumen: The ability to translate a formula like P(t)=P0 e−αt into a clear ordering or purchasing recommendation — including when to accumulate stock, hold positions, or liquidate inventory. 
  • Leadership & Communication: Strong ability to influence cross-functional stakeholders, communicate complex quantitative insights clearly, and guide analytical decision-making across teams.
