responsibilities:
• Support the daily cash operations cycle: monitoring bank balances, executing payments within the approval matrix, and flagging discrepancies 
  • Maintain and update the bank database — accounts, signatories, interest rates, user access — and conduct monthly reviews 
  • Assist in developing, documenting, and maintaining Treasury SOPs (daily cash ops, payment controls, FX dealing, investment, margin management) 
  • Support the approval matrix rollout — tracking transactions and ensuring zero processing outside defined limits 
  • Prepare FX exposure reports and assist in executing forward contracts under the supervision of the Treasury Manager 
  • Monitor the float account architecture (Settlement, OPEX, Investment, Nostro tiers) and ensure sweep rules are followed 
  • Track interest income across bank accounts and support idle balance deployment into approved instruments (overnight sweeps, time deposits, money market funds) 
  • Prepare regular internal treasury reports and dashboards for management review
requirements:
• 3–5 years of experience in corporate treasury operations, corporate banking, or financial operations in fintech, or corporate treasury environment 
  • Hands-on experience with bank reconciliation, cash management, and payment processing 
  • Working knowledge of FX instruments — at minimum, spot and forward contracts 
  • Solid understanding of investment instruments: time deposits, overnight sweeps 
  • Extremely meticulous and process-driven — able to spot discrepancies in large data sets and flag issues proactively 
  • High sense of urgency — comfortable operating at a fast pace with tight daily deadlines 
  • Proficient in Excel / Google Sheets for reporting and data management 
  • Strong written communication skills — able to write clear, structured SOPs and reports 
  • Comfortable working in a startup/scaleup environment with evolving processes

company_desc:
GreenSM Indonesia: Leading the Way in Sustainable Mobility Solutions

GreenSM Indonesia is part of GSM, an innovative technology firm that offers Vietnam's premier all-electric multi-service platform, now expanding its revolutionary approach to Southeast Asia. We provide reliable and eco-friendly mobility solutions, including electric taxis, motorbikes, and on-demand express services.

Our Mission:

To create a sustainable, green, and convenient transportation ecosystem that empowers communities to embrace a greener, smarter future. We believe in driving positive change and shaping a technologically advanced landscape for everyone.

Key Achievements by GSM in Just One Year:

  1. Became the second-largest ride-hailing platform in Vietnam, rapidly establishing itself as a leading player.
  2. Launched a groundbreaking product that has significantly impacted the transportation industry.
  3. Earned recognition as one of Vietnam's top 10 highlights within its economy.

The Road Ahead:

GreenSM Indonesia is committed to pushing the boundaries of innovation and sustainability in transportation. Join us in our mission to pioneer the future of mobility across the region and contribute to a cleaner, more sustainable environment for all.

Together, we are creating the blueprint for a green and intelligent future.

company_desc: Universitas Ciputra memiliki komitmen bahwa disetiap alur studi/konsentrasi yang ada memiliki tujuan sama yaitu membekali setiap mahasiswa agar mampu menjadi Entrepreneur sesuai keahlian masing-masing. Pendidikan dan Praktek Entrepreneurship diberikan secara merata disemua alur studi/konsentrasi mulai dari awal perkuliahan dimulai sampai akhir perkuliahan. Entrepreneurship memiliki arti yang lebih luas dari sekedar berjualan, membuka dan menjalankan bisnis karena didalamnya terdapat unsur kreatifitas & inovasi, kemampuan membaca kebutuhan pasar (market sensitivity) dan pengambilan resiko yang terhitung (calculated risk taking). Pada era masa kini, tantangan zaman semakin berat, kompetisi global terjadi, oleh karena itu Entrepreneur yang dihasilkan oleh institusi pendidikan tinggi haruslah Entrepreneur intelektual dengan keahlian sesuai bidang yang dipelajarinya. Tuntutan zaman ini yang mendorong kami untuk semakin meningkatkan dan mengembangkan kualitas dalam segala hal diantaranya adalah penambahan dan pengembangan beberapa program yang ditawarkan ke calon mahasiswa.

responsibilities:
• Pengajaran & Bimbingan – Mengajar, membimbing mahasiswa, dan mengembangkan kurikulum.
  • Penelitian & Publikasi – Melakukan riset, menulis jurnal, dan mencari pendanaan penelitian.
  • Pengabdian Masyarakat – Memberikan pelatihan, konsultasi, dan kontribusi bagi komunitas.
  • Pengembangan Profesional – Mengikuti konferensi, membangun jejaring, dan mengembangkan keahlian.
  • Kepemimpinan Akademik – Berperan dalam administrasi, kebijakan akademik, dan akreditasi.
requirements:
• Kualifikasi Akademik – Memiliki gelar Professor Doktor (Prof. PhD) di bidang Manajemen atau disiplin terkait.
  • Pengalaman Mengajar & Penelitian – Berpengalaman dalam pengajaran di perguruan tinggi serta memiliki publikasi ilmiah di jurnal bereputasi.
  • Kompetensi Profesional – Menguasai teori dan praktik manajemen serta memiliki jaringan akademik dan industri yang luas.
  • Kemampuan Kepemimpinan & Administrasi – Berpengalaman dalam kepemimpinan akademik, pengelolaan program studi, dan akreditasi.
  • Komitmen Pengabdian Masyarakat – Aktif dalam memberikan pelatihan, konsultasi, dan kontribusi terhadap pengembangan masyarakat.

Pendidikan dan Praktek Entrepreneurship diberikan secara merata disemua alur studi/konsentrasi mulai dari awal perkuliahan dimulai sampai akhir perkuliahan. Entrepreneurship memiliki arti yang lebih luas dari sekedar berjualan, membuka dan menjalankan bisnis karena didalamnya terdapat unsur kreatifitas & inovasi, kemampuan membaca kebutuhan pasar (market sensitivity) dan pengambilan resiko yang terhitung (calculated risk taking). Pada era masa kini, tantangan zaman semakin berat, kompetisi global terjadi, oleh karena itu Entrepreneur yang dihasilkan oleh institusi pendidikan tinggi haruslah Entrepreneur intelektual dengan keahlian sesuai bidang yang dipelajarinya. Tuntutan zaman ini yang mendorong kami untuk semakin meningkatkan dan mengembangkan kualitas dalam segala hal diantaranya adalah penambahan dan pengembangan beberapa program yang ditawarkan ke calon mahasiswa.

company_desc:
At Reemotely, we believe world-class opportunities shouldn’t be limited by borders. Our mission is to open doors for talented Indonesians who aspire to build sustainable careers with international companies — all while working remotely from home.

We partner with SMEs and growing businesses abroad to connect them with skilled Indonesian professionals in administration, marketing, finance, and creative roles. By handling end-to-end recruitment and HR management, we make sure our team members are not just placed in jobs but set up for long-term career success.


Our Goals for Indonesian Talent:

  • 🚀 Provide access to international career pathways without needing to relocate.
  • 💼 Offer stable, remote-friendly job opportunities with fair compensation.
  • 📈 Help professionals grow their skills in global work environments.
  • 🌐 Build a trusted community of Indonesian remote workers who can thrive in the digital economy.


Joining Reemotely means becoming part of a movement: turning Indonesian talent into global professionals.

responsibilities:
Key Responsibilities :

  • Security Architecture & Strategy
  • Mendesain end-to-end security architecture untuk:
  • Application (Web, Mobile, API)
  • Infrastructure (On-premise & Cloud)
  • Data protection & Identity
  • Menentukan trust boundaries, security control, dan integration antar layer
  • Menyusun security roadmap min. 3 tahun (people, process, technology)
  • Threat Modeling & Risk Management
  • Melakukan threat modeling menggunakan:
  • STRIDE
  • MITRE ATT&CK
  • Menentukan defense-in-depth strategy
  • Mengidentifikasi risiko keamanan dan merekomendasikan mitigasi yang realistis

Blue Team Foundation :

  • Menyiapkan fondasi Blue Team (defensive security):
  • Logging & monitoring strategy
  • Incident detection & response flow
  • Baseline security control
  • Menentukan tools & proses awal (SIEM, alerting, incident handling)

Red Team & Pentest Awareness :

  • Menjadi penghubung antara internal team dengan:
  • Red Team
  • Vendor pentest

Menerjemahkan hasil pentest menjadi:

  • Action plan
  • Arsitektur & perbaikan sistem
  • Secure SDLC & AppSec
  • Menyusun dan mengawal Secure SDLC
  • Menentukan baseline AppSec:
  • Secure coding guideline
  • Security review pada design & deployment
  • Bekerja sama dengan engineering & product team
requirements:
Requirements : 

  • Experience & Technical Skill
  • 5–8 tahun pengalaman di bidang Information Security / Cyber Security
  • Pengalaman merancang security architecture (bukan hanya operasional)
  • Pemahaman kuat pada:
  • Network & application security
  • Identity & access management
  • Security control & best practice

Certification (Mandatory / Preferred)

Wajib: salah satu dari berikut:

  • CompTIA Security+
  • CISSP

Nilai tambah (opsional):

  • CCSP
  • OSCP / CEH

Soft Skills :

  • Mampu berkomunikasi dengan non-security stakeholders (engineering, product, management)
  • Berpikir strategis dan decision-maker, bukan hanya eksekutor
  • Mampu bekerja mandiri dan membangun sistem dari nol
  • Risk-based mindset (tidak over-engineering)

Nice to Have :

  • Pengalaman membangun Blue Team dari awal
  • Pernah bekerja di environment fintech / high-risk industry

company_desc:
Fintopia Indonesia (PT Indonesia Fintopia Technology) is a subsidiary of Fintopia Inc. Founded in 2015 and headquartered in Beijing, China. Fintopia Inc. provides affordable financial services for everyone, especially for those unbanked and underserved. Fintopia Inc. quickly expands across Asia with Indonesia being its second largest market by transaction volume.

Fintopia Indonesia (established in 2017), led by its product Easycash, has 24 million cumulative registered users and has provided IDR30.5 trillion of total accumulative loans since its establishment. The company has more than 4 millions total accumulated borrowers with various backgrounds, such as small business owners, farmers, students, and other professions

responsibilities:
Job Description (Core Outcomes)

  • Own LLM features end-to-end: prompt design → orchestration → backend integration → release → monitoring.
  • Implement RAG/retrieval systems with real production considerations: chunking, reranking, caching, citations, fallbacks.
  • Build agent workflows (tool calling, state, retries, guardrails, fallback models).
  • Set up evaluation & monitoring: quality metrics, regression tests for prompt/RAG, latency & cost monitoring.
  • Production hardening: prompt-injection defenses, PII handling, rate limits, abuse prevention.
  • Optimize cost/performance: caching, batching, model routing (small/large), context trimming.
  • Collaborate with Product/Design to craft AI UX that feels “wow” and actually works.
requirements:
Requirements (Must Have)

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
  • 2-5 years of experience as AI Engineer.
  • Strong backend engineering (Node.js/TypeScript or Python) with solid API design.
  • Proven experience implementing LLM via API (OpenAI/Claude/Gemini) in production or serious shipped projects.
  • Strong understanding of: tokens/cost, embeddings, retrieval, hallucination mitigation, and evaluation mindset.
  • Familiar with databases & simple pipelines (Postgres/MySQL, queue, cache).
  • Engineering maturity: debugging, testing, logging, documentation.


Plus Points (Nice to Have)

  • Experience with LangChain/LlamaIndex (or custom orchestration).
  • Vector DB experience (pgvector, Pinecone, Qdrant, Weaviate).
  • Audio pipeline experience (STT/TTS) for interview simulation.
  • MLOps/observability stack (OpenTelemetry, Prometheus/Grafana, Sentry, etc.).

responsibilities:
Tanggung Jawab :

  • Merancang, membangun, dan mengelola CI/CD pipelines untuk aplikasi dan infrastruktur
  • Mengautomasi provisioning dan konfigurasi bare-metal dan on-premise infrastructure
  • Mengelola dan mengoperasikan production environment berbasis data center
  • Menjaga availability, reliability, dan performance sistem produksi
  • Melakukan troubleshooting lintas layer (application, container, OS, network, hardware)
  • Mengimplementasikan monitoring, alerting, backup, dan disaster recovery
  • Memastikan security baseline, compliance, dan audit readiness
  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim developer untuk meningkatkan deployability dan observability aplikasi
  • Menyusun dan memelihara technical documentation dan runbooks
  • Deployment dan maintenance aplikasi menggunakan Docker & Kubernetes
requirements:
Kualifikasi :

  • Pemahaman kuat tentang Linux system administration (systemd, networking, storage, security)
  • Pengalaman 2–5 tahun sebagai DevOps / Platform / SRE
  • Pengalaman mengelola on-premise data center atau bare-metal infrastructure
  • Pengalaman dengan container technologies (Docker, Kubernetes), termasuk deployment di bare-metal atau self-managed cluster
  • Pemahaman konsep virtualization dan container orchestration (VMware, KVM, atau sejenisnya)
  • Familiar dengan cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) sebagai pelengkap/hybrid environment
  • Pengalaman menggunakan Git dan workflow kolaboratif (GitOps menjadi nilai tambah)
  • Pengalaman dengan CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitLab CI, ArgoCD, atau sejenisnya)
  • Menguasai Terraform atau tools IaC lainnya
  • Pemahaman dasar networking (DNS, Load Balancer, SSL)

Kemampuan Teknis :

  • Infrastructure & Automation
  • Infrastructure as Code untuk on-premise dan hybrid (Terraform, Ansible, Packer)
  • Provisioning dan konfigurasi bare-metal servers (PXE boot, IPMI/iDRAC, RAID, filesystem, kernel tuning)
  • Capacity planning dan resource optimization (CPU, memory, storage, network)
  • Container & Platform
  • Kubernetes di lingkungan non-managed / on-premise
  • Container networking dan storage (CNI, CSI, persistent storage on bare-metal)
  • Helm, Kustomize, atau GitOps tools
  • Monitoring, Logging & Reliability
  • Monitoring dan alerting (Prometheus, Grafana, Alertmanager)
  • Centralized logging (ELK / OpenSearch / Fluentd / Loki)
  • High Availability, failover, dan disaster recovery di lingkungan on-premise
  • Networking & Security
  • Networking fundamentals:
  • DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, SSL/TLS
  • Load balancer (HAProxy, Nginx, L4/L7 concepts)
  • VLAN, routing dasar, firewall rules
  • Security hardening Linux, secrets management, dan access control
  • Scripting & Tools
  • Scripting: Bash, Python, atau Go
  • Web servers dan reverse proxies (Nginx, Apache)
  • Database fundamentals (PostgreSQL, MySQL; HA setup (menjadi nilai tambah)

 

Poin plus nilai tambah :

  • Pengalaman mengelola hybrid cloud (on-premise + cloud)
  • Pengalaman dengan PostgreSQL/MySQL HA, message broker, atau distributed systems
  • Familiar dengan Service Mesh (Istio, Linkerd) di Kubernetes on-premise
  • Pengetahuan DevSecOps dan hardening sistem (AppArmor, SELinux, CIS Benchmark)
  • Sertifikasi terkait (CKA/CKAD, RHCE, atau cloud certification)
  • Pengalaman berkontribusi pada open-source atau internal platform engineering
  • Bisa scripting Bash dan salah satu bahasa (Python / Go)
  • Pengalaman Helm & microservices
  • Familiar dengan konsep SRE
  • Pengalaman optimasi cost

 

Soft Skills :

  • Kemampuan problem-solving yang kuat dan sistematis
  • Komunikasi teknis yang jelas, terutama lintas tim
  • Mampu bekerja mandiri maupun dalam tim operasional 24/7
  • Proaktif, teliti, dan terbiasa bekerja dengan infrastruktur kritikal
  • Mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan dan menangani incident production

company_desc: Universitas Ciputra memiliki komitmen bahwa disetiap alur studi/konsentrasi yang ada memiliki tujuan sama yaitu membekali setiap mahasiswa agar mampu menjadi Entrepreneur sesuai keahlian masing-masing. Pendidikan dan Praktek Entrepreneurship diberikan secara merata disemua alur studi/konsentrasi mulai dari awal perkuliahan dimulai sampai akhir perkuliahan. Entrepreneurship memiliki arti yang lebih luas dari sekedar berjualan, membuka dan menjalankan bisnis karena didalamnya terdapat unsur kreatifitas & inovasi, kemampuan membaca kebutuhan pasar (market sensitivity) dan pengambilan resiko yang terhitung (calculated risk taking). Pada era masa kini, tantangan zaman semakin berat, kompetisi global terjadi, oleh karena itu Entrepreneur yang dihasilkan oleh institusi pendidikan tinggi haruslah Entrepreneur intelektual dengan keahlian sesuai bidang yang dipelajarinya. Tuntutan zaman ini yang mendorong kami untuk semakin meningkatkan dan mengembangkan kualitas dalam segala hal diantaranya adalah penambahan dan pengembangan beberapa program yang ditawarkan ke calon mahasiswa.

responsibilities:
About the Company

PN1 is a startup company focused on providing high-quality health supplements to support a healthy lifestyle. Although we are still in the early stages of our journey, we have a clear vision to grow and thrive in the health industry, building a reputation as a trusted company for our customers.


Key Responsibilities:

E-Commerce Campaign Management

  • Plan and execute major PN1 campaigns across e-commerce platforms (Tokopedia, Shopee, TikTok Shop, etc.), from ideation and budgeting to post-campaign evaluation.
  • Collaborate with Branding, Digital Marketing, and Operations teams to ensure consistent messaging and product availability throughout campaigns.
  • Analyze campaign performance (GMV, conversion rate, CTR, ROI, etc.) and develop optimization strategies for future initiatives.
  • Develop monthly and annual campaign calendars aligned with platform promotion schedules and key commercial moments (e.g., Harbolnas, Payday, Ramadan).
  • Coordinate with marketplace PICs to secure promotional slots, vouchers, and campaign support.

Live Commerce (Performance & Optimization)

  • Manage end-to-end Live Commerce activities for PN1, including scheduling, host coordination, scripting, and content strategy.
  • Monitor daily live performance (viewers, add-to-cart, conversion, revenue) and optimize GMV efficiency and cost per order.
  • Train hosts and collaborate with the Creative team to deliver engaging and persuasive live sessions.
  • Analyze live and affiliate data to define content strategies and drive continuous performance improvement.

Affiliate Management & Leadership

  • Lead and manage the Affiliate Specialist team while overseeing affiliate programs end-to-end.
  • Develop and optimize affiliate strategies to drive sales performance (GMV, conversion, ROI).
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with affiliators and identify new collaboration opportunities.
requirements:
Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Management, Communications, or Information Technology.
  • 3 years of experience in e-commerce and 1 year of experience as a team leader
  • Experience managing e-commerce platforms such as TikTok Shop, Shopee, Tokopedia, Lazada, and others.
  • Strong public speaking skills.
  • Ability to monitor and evaluate e-commerce campaign performance.
  • Skilled in planning and executing marketing campaigns that drive sales and conversions.
  • Capable of creating attractive promotions and discounts while understanding consumer behavior in the e-commerce context.
  • Creative in designing strategies to boost sales and attract new customers.
  • Understanding of the importance of user experience (UX) to enhance user interaction on e-commerce platforms.

company_desc:
Rekosistem is a climate-tech startup that provides waste management and recycling features to connect waste stakeholders and improve the productivity and efficiency in the waste supply chain. We improve how waste value chain works and standardize the informal operations. We believe through technology and innovation, there is always a way to realize circular economy towards a sustainable ecosystem.

Our Philosophy

Rekosistem is derived from combination of two words; 're-' and 'ecosystem' (in Bahasa: Ekosistem).

Re- stands for (1) reduce, (2) reuse, (3) recycle, (4) renewable, and (5) all sustainable related principles that will be implemented in our products.

-ecosystem means that our solutions will revamp the existing behaviour into more eco-friendly community and conform them with how the ideal and organic interaction should happen.

#TowardsASustainableEcosystem

#TowardsZero

#ZeroWaste

#ZeroEmission

responsibilities:
About Arysun

Arysun is a solar energy company with a bold mission: to help middle-income families save more for what truly matters by offering affordable solar solutions and smart solar-powered home appliances.


Our innovations empower households to reduce expenses, improve their quality of life, and embrace a more sustainable way of living.


We envision a future where every home is part of the fight against climate change. By reducing carbon emissions and making renewable energy practical, Arysun is lighting the way toward a brighter, greener Indonesia.


Join us and be part of the change we’re powering.


Job Summary

We are seeking a strategic and performance-driven Sales Consultant to accelerate the adoption of solar energy solutions across residential and MSME (Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprise) segments. This role goes beyond frontline selling — it requires an entrepreneurial mindset to develop market insights, manage key relationships, and drive revenue growth through consultative sales approaches.

The ideal candidate thrives on building long-term customer value, spotting untapped market opportunities, and collaborating cross-functionally to scale Arysun’s renewable energy footprint in Indonesia.


Responsibilities

  • Acquire and convert new customers through consultative, solution-based selling.
  • Manage the full sales cycle from lead generation to negotiation and deal closure.
  • Build and maintain strong, trust-based relationships with customers and partners.
  • Analyze sales performance, track conversion data, and prepare regular sales reports for management.
  • Identify new business opportunities and provide market feedback on customer needs and competitors.
  • Collaborate with marketing and operations to improve lead quality, sales materials, and delivery outcomes.
  • Maintain accurate customer and pipeline data in CRM systems.
requirements:
Requirements

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Business, Marketing, Engineering, or related field preferred.
  • Minimum 3–5 years of sales experience in B2B/B2C environments — ideally within renewable energy, FMCG, construction, or technology sectors.
  • Strong business acumen, analytical thinking, and ability to design and execute sales strategies.
  • Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills (online and offline).
  • Self-driven, target-oriented, and comfortable working in a fast-paced startup environment.
  • Ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams and work independently in the field.
  • Familiarity with CRM tools and digital sales platforms is an advantage.

We envision a future where every home is part of the fight against climate change. By reducing carbon emissions and making renewable energy practical, Arysun is lighting the way toward a brighter, greener Indonesia. Join us and be part of the change we’re powering.

  • Direct models during photo shoots to effectively communicate the desired concept and capture compelling images.
  • Edit and retouch images to perfection, ensuring a polished final product that meets client expectations.
  • Prepare all necessary resources for photo shoots, including props, gear, talent, and studio spaces.
  • Proactively contribute ideas and suggestions for content improvement to the production team.
  • Plan and present photography workshops and training materials for the Content, Marketing, and Merchandise teams to enhance visual content production skills.
requirements:
About the Role:

We are seeking a talented and passionate photographer to join our team. As a photographer at Howel and Co you will play a crucial part in planning and executing photo shoots, styling products, directing models, and editing images to create compelling visual content that resonates with our brand target audience.


What we are looking:

  • Bachelor’s degree in DKV, multimedia, photography, or proven experience as a Freelance Product & Product Photographer.
  • Strong professional portfolio showcasing a variety of current photo work, including corporate, studio, website, and social media content.
  • Solid knowledge of photography and editing software, particularly Adobe Photoshop and Lightroom.
  • Experience with both outdoor and studio photography, with proficiency in intermediate lighting setups.
  • Familiarity with Sony cameras is preferred.
  • Minimum 1-2 years of experience as a professional photographer.
  • Ability to juggle multiple tasks and work in a fast-paced environment, while maintaining high standards of quality and creativity.
  • Creative and artistic skills, with the ability to conceptualize and execute visually compelling ideas.

Founded in 2015, Howel and Co has redefined the art of gifting in Indonesia. As a celebrated TOP BRAND, we specialize in creating premium, bespoke gifts that capture the essence of every occasion. We collaborate with renowned figures and leading corporations to bring your gifting visions to life. At Howel and Co, we believe in turning ordinary moments into extraordinary memories—join the #HowelPeople and discover the power of a perfect gift.

company_desc:
Hi, we are Edufarmers (previously Japfa Foundation) embarking on a journey from 2015, where our commitment to the agricultural sector began, to the present day, Edufarmers has evolved its mission.


In 2021, recognizing the intertwined threads of agriculture and nutrition, we took a significant step forward by initiating a program aimed at aiding the government in reducing stunting rates.


This dual-pronged approach reflects our unwavering dedication to addressing the multifaceted challenges faced by Indonesian farmers and fostering holistic development of children welfare by supporting the government in stunting prevention programs.

responsibilities:
What You Will Do:


  • Collaborate with business stakeholders to identify critical business questions and translate them into actionable insights using a range of machine learning techniques
  • Build and deploy efficient, robust, and scalable machine learning models with a focus on reliable architecture and production-ready solutions
  • Craft compelling narratives, analyses, and presentations to effectively communicate complex data insights to diverse audiences, including technical and non-technical stakeholders
  • Champion data quality and integrity across all stages of the data lifecycle, leading data collection, cleaning, and preparation efforts
  • Collaborate with clients to understand their needs, manage timelines, and ensure smooth project execution
  • Mentor and empower junior data scientists and trainees, fostering a culture of continuous learning and development
  • Stay abreast of emerging technologies and trends within the data science landscape, including new model building methods, AI, computer vision, and the Internet of Things
requirements:
Person We Are Looking for:


  • Minimum 1-2 years of progressively responsible experience as a Data Scientist, demonstrating a strong track record of delivering impactful results
  • Minimum Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Physics, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field
  • Deep understanding of statistical concepts and proficiency in using SQL, Python, Javascript, and other relevant data science tools and libraries (e.g., scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch). Proven experience in developing and implementing generative AI projects is essential
  • Demonstrated experience managing AI models in production, on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP, is essential
  • Able to effectively communicate data insights and build compelling data stories using BI visualization tools (Tableau, Looker, Power BI)
  • Highly effective communicator with strong written and verbal skills, capable of conveying information clearly and persuasively
  • The ability to think critically, structure analyses, and formulate well-reasoned conclusions is highly valued
  • High degree of self-motivation, strong work ethic, and commitment to delivering high-quality results while taking ownership of assigned tasks
  • Unwavering passion for data, a continuous learner, and a desire to stay at the forefront of the data science landscape
  • Full WFO at Wisma 46 Jakarta Pusat
company_desc:
In the fast-paced world of technology, disruption is the norm. That's why EDTS was created - to democratize digital technology and make it accessible to everyone. And since 2019, we've been the Digital Center of Excellence for Salim Group.


Our team of digital experts is here to help companies navigate the ever-changing landscape of technology and harness its power to transform their business. Our vision is simple - to improve the welfare of the country by helping organizations achieve their full potential.


At EDTS, we're on a mission to help our clients seize new opportunities and prepare for the future by leveraging digital technology and data science. Our values of Integrity, Respect, Positive Impact, Growth, and Operational Excellence guide us in everything we do.


Join us on this journey of digital transformation, where we help companies stay ahead of the curve and achieve their goals in this rapidly changing world.

company_desc:
Dexa Group has evolved from a small company established in 1969 to one of Indonesia’s largest ethical pharmaceutical companies at the beginning of the 21st century and has become a prominent, well-respected player in the domestic pharmaceutical market.

Providing better health care by applying expertise was the foundation on which its founders built this Company. Honesty, trust, dedication and commitment to providing patients with the highest quality of ethical pharmaceutical products and OTC are preserved as the guiding principles, based upon which the highly professional management team and the motivated, competent staff of Dexa Group have developed the Company in the spirit of mutual respect, teamwork and innovation over more than four decades.

Serving as a good corporate citizen is one of our responsibilities and being a strategic asset of Indonesia is one of our foremost desires. For along time Dexa Group has worked together with governing institutions and the Indonesian Pharmaceutical Association – championing compliance and improving the industry standards.

Ir. Ferry A. Soetikno, M.Sc., M.B.A.

company_desc:
Gree Electric Appliances Indonesia adalah perusahaan pembuat pendingin udara internasional yang memadukan riset dan pengembangan, pemasaran, serta layanan terpadu. Gree Indonesia masuk ke Indonesia pada bulan Juli, 2015 dan berkantor pusat di Jakarta.

Gree Indonesia memiliki 12 cabang yang tersebar di Pulau Jawa, Bali, Sumatera dengan kantor cabang di Jakarta, Bekasi, Bandung, Semarang, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, Bali, Lampung, Pekanbaru, Medan dan terus berkembang di beberapa kota besar di Indonesia.

Gree merupakan merek industri pendingin udara asal China yang dinobatkan menjadi "World Brand" (merek dunia) dan satu-satunya perusahaan pendingin udara yang masuk ke dalam "China Top 100 Listed Company" oleh majalah Fortune selama 12 tahun berturut-turut.

Pada Mei 2020, Gree Electric Appliances masuk dalam daftar Forbes yang menempati urutan ke-246 dalam daftar 2.000 perusahaan terbesar dunia dan merupakan produsen AC terbesar di dunia.

Memiliki total 14 pabrik yang tersebar di China, Brazil dan Pakistan, Gree telah mendapatkan kepercayaan konsumen atas kualitas produknya dengan tetap menjadi pilihan 400 juta pengguna global di 160 negara.

Berbagai kategori produk yang dimiliki oleh Gree antara lain RAC (Residential Air Conditioner), LCAC (Light Commercial Air Conditioner), CAC (Commercial Air Conditioner), HA (Home Appliances). Produk Gree sendiri juga telah digunakan dalam event internasional seperti FIFA World Cup, Russia Olympic Games hingga China Olympic Games.

Sejak masuk ke Indonesia, produk berkualitas Gree telah berhasil meraih berbagai penghargaan dalam negeri. Adapun penghargaan yang didapatkan, antara lain, The Best Air Conditioning of the Year, Peraih Penghargaan Pertama di Indonesia, Peraih Penghargaan Pusat Rekor Indonesia, Top Innovation Choice Award 2020, Digital Popular Brand Award 2020, Indonesia Brand Champions 2020, Indonesia Best Quality Product, Brand Choice 2021 dan Rekor Muri Garansi Purnajual Terlama.

Garansi peraih "REBI Award" Platinum Warranty Gree, juga diyakini sebagai garansi purna jual terlama di industri pendingin udara di Indonesia, yaitu garansi satu tahun ganti unit baru, garansi 5 tahun servis dan suku cadang, ditambah 10 tahun untuk unit outdoor atau kompresor.

Selama berdiri di Indonesia, Gree telah meyakinkan pengguna di pasar Indonesia dengan memenangkan proyek-proyek besar di Indonesia, seperti Pabrik Chevron Pekanbaru, Grand Mercure & Hotel Ibis Yogyakarta, Menara Satoria di Surabaya, Landmark Pluit dan Sudirman Suites di Jakarta hingga banyaknya dealer yang tersebar di seluruh pulau Jawa, Bali dan Sumatera.

responsibilities:
• Melakukan penjualan langsung (canvassing) ke toko, proyek, kontraktor, atau konsumen potensial.
  • Mencari dan membangun relasi baru dengan pelanggan, serta menjaga hubungan baik dengan pelanggan lama.
  • Memahami kebutuhan pelanggan dan menawarkan produk yang sesuai (misalnya besi, baja, hollow, atap, dsb.).
  • Melakukan follow-up penawaran harga dan memastikan transaksi penjualan tercapai.
  • Mencapai target penjualan bulanan yang ditetapkan perusahaan.
  • Melaporkan aktivitas penjualan harian/mingguan kepada atasan (kunjungan, prospek, hasil negosiasi).
  • Mengumpulkan data pasar dan kompetitor, termasuk harga, produk, dan tren permintaan.
  • Menangani komplain pelanggan dengan cepat dan koordinasi ke bagian terkait (admin, gudang, pengiriman).
  • Berkoordinasi dengan tim internal (admin sales, logistik, keuangan) agar pesanan dan pengiriman berjalan lancar.
  • Menjaga citra perusahaan saat berinteraksi dengan pelanggan di lapangan
requirements:
• Pendidikan minimal SMA/SMK (lebih disukai D3/S1 semua jurusan).
  • Pengalaman minimal 1 tahun sebagai sales lapangan, terutama di bidang bahan bangunan / besi baja / konstruksi.
  • Memiliki kendaraan pribadi (motor) dan SIM C aktif.
  • Komunikatif, persuasif, dan berorientasi pada target.
  • Mampu bekerja mandiri maupun dalam tim.
  • Mengetahui area pemasaran lokal dan terbiasa bekerja di lapangan.
  • Jujur, disiplin, dan tangguh menghadapi penolakan pelanggan.

responsibilities:
• Design and develop new electrical and electronic components and systems for our air conditioning and home appliance products
  • Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to understand product requirements and translate them into effective design solutions
  • Conduct technical analyses, simulations, and testing to validate design performance and ensure compliance with quality and safety standards
  • Document and communicate design specifications, technical reports, and project updates to stakeholders
  • Stay up-to-date with the latest industry trends, technologies, and best practices to drive continuous product improvement
  • Provide support and guidance to junior team members, contributing to their professional development
requirements:
• Bachelor's degree in Electrical/Electronic Engineering or a related technical field
  • Fresh Graduate are welcome to apply
  • Strong proficiency in Mandarin and English, both written and verbal, with the ability to effectively communicate technical information to stakeholders
  • Proficient in CAD software, simulation tools, and product design methodologies
  • Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and critical thinking skills
  • Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment and adapt to changing priorities
  • Passion for innovation and a commitment to delivering high-quality, customer-centric products

Memiliki total 14 pabrik yang tersebar di China, Brazil dan Pakistan, Gree telah mendapatkan kepercayaan konsumen atas kualitas produknya dengan tetap menjadi pilihan 400 juta pengguna global di 160 negara.

Berbagai kategori produk yang dimiliki oleh Gree antara lain RAC (Residential Air Conditioner), LCAC (Light Commercial Air Conditioner), CAC (Commercial Air Conditioner), HA (Home Appliances). Produk Gree sendiri juga telah digunakan dalam event internasional seperti FIFA World Cup, Russia Olympic Games hingga China Olympic Games.

Sejak masuk ke Indonesia, produk berkualitas Gree telah berhasil meraih berbagai penghargaan dalam negeri. Adapun penghargaan yang didapatkan, antara lain, The Best Air Conditioning of the Year, Peraih Penghargaan Pertama di Indonesia, Peraih Penghargaan Pusat Rekor Indonesia, Top Innovation Choice Award 2020, Digital Popular Brand Award 2020, Indonesia Brand Champions 2020, Indonesia Best Quality Product, Brand Choice 2021 dan Rekor Muri Garansi Purnajual Terlama.

Garansi peraih "REBI Award" Platinum Warranty Gree, juga diyakini sebagai garansi purna jual terlama di industri pendingin udara di Indonesia, yaitu garansi satu tahun ganti unit baru, garansi 5 tahun servis dan suku cadang, ditambah 10 tahun untuk unit outdoor atau kompresor.

Selama berdiri di Indonesia, Gree telah meyakinkan pengguna di pasar Indonesia dengan memenangkan proyek-proyek besar di Indonesia, seperti Pabrik Chevron Pekanbaru, Grand Mercure & Hotel Ibis Yogyakarta, Menara Satoria di Surabaya, Landmark Pluit dan Sudirman Suites di Jakarta hingga banyaknya dealer yang tersebar di seluruh pulau Jawa, Bali dan Sumatera.

company_desc:
Founded in the 1960s in Northern Italy, MODENA is a global technology group of companies. Since 1981, MODENA has strategically shifted its operations to Asia. Its playing fields cover Home, Professional, Technology, Energy, and Mobility, which are supported by an innovative design studio in Italy and R&D centers across the world. MODENA products are manufactured and distributed, under international certifications and management systems, ensuring seamless integration into global markets.  


Today, MODENA’s vision is to become a driving force towards an interconnected world. MODENA’s product lines are continuously upgraded with a mission to elevate the everyday human experience. Highly engineered with modern designs and cutting-edge technology such as Internet of Things (IoT), MODENA is committed to bringing the smartest, most interconnected innovations to modern consumers for a better world, better future.


At MODENA, our diverse and talented team is at the heart of our growth. They bring creativity and expertise to everything we do. 


To discover more, please visit our website at www.modena.com.

responsibilities:
• Teach Mandarin across levels: beginner (HSK 1–2), intermediate (HSK 3–4).
  • Build listening and speaking skills by practicing pronunciation and tones (pinyin drills, tongue twisters, tone pairs).
  • Adapt teaching methods to suit different student levels, ages, and learning styles.
  • Assign and review homework, projects, and assessments to track student progress.
  • Introduce and reinforce character recognition and writing, progressing from simple radicals to complex characters.
  • Guide students in grammar structures and sentence formation with practical examples.
  • Design engaging speaking exercises: role plays, dialogues, storytelling, and real-life scenarios.
  • Incorporate lessons on Chinese culture, idioms, proverbs, and business etiquette.
  • Prepare and administer vocabulary quizzes, listening tests, and oral proficiency evaluations.
  • Conduct HSK-focused preparation: vocabulary building, past-paper drills, timed practices, and exam-taking strategies.
  • Differentiate instruction to meet the needs of children, teens, and adult professionals.
  • Provide feedback to students and, where applicable, to parents on progress and improvement plans.
  • Collaborate with other tutors to improve learning resources and teaching methods.
requirements:
• Bachelor’s degree in Mandarin Language, Chinese Literature, Education, or related fields.
  • Proven teaching experience (minimum 1 year) in Mandarin instruction, with the ability to deliver engaging and effective lessons.
  • Strong proficiency in Mandarin with excellent grammar, pronunciation, and communication skills.
  • Familiarity with communicative and interactive teaching methodologies.
  • Ability to manage classroom dynamics and maintain student engagement.
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills, both verbal and written.
  • Creativity in developing learning materials and activities.
  • Punctual, disciplined, and able to manage time effectively

company_desc:
Enseval as Indonesia's largest Healthcare Product Distribution Company has been reached all areas in Indonesia through its 48 branches. Furthermore, Enseval also expanded its contribution of Indonesia’s better health service through selling raw materials for pharmaceuticals and cosmetics purpose, as well as medical and health diagnostic tools.


Enseval has the vision to be a leading and integrated distribution and logistics company through service excellence, competent people and advanced technology. This vision is followed by the company’s mission to contribute in improving the quality of health and delivering the best health care products for Indonesia.


Through the passion and commitment for providing better quality of health for Indonesia’s families, Enseval has been grown to have 46 branches all over big cities in Indonesia and five subsidiaries that run business in various areas:


PT Tri Sapta Jaya – operates in distribution sector for pharmaceutical and health care products. The company focus is more to expand its delivery line in lower market segments and more remote areas.


PT Millenia Dharma Insani – providing health services through building clinics namely Mitra Sana. The main idea of this company is to offer affordable and integrated health facilities, consisting clinics, pharmacies, and mini markets.


PT Enseval Medika Prima – focus more in marketing and trading sectors, particularly trading and marketing of health devices.


PT Global Cemindo Megatrading – is a company that concentrates in selling raw materials, as due to rapid growth in such business sectors.


PT Renalmed Tiara Utama – the company mission is to acquire the business from third parties to supply materials and hemodialysis machines for kidney failure patients to multiple hospitals and clinics.


With its contribution in enhancing quality of life in Indonesia for more than 42 years, Enseval touches so many people lives in so many different ways

company_desc:
Dexa Group has evolved from a small company established in 1969 to one of Indonesia’s largest ethical pharmaceutical companies at the beginning of the 21st century and has become a prominent, well-respected player in the domestic pharmaceutical market.

Providing better health care by applying expertise was the foundation on which its founders built this Company. Honesty, trust, dedication and commitment to providing patients with the highest quality of ethical pharmaceutical products and OTC are preserved as the guiding principles, based upon which the highly professional management team and the motivated, competent staff of Dexa Group have developed the Company in the spirit of mutual respect, teamwork and innovation over more than four decades.

Serving as a good corporate citizen is one of our responsibilities and being a strategic asset of Indonesia is one of our foremost desires. For along time Dexa Group has worked together with governing institutions and the Indonesian Pharmaceutical Association – championing compliance and improving the industry standards.

Ir. Ferry A. Soetikno, M.Sc., M.B.A.

(President Director)

responsibilities:
About the Role

You’ll own the growth engine across Dealls (ATS) and KantorKu (HRIS) — driving revenue through better funnels, pricing, and go-to-market execution. As Revenue & Growth Manager, you’ll identify where we lose money in the funnel and fix it — from lead → demo → close → retention.


This role sits at the intersection of Sales, Product, and Marketing. You won’t just analyze — you’ll implement changes that directly increase revenue.


What You’ll Do

Funnel Optimization

  • Analyze the full B2B funnel: lead → qualified → demo → proposal → close → retention.
  • Identify drop-offs and design experiments to improve conversion at each stage.
  • Work with SDR, Sales, and Product to fix bottlenecks quickly.


Revenue Strategy

  • Design and test pricing, packaging, and upsell strategies.
  • Identify new revenue opportunities (new segments, bundles, partnerships).
  • Improve ARPU and customer lifetime value.


Growth Experiments

  • Run structured experiments across acquisition, activation, and retention.
  • Test messaging, offers, onboarding flows, and sales scripts.
  • Work with marketing on campaigns that generate high-quality leads.


Cross-Functional Execution

  • Partner with Sales to improve pipeline quality and closing rates.
  • Work with Product to improve activation, onboarding, and feature adoption.
  • Collaborate with BI to track performance and define growth metrics.


Measurement & Ownership

  • Own key metrics: conversion rate, CAC, LTV, ARPU, revenue growth.
  • Build dashboards and track weekly performance.
  • Deliver clear recommendations and execute improvements.
requirements:
What We’re Looking For

  • 3–6 years experience in growth, revenue, strategy, or operations roles.
  • Strong understanding of B2B SaaS funnels and sales processes.
  • Analytical and structured; comfortable working with data and experiments.
  • Able to move from insight → execution quickly.
  • Strong communication and cross-team coordination skills.
  • High ownership mindset; focused on results, not activity.


Bonus Points

  • Experience in HRIS, ATS, or B2B SaaS.
  • Familiarity with SQL, BI tools, or growth analytics.
  • Background in consulting, startups, or growth teams.


Why Join

You’ll work on the most important lever in the company: revenue growth. High visibility, direct impact, and full ownership — your decisions will immediately affect how fast we scale.
company_desc:
Dealls is Indonesia's largest job portal & mentoring platform. We help people easily find jobs to top Indonesian companies for internship and full-time roles.


As you might have already heard about us, we are revolutionizing how Indonesian engage with employers. Many Indonesian students are talented, ambitious, but never found a better opportunity for themselves. Our team is driven by the vision to democratize information and knowledge, thus opportunities. We think what we build will allow Indonesian students to have a chance to self develop and have a better future.

Our founder is a Harvard graduate, and has gathered a strong team with burning passion to help Indonesian discover opportunities they deserve! 🚀 In 1 year, we amassed 2mio+ users, got funded by YCombinator, and awarded the Best App of 2021 by GooglePlay, beating 3 unicorns and tens of others.

We are looking for passionate and committed individuals who look forward to working in a fast-paced entrepreneurial environment. Join us to have the opportunity to make decisions to drive a huge difference and impact for Indonesia youths! Here in Dealls, you’ll work closely with our board members. We are preferably looking for applicants who are proficient in both Bahasa and English.

company_desc:
Gree Electric Appliances Indonesia adalah perusahaan pembuat pendingin udara internasional yang memadukan riset dan pengembangan, pemasaran, serta layanan terpadu. Gree Indonesia masuk ke Indonesia pada bulan Juli, 2015 dan berkantor pusat di Jakarta.

Gree Indonesia memiliki 12 cabang yang tersebar di Pulau Jawa, Bali, Sumatera dengan kantor cabang di Jakarta, Bekasi, Bandung, Semarang, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, Bali, Lampung, Pekanbaru, Medan dan terus berkembang di beberapa kota besar di Indonesia.

Gree merupakan merek industri pendingin udara asal China yang dinobatkan menjadi "World Brand" (merek dunia) dan satu-satunya perusahaan pendingin udara yang masuk ke dalam "China Top 100 Listed Company" oleh majalah Fortune selama 12 tahun berturut-turut.

Pada Mei 2020, Gree Electric Appliances masuk dalam daftar Forbes yang menempati urutan ke-246 dalam daftar 2.000 perusahaan terbesar dunia dan merupakan produsen AC terbesar di dunia.

Memiliki total 14 pabrik yang tersebar di China, Brazil dan Pakistan, Gree telah mendapatkan kepercayaan konsumen atas kualitas produknya dengan tetap menjadi pilihan 400 juta pengguna global di 160 negara.

Berbagai kategori produk yang dimiliki oleh Gree antara lain RAC (Residential Air Conditioner), LCAC (Light Commercial Air Conditioner), CAC (Commercial Air Conditioner), HA (Home Appliances). Produk Gree sendiri juga telah digunakan dalam event internasional seperti FIFA World Cup, Russia Olympic Games hingga China Olympic Games.

Sejak masuk ke Indonesia, produk berkualitas Gree telah berhasil meraih berbagai penghargaan dalam negeri. Adapun penghargaan yang didapatkan, antara lain, The Best Air Conditioning of the Year, Peraih Penghargaan Pertama di Indonesia, Peraih Penghargaan Pusat Rekor Indonesia, Top Innovation Choice Award 2020, Digital Popular Brand Award 2020, Indonesia Brand Champions 2020, Indonesia Best Quality Product, Brand Choice 2021 dan Rekor Muri Garansi Purnajual Terlama.

Garansi peraih "REBI Award" Platinum Warranty Gree, juga diyakini sebagai garansi purna jual terlama di industri pendingin udara di Indonesia, yaitu garansi satu tahun ganti unit baru, garansi 5 tahun servis dan suku cadang, ditambah 10 tahun untuk unit outdoor atau kompresor.

Selama berdiri di Indonesia, Gree telah meyakinkan pengguna di pasar Indonesia dengan memenangkan proyek-proyek besar di Indonesia, seperti Pabrik Chevron Pekanbaru, Grand Mercure & Hotel Ibis Yogyakarta, Menara Satoria di Surabaya, Landmark Pluit dan Sudirman Suites di Jakarta hingga banyaknya dealer yang tersebar di seluruh pulau Jawa, Bali dan Sumatera.

responsibilities:
Everything is here for you!


Working at Erha Clinic, the leader of beauty brands in Indonesia, is a rare opportunity, and the perks that are available to you here are hard to find elsewhere.


We have built what we consider, through intensive research and development, the perfect place for change, innovation, and endless possibilities. A place where you will become part of our journey and vision to create a brighter future and bring fresh inspiration in the world of skin health.


This is your chance to experience #ExcitingJourney by joining us if you have the passion with these following criteria:


Do you embrace your love and passion for the following activities?

  • Collecting and analyzing data from existing customers and clinics to plan marketing strategies, define customer criteria, and achieve desired customer/revenue growth.
  • Discussing with clinic leaders about desires, targets, and customer criteria to address gaps in the field.
  • Analyzing customer needs and formulating competitive and engaging taglines to enhance public awareness.
  • Developing marketing activity concepts and identifying target markets according to management guidance and market analysis results, ensuring alignment with management objectives.
  • Maintaining good relationships with various parties, both internal and external, to ensure smooth business operations.
  • Creating a timeline for marketing activity plans within a specified period, along with necessary materials (posters, videos, banners, etc.) for communication with the creative team.
  • Ensuring that the marketing budget aligns with the company’s budget.
  • Monitoring and evaluating the implementation of the marketing strategy plan and its reports to enhance the effectiveness of marketing activities.
requirements:
Does it match your criteria?

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing Communication, Business Management, or a related field.
  • Minimum of 3-4 years of experience in the marketing field.
  • Relevant knowledge in the dermatologist industry.
  • Skills in Digital Marketing, Marketing Activation, and Market Research.


Now we'd love to see your talents and start your #ExcitingJourney by submit your profiles (CV).

This success is driven by our innovative and dedicated employees, the Aryaners, who continuously disrupt societal standards by making beauty accessible and affordable.

Our team, fondly known as Aryaners, work daily to create impactful solutions for skin-related issues, enhancing lifestyles and improving standards of living. With a commitment to vision and growth, they adapt to changing times, delivering value through modern and technologically advanced services. Arya Noble aims to be a hub of change, innovation, and endless possibilities, shaping a brighter future through our products, services, and people. Join the Aryaners and be part of this transformative journey.

company_desc:
Enseval as Indonesia's largest Healthcare Product Distribution Company has been reached all areas in Indonesia through its 48 branches. Furthermore, Enseval also expanded its contribution of Indonesia’s better health service through selling raw materials for pharmaceuticals and cosmetics purpose, as well as medical and health diagnostic tools.


Enseval has the vision to be a leading and integrated distribution and logistics company through service excellence, competent people and advanced technology. This vision is followed by the company’s mission to contribute in improving the quality of health and delivering the best health care products for Indonesia.


Through the passion and commitment for providing better quality of health for Indonesia’s families, Enseval has been grown to have 46 branches all over big cities in Indonesia and five subsidiaries that run business in various areas:


PT Tri Sapta Jaya – operates in distribution sector for pharmaceutical and health care products. The company focus is more to expand its delivery line in lower market segments and more remote areas.


PT Millenia Dharma Insani – providing health services through building clinics namely Mitra Sana. The main idea of this company is to offer affordable and integrated health facilities, consisting clinics, pharmacies, and mini markets.


PT Enseval Medika Prima – focus more in marketing and trading sectors, particularly trading and marketing of health devices.


PT Global Cemindo Megatrading – is a company that concentrates in selling raw materials, as due to rapid growth in such business sectors.


PT Renalmed Tiara Utama – the company mission is to acquire the business from third parties to supply materials and hemodialysis machines for kidney failure patients to multiple hospitals and clinics.


With its contribution in enhancing quality of life in Indonesia for more than 42 years, Enseval touches so many people lives in so many different ways

company_desc:
Didirikan pada tahun 1983 sebagai bagian dari POLAGROUP, PT Beton Perkasa Wijaksana (BPW) merupakan pelopor perusahaan spesialis formwork, scaffolding, dan rekayasa teknik di Indonesia. Berawal dari bisnis ready mix concrete, BPW berkembang menjadi perusahaan konstruksi terintegrasi yang melayani proyek gedung, infrastruktur, dan industri di tingkat nasional maupun internasional.

Dengan jaringan 12 kantor pemasaran di seluruh Indonesia serta fasilitas manufaktur modern di Cikupa, Tangerang, BPW menyediakan solusi menyeluruh mulai dari rekayasa desain, gambar konstruksi, kalkulasi struktur, hingga pengawasan proyek di lapangan. Selama lebih dari empat dekade, BPW telah berkontribusi pada lebih dari 3.000 proyek skala menengah dan besar di Indonesia dan Asia Pasifik.

Beberapa proyek terkenal yang melibatkan solusi BPW antara lain flyover Cawang–Tanjung Priok, Jakarta Outer Ring Road, Kelok Sembilan, Metro Manila Skyway di Filipina, Harbour Road, SMX Data Center, Jakarta Technopark, Toll Kediri–Tulungagung, serta Admin Building PLTU Jawa 9 & 10.

Kapabilitas BPW mencakup sistem formwork dan scaffolding, fabrikasi baja, serta layanan surface treatment seperti galvanizing dan powder coating. Seluruh operasional didukung standar mutu internasional termasuk sertifikasi ISO 9001:2015 dan standar pengelasan global, serta komitmen terhadap pengembangan manufaktur lokal sejak 1985.

Sebagai pemimpin pasar di industrinya, BPW dikenal sebagai produsen dan mitra konstruksi terpercaya yang menghadirkan solusi berkualitas tinggi, efisien, dan berstandar global untuk mendukung pembangunan infrastruktur masa kini dan masa depan.

responsibilities:
Tentang Posisi


PT Eight Wonders Property Group adalah salah satu perusahaan pengelola properti residensial terkemuka yang berbasis di Bali. Kami sedang mencari Engineering yang hands-on dengan pengalaman Teknik y ang kuat untuk menangani operasional melingkupi preventive, maintenance dan serive di beberapa property di Badung Bali.


Posisi ini bersifat operasional, anda akan bertanggung jawab langsung memastikan seluruh system berjalan dengan baik serta mencegah kerusakan yang dapat menggangu kenyamanan tamu.


 Tanggung Jawab Utama


1. Melakukan inspeksi rutin dan preventive maintenance pada seluruh sistem villa

2. Menangani perbaikan teknis secara mandiri, termasuk:


  • AC
  • Pompa Air & Sistem Plumbing
  • Mesin Kolam Renang ( Pompa, filter, sirkulasi )
  • Mesin Cuci Baju
  • Masalah Listrik ( MCB Turun , korsleting, dll)


3. Mengidentifikasi akar masalah (root cause) dari kerusakan berulang dan memberikan solusi jangka panjang


4. Menangani situasi darurat (misalnya AC rusak, air mati, listrik mati saat tamu menginap)


5. Mengelola dan memprioritaskan pekerjaan di beberapa properti sekaligus


6. Memastikan hasil kerja memenuhi standar keamanan dan kualitas


7. Berkoordinasi dengan vendor jika diperlukan serta memonitor hasil pekerjaan


8. Membuat laporan sederhana terkait aktivitas maintenance
requirements:
Kualifikasi


1. Minimal 5 tahun pengalaman kerja teknis (engineering/maintenance)


2. Memiliki pengetahuan teknis yang kuat dalam:

  • Sistem AC
  • Pompa Air & Sistem Plumbing
  • Mesin Kolam Renang ( Pompa, filter, sirkulasi
  • Mesin Cuci Baju
  • Masalah Listrik ( MCB Turun , korsleting, dll)


3. Berpengalaman dalam preventive maintenance ( Memiliki atau memahami sistem monitoring / checklist harian )


4. Mampu melakukan analisa masalah hingga ke akar penyebab (bukan perbaikan sementara)


5. Bersedia untuk on-call dalam kondisi darurat

6. Mampu menangani beberapa properti dengan tanggung jawab dan konsistensi tinggi

7. Berdomisili di Bali atau bersedia pindah ke Bali

8. Dapat mengendarai Sepeda motor dan memiliki Sim C Aktif



Hal Penting yang Perlu Dipahami


1. Posisi ini adalah pekerjaan lapangan (hands-on), bukan manajerial

2. Performa kerja akan berdampak langsung pada kepuasan tamu dan ekspektasi owner

3. Kecepatan, ketepatan, dan tanggung jawab adalah faktor utama keberhasilan

4. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi dasar dalam Bahasa Inggris ( level conversational)

responsibilities:
We are looking for a Sports SEO Content Specialist to join our SEO team. In this role, you will be responsible for the end-to-end production and optimization of sports-related content across Vidio's platforms. You will work closely with the SEO team and other stakeholders to ensure our sports content is discoverable, engaging, and drives measurable traffic growth.


This role is ideal for someone who is passionate about sports, has a strong understanding of SEO best practices, and is comfortable working with both content creation and technical tools.


Key Responsibilities:


1. Content Production & Optimization: Write, edit, and publish high-quality sports articles optimized for search engines. This includes producing content for major sports events and leagues.


2. SEO Strategy Execution: Implement on-page SEO strategies, including keyword research, content structuring, and internal linking to improve organic search visibility for sports content.


3. AI & Automation: Utilize AI tools (e.g., Claude Sonnet) to scale content production efficiently while maintaining quality standards. Develop and manage automation workflows for content creation and publishing.


4. Content Management Systems (CMS): Manage and publish content across various CMS platforms, including WordPress (Elementor Pro) and Custom CMS.


5. Data & Tool Management: Use SEO and analytics tools (e.g., Ahrefs, Data for SEO, Google Analytics) to track performance, identify opportunities, and generate insights. Manage data uploads to internal systems like ViTA/OneBox.


6. Stakeholder Coordination: Act as a point of contact for the Sports and Finance teams regarding content schedules, administrative tasks, and reporting.


7. Process Documentation: Maintain clear documentation for workflows, tool access, and standard operating procedures to ensure knowledge continuity.
requirements:
1. Experience: 1-2 years of experience in SEO content writing, preferably within a media, sports, or digital publishing environment.


2. Sports Knowledge: Deep understanding and passion for various sports, particularly those relevant to the Indonesian market.


3. SEO Expertise: Solid understanding of on-page SEO, keyword research, and content optimization principles.


4. Technical Skills:

- Proficiency with CMS platforms (WordPress, Elementor).

- Experience with SEO tools (Ahrefs, Data for SEO, or similar).

- Familiarity with AI content generation tools and prompt engineering.

- Basic understanding of data management and automation tools (e.g., Google Sheets, Automa) is a plus.


5. Language: Excellent written and verbal communication skills in Bahasa Indonesia and English.


6. Mindset: Detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with multiple stakeholders.

company_desc:
OT is a consumer goods company that produces various kinds of daily necessities. Starting from a traditional health drink with high-quality standardized ingredients and processes. OT has grown more modern without leaving the positive and noble values ​​that were initiated by the company's founders.

Various products ranging from food and beverages, to personal care products, have long been part of the lives of Indonesian consumers. Some of them are Formula, Tango, Teh Gelas, MintZ, Blaster, Oops, and Kiranti.

In fact, because of their quality, OT products have been present in the international market and can be enjoyed by foreign consumers.

By staying focused on consumer needs and continuing to innovate, OT has launched superior products that have won various awards through survey institutions that are recognized nationally and internationally.

All of these achievements cannot be separated from the support of consumers, employees, and the values ​​that we believed in since the beginning. All the trust and hard work from various parties have shaped OT into a company that is highly committed to always trying to improve products and work processes to meet consumers' needs.

company_desc:
PT Ultra Sakti is a pharmaceutical manufacturing and marketing company.

The company was initially dedicated to manufacture pharmaceutical products in the form of standard and generic medicines. In responding the market needs, in 2010 the company moved into consumer goods based on market trends and created the brand ‘FreshCare’ aromatic oils with new fragrances that people are more comfortable to wear in public. In 2012, building upon the success of the FreshCare brand, the company was enlarged by adding PT Tresno Joyo, a company that specializes in traditional medicines.

Since moving to consumed goods sector, PT Ultra Sakti has manufactured and sold 3 Top Brand Product which won many awards: Freshcare, Madu TJ and HotinCream. Each year PT Ultra Sakti launches new innovative product. As sales grow up, PT Ultra Sakti now has 3 plant site (Pulo Gadung, Cikiwul, Cipendawa), and 2 dedicated warehouses (Pulo Gadung). PT Ultra Sakti plant site certified for Good Manufacturing Practice: CPOB (Cara Pembuatan Obat Yang Baik) , CPOTB (Cara Pembuatan Traditional Obat Yang Baik) from BPOM (Badan Pengawasasan Obat Dan Makanan/Indonesia National Agency Drug and Food Control).

PT Ultra Sakti is committed to produce high quality standard products as our contributions to improve the quality of life.

responsibilities:
• Develop embedded firmware program for STM32 / ARM Cortex-based devices using C/C++.
  • Implement and maintain industrial communication protocols such as Modbus RTU/TCP, RS485, UART, TCP/IP, and CAN.
  • Integrate field devices and sensor data with PLC, SCADA systems, MQTT broker, SQL database, and Node-RED.
  • Perform firmware debugging, device communication testing, and system performance optimization.
  • Support development of IoT, telemetry, datalogger, and industrial monitoring systems.
  • Develop supporting Android-based applications for monitoring and control when required.
  • Prepare technical documentation, testing reports, and system integration notes.
  • Collaborate with Automation, SCADA, and Engineering teams during development, commissioning, and field testing.
requirements:
• Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Informatics, Mechatronics, Computer Engineering, or related fields.
  • Minimum 3 years of experience in embedded systems, industrial automation, or system integration.
  • Strong knowledge of STM32, ARM Cortex microcontrollers, C/C++, HAL, and RTOS.
  • Experience with MQTT, SQL, Node-RED, and Android Studio.
  • Understanding of PLC and SCADA system integration.
  • Familiar with industrial communication protocols such as Modbus RTU/TCP, RS485, UART, TCP/IP, and CAN.
  • Experience in telemetry systems, dataloggers, IoT gateways, or remote monitoring systems is a plus.
  • Familiarity with Linux environment and shell commands is preferred.
  • Experience in commissioning, troubleshooting, and field testing is an advantage.
  • Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and ability to work independently or in a team.

PT Luwes Inovasi Mandiri adalah perusahaan teknologi asal Indonesia yang berkembang pesat dan berada di garis depan dalam bidang pemantauan cuaca, pemodelan banjir, otomasi irigasi, pemantauan geoteknik, serta solusi data lingkungan presisi.

Misi kami adalah menyediakan wawasan real-time berbasis teknologi IoT dan satelit terkini untuk mendukung berbagai sektor, seperti pertanian, pertambangan, pelabuhan, dan operasi lepas pantai.

company_desc:
Established in 2018, ESB is Indonesia’s leading restaurant technology company, empowering the food and beverage industry with innovative, integrated, and easy-to-use digital solutions.

Our comprehensive ecosystem enables businesses to seamlessly manage every aspect of their F&B operations—from front-of-house to back-of-house—so they can focus on what truly matters: delivering great experiences and growing their business.

Whether you operate a small food stall, a bustling café, a cloud kitchen, or a nationwide restaurant chain, ESB provides a unified platform that simplifies operations, enhances efficiency, and drives performance.

Today, ESB proudly partners with some of Indonesia’s most prominent and fast-growing brands, including Starbucks, The People's Cafe, Bakerzin, Kimukatsu, and countless viral restaurants, cafés, and coffee shops across the nation.

At ESB, we live by our core values of Honesty, Empathy, and Agility—building technology with integrity, understanding our customers’ challenges, and adapting swiftly to an ever-changing industry landscape.

Join a growing, fast-paced, and dynamic technology company that’s shaping the future of Indonesia’s F&B industry.

It’s time to grow, learn, and make an impact with us.

#GrowingWithESB

company_desc:
Dealls is Indonesia's largest job portal & mentoring platform. We help people easily find jobs to top Indonesian companies for internship and full-time roles.


As you might have already heard about us, we are revolutionizing how Indonesian engage with employers. Many Indonesian students are talented, ambitious, but never found a better opportunity for themselves. Our team is driven by the vision to democratize information and knowledge, thus opportunities. We think what we build will allow Indonesian students to have a chance to self develop and have a better future.

Our founder is a Harvard graduate, and has gathered a strong team with burning passion to help Indonesian discover opportunities they deserve! 🚀 In 1 year, we amassed 2mio+ users, got funded by YCombinator, and awarded the Best App of 2021 by GooglePlay, beating 3 unicorns and tens of others.

We are looking for passionate and committed individuals who look forward to working in a fast-paced entrepreneurial environment. Join us to have the opportunity to make decisions to drive a huge difference and impact for Indonesia youths! Here in Dealls, you’ll work closely with our board members. We are preferably looking for applicants who are proficient in both Bahasa and English.

responsibilities:
About Us

We’re building Indonesia’s leading ecosystem for careers, HR, and youth empowerment through three fast-growing platforms — Dealls, KantorKu, and SejutaCita — founded by Andhika Sudarman, Indonesia’s first Harvard Commencement Speaker and a 2023 Tatler Asia Gen.T honouree.


Dealls (backed by Y Combinator and Hummingbird Ventures) is Indonesia’s #1 job & mentoring platform, connecting millions of professionals with thousands of companies. KantorKu extends this mission by offering an all-in-one HRIS platform for payroll, attendance, and performance — designed for scale and trusted by growing enterprises nationwide. SejutaCita, the foundation of our ecosystem, is Indonesia’s largest youth empowerment platform and winner of Google Play’s Best App of 2021, reaching millions of students through leadership and global programs.


About the Role

You’ll build products that power how thousands of companies run and hire. As Product Manager, you’ll turn complex workflows into simple, powerful experiences — whether that’s managing payroll and performance on KantorKu HRIS, or helping employers find their next great hire through Dealls ATS.


You’ll sit at the intersection of tech, business, and users — shaping products that impact hundreds of thousands of employees and millions of job seekers across Indonesia.


What You’ll Do

  • Own the full product lifecycle from ideation to launch and iteration.
  • Define and prioritize product roadmaps based on data, user feedback, and business goals.
  • Collaborate closely with engineering, design, and operations to deliver features on time and at high quality.
  • Deeply understand HR and recruitment workflows — translate pain points into elegant, scalable solutions.
  • Set success metrics (adoption, engagement, retention) and drive product decisions through insight.
  • Balance short-term delivery with long-term product strategy and scalability.
requirements:
1. Prior direct product management experience
  2. Excellent communication, active listening, and organization skills
  3. Working knowledge of how highly scaled digital/mobile products come together.
  4. Strong quantitative, analytical, and problem-solving skills
  5. Constant attention to detail
company_desc:
Dealls is Indonesia's largest job portal & mentoring platform. We help people easily find jobs to top Indonesian companies for internship and full-time roles.


As you might have already heard about us, we are revolutionizing how Indonesian engage with employers. Many Indonesian students are talented, ambitious, but never found a better opportunity for themselves. Our team is driven by the vision to democratize information and knowledge, thus opportunities. We think what we build will allow Indonesian students to have a chance to self develop and have a better future.

Our founder is a Harvard graduate, and has gathered a strong team with burning passion to help Indonesian discover opportunities they deserve! 🚀 In 1 year, we amassed 2mio+ users, got funded by YCombinator, and awarded the Best App of 2021 by GooglePlay, beating 3 unicorns and tens of others.

We are looking for passionate and committed individuals who look forward to working in a fast-paced entrepreneurial environment. Join us to have the opportunity to make decisions to drive a huge difference and impact for Indonesia youths! Here in Dealls, you’ll work closely with our board members. We are preferably looking for applicants who are proficient in both Bahasa and English.

description:
🙌🏻 About Us

Building Indonesia's largest job & mentoring platform. If this excites you, Deall (YC W22) could be the right place for you! Within just one year since our launch, we:

  • amassed 2+ mio users coming from all over Indonesia
  • won Best App of 2021 by GooglePlay (beat 3 unicorns in the nomination: canva, clubhouse, shipper, and tens of others)
  • accepted into and funded by Y Combinator (top accelerator in the world with alumni Airbnb, Coinbase, Stripe, Dropbox, Reddit, Twitch, Mixpanel, Ajaib, Xendit)


The keys? Our team is really driven by our common goals and we're all inspired by each other! Join us for a fun & collaborative team 😁👍🏻


💰 Salary

Very competitive


🧠 The big WHY

Our team is driven by the vision to democratize opportunities. We think what we build will allow Indonesian to have a better future 🇮🇩


🔮 Our aim

We are well-funded and aiming to build reach 3 million users by this year end to further solidify our stand as (already) the first and largest platform for job & mentoring.
responsibilities:
About the Role

You’ll support building products that power how thousands of companies run and hire. As Product Manager Intern, you’ll turn complex workflows into simple, powerful experiences — whether that’s managing payroll and performance on KantorKu HRIS, or helping employers find their next great hire through Dealls ATS.


You’ll sit at the intersection of tech, business, and users — shaping products that impact hundreds of thousands of employees and millions of job seekers across Indonesia.


What You’ll Do

  • Support the full product lifecycle from ideation to launch and iteration.
  • Define and prioritize product roadmaps based on data, user feedback, and business goals.
  • Collaborate closely with engineering, design, and operations to deliver features on time and at high quality.
  • Deeply understand HR and recruitment workflows — translate pain points into elegant, scalable solutions.
  • Set success metrics (adoption, engagement, retention) and drive product decisions through insight.
  • Balance short-term delivery with long-term product strategy and scalability.
requirements:
What We’re Looking For

  • Structured thinker with a bias for clarity, data, and execution.
  • Strong communication skills; can align engineers, designers, and stakeholders toward shared goals.
  • Comfortable managing complexity — from API integrations to UI flows.
  • Obsessed with creating intuitive, reliable products users love.


Bonus Points

  • Experience in HRIS, ATS, or ERP systems.
  • Background in fast-scaling startups or multi-tenant SaaS.


Why Join

You’ll work directly with the inspiring team behind Indonesia’s leading HR and recruitment platforms. Expect high ownership, rapid learning, and direct impact — your decisions will shape how thousands of businesses hire, manage, and grow.


No bureaucracy. No endless decks. Just fast execution, real responsibility, and products that move the country forward.

responsibilities:
About the Role

You’ll work directly with the CEO to turn ideas into action—supporting high-impact projects across strategy, partnerships, events, and operations. This role sits at the intersection of execution and insight: one day you’re managing a partnership deck, the next you’re analyzing campaign results or coordinating a youth conference. It’s fast-paced, high-trust, and deeply meaningful.


What You’ll Do

  • Support the CEO in day-to-day strategic and operational priorities.
  • Manage cross-functional projects spanning marketing, partnerships, and community programs.
  • Conduct research, prepare reports, and develop presentations for internal and external stakeholders.
  • Coordinate communications, schedules, and follow-ups with partners and key collaborators.
  • Track progress on organizational OKRs and ensure timely execution.
  • Draft proposals, decks, and talking points for events or meetings.
  • Identify bottlenecks and propose solutions that improve efficiency and alignment.
requirements:
What We’re Looking For

  • 1–3 years experience in consulting, business operations, strategy, or fast-paced startups (exceptional fresh grads welcome).
  • Sharp analytical and organizational skills with a bias for execution.
  • Strong communication and writing skills in English and Bahasa Indonesia.
  • Highly adaptable and comfortable managing multiple priorities.
  • Resourceful, fast learner, and comfortable working closely with leadership.


Bonus Points

  • Experience in education, youth programs, or non-profit initiatives.
  • Skilled in creating decks, reports, or structured proposals.


Why Join

  • You’ll be at the center of Dealls’ mission to reshape how talent and companies connect across Indonesia and beyond. Working directly with the CEO and leadership team, you’ll help drive high-impact initiatives that accelerate growth, innovation, and strategic expansion. This role is for those who want to learn fast, make real impact, and grow into future business leaders.
