responsibilities:
About Us

We’re building Indonesia’s leading ecosystem for careers, HR, and youth empowerment through three fast-growing platforms — Dealls, KantorKu, and SejutaCita — founded by Andhika Sudarman, Indonesia’s first Harvard Commencement Speaker and a 2023 Tatler Asia Gen.T honouree.


Dealls (backed by Y Combinator and Hummingbird Ventures) is Indonesia’s #1 job & mentoring platform, connecting millions of professionals with thousands of companies. KantorKu extends this mission by offering an all-in-one HRIS platform for payroll, attendance, and performance — designed for scale and trusted by growing enterprises nationwide. SejutaCita, the foundation of our ecosystem, is Indonesia’s largest youth empowerment platform and winner of Google Play’s Best App of 2021, reaching millions of students through leadership and global programs.


About the Role

You’ll help us bring in the best people to build Indonesia’s leading ecosystem for careers, HR, and youth empowerment — across Dealls, KantorKu, and SejutaCita. As Talent Acquisition Specialist, you’ll own the full recruitment cycle: sourcing, screening, interviewing, and ensuring every new hire fits both the role and our culture.


This is a role for someone who’s both analytical and people-oriented — you’ll balance speed, quality, and candidate experience to scale teams that move fast and deliver impact.


What You’ll Do

  • Manage end-to-end recruitment for assigned functions (tech, business, creative, etc.).
  • Partner with hiring managers to define job requirements and success profiles.
  • Source candidates proactively via LinkedIn and Dealls.
  • Screen, schedule, and coordinate interviews across teams.
  • Maintain accurate data in the ATS (Dealls) and track key hiring metrics.
  • Manage candidate experience — from first contact to offer acceptance.
  • Support employer branding through recruitment marketing and career events.
  • Contribute to continuous improvement of the hiring process and efficiency.
requirements:
What We’re Looking For

  • 2–4 years experience in recruitment or talent acquisition (agency or in-house).
  • Proven track record hiring across multiple functions.
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
  • Structured and data-driven; comfortable working with hiring metrics.
  • Organized and able to juggle multiple open roles simultaneously.
  • Fluent in Bahasa Indonesia and English.


Bonus Points

  • Experience hiring for tech or startup roles.
  • Familiarity with Dealls' ATS
  • Exposure to employer branding, events, or recruitment marketing.

company_desc:
Dealls is Indonesia's largest job portal & mentoring platform. We help people easily find jobs to top Indonesian companies for internship and full-time roles.


As you might have already heard about us, we are revolutionizing how Indonesian engage with employers. Many Indonesian students are talented, ambitious, but never found a better opportunity for themselves. Our team is driven by the vision to democratize information and knowledge, thus opportunities. We think what we build will allow Indonesian students to have a chance to self develop and have a better future.

Our founder is a Harvard graduate, and has gathered a strong team with burning passion to help Indonesian discover opportunities they deserve! 🚀 In 1 year, we amassed 2mio+ users, got funded by YCombinator, and awarded the Best App of 2021 by GooglePlay, beating 3 unicorns and tens of others.

We are looking for passionate and committed individuals who look forward to working in a fast-paced entrepreneurial environment. Join us to have the opportunity to make decisions to drive a huge difference and impact for Indonesia youths! Here in Dealls, you’ll work closely with our board members. We are preferably looking for applicants who are proficient in both Bahasa and English.

responsibilities:
About the Role

You’ll be the engine that turns ideas into execution. From launching nationwide campaigns to managing multi-stakeholder projects, you’ll make sure everything runs on time, on brand, and on target. You’ll balance creativity with precision—translating big visions into structured plans and measurable impact.


What You’ll Do

  • Lead planning and execution of key campaigns, events, and strategic projects.
  • Manage cross-functional teams, timelines, and deliverables to ensure smooth execution.
  • Coordinate with internal departments, partners, and vendors for campaign alignment.
  • Develop campaign briefs, budgets, and performance dashboards.
  • Analyze results, extract insights, and continuously improve project outcomes.
  • Build scalable processes and documentation for future campaigns.
requirements:

  • 1–3 years experience in project management, campaign execution, or marketing operations.
  • Strong organizational and stakeholder management skills.
  • Comfortable juggling multiple priorities with tight deadlines.
  • Fluent in English and Indonesian, both written and spoken.
  • Data-driven mindset with creative instincts.


Bonus Points

  • Experience in managing cross-brand or nationwide campaigns.
  • Familiarity with digital marketing, partnerships, or event production.
  • Ability to turn chaos into structure—and keep everyone on track.


Why Join

You’ll sit at the heart of execution—where vision meets reality. You’ll lead campaigns that move the needle, shape how our brand shows up to the world, and work directly with leaders who value speed, clarity, and results.

responsibilities:
About Us

We’re building Indonesia’s leading ecosystem for careers, HR, and youth empowerment through three fast-growing platforms — Dealls, KantorKu, and SejutaCita — founded by Andhika Sudarman, Indonesia’s first Harvard Commencement Speaker and a 2023 Tatler Asia Gen.T honouree.


Dealls (backed by Y Combinator and Hummingbird Ventures) is Indonesia’s #1 job & mentoring platform, connecting millions of professionals with thousands of companies. KantorKu extends this mission by offering an all-in-one HRIS platform for payroll, attendance, and performance — designed for scale and trusted by growing enterprises nationwide. SejutaCita, the foundation of our ecosystem, is Indonesia’s largest youth empowerment platform and winner of Google Play’s Best App of 2021, reaching millions of students through leadership and global programs.


About the Role

You’ll own the roadmap for products that power how Indonesia works — from how companies manage payroll and performance on KantorKu HRIS, to how they attract and hire top talent on Dealls ATS.


What You’ll Do

  • Lead the end-to-end product strategy, roadmap, and delivery for one or more major product lines.
  • Translate company objectives into clear, outcome-driven product initiatives.
  • Work cross-functionally with engineering, design, and data to deliver high-impact features.
  • Set and monitor success metrics (adoption, activation, retention, NPS, ARR contribution).
  • Drive structured decision-making — from discovery to post-launch iteration.
  • Mentor associate PMs and guide squads in building scalable, customer-centric systems.
  • Partner directly with leadership to align product direction with business strategy and market trends.
requirements:
What We’re Looking For

  • 4+ years of product management experience, ideally in SaaS, HR tech, or B2B platforms.
  • Proven track record of owning large, multi-stakeholder initiatives from concept to launch.
  • Deep understanding of product discovery, prioritization frameworks, and agile execution.
  • Strong analytical and strategic thinking — comfortable working from both data and intuition.
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
  • Strong product sense: you can balance user experience, technical constraints, and business value.


Bonus Points

  • Experience scaling multi-tenant SaaS or enterprise systems (HRIS, ATS, ERP).
  • Technical fluency with APIs, system design, or data infrastructure.
  • Leadership experience mentoring PMs or managing cross-functional squads.


Why Join

You’ll shape the future of two of Indonesia’s fastest-growing B2B platforms — used by hundreds of companies and millions of professionals.


At Dealls & KantorKu, we move fast, think long-term, and give full ownership to builders who deliver. No fluff. No layers. Just autonomy, responsibility, and the opportunity to create products that define how work happens across the region.

responsibilities:
About the Role


We are building a next-generation HRIS platform that tightly integrates attendance, overtime, reimbursement, and payroll into a seamless, reliable experience for our clients.


We're looking for backend engineers who are obsessed with data consistency, system resilience, and clean architecture — and who thrive working on transaction-heavy, critical systems.


Responsibilities


  • Design, build, and maintain backend services that sync attendance, overtime, reimbursement, and payroll.
  • Ensure high data integrity and system consistency, even under concurrent user updates.
  • Optimize and scale relational databases (PostgreSQL preferred).
  • Design clear, extensible APIs to support frontend and third-party integrations.
  • Implement event-driven architecture to handle system-wide updates efficiently.
  • Monitor and improve system reliability, latency, and error rates.
  • Collaborate with product and engineering teams to build a scalable HRIS platform.


Why Join Us?


  • Opportunity to build a core system from early stages with massive impact.
  • Lean, fast-moving, high-ownership culture.
  • Solve real-world problems for growing businesses.
requirements:
• 3–7 years experience in backend development.
  • Experience in Golang.
  • Strong experience with PostgreSQL (or other RDBMS) and database optimization.
  • Solid knowledge of transaction management, data modeling, and eventual consistency concepts.
  • Hands-on experience building RESTful APIs or GraphQL APIs.
  • Familiarity with distributed systems, message queues (e.g., Kafka, RabbitMQ), and caching (e.g., Redis).
  • Experience in cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP) is a big plus.
  • Bonus: Experience in financial systems, payroll, HR tech, or ERP platforms.

We’re building Indonesia’s leading ecosystem for careers, HR, and youth empowerment through three fast-growing platforms — Dealls, KantorKu, and SejutaCita — founded by Andhika Sudarman, Indonesia’s first Harvard Commencement Speaker and a 2023 Tatler Asia Gen.T honouree.

About the Role

You’ll engage payroll bureaus, tax consultants, financial service providers, and other ecosystem players that help companies run their HR operations more efficiently. As Business Partnership Specialist, your goal is to identify, approach, and build win-win partnerships with them.


What You’ll Do

  • Identify and evaluate potential partners (payroll agencies, tax consultants, accounting firms, financial service providers).
  • Initiate outreach, schedule meetings, and present KantorKu’s partnership value proposition.
  • Negotiate terms, draft collaboration scopes, and coordinate with legal/finance for agreements.
  • Maintain a clear database of ongoing and potential partnerships, including contact status and performance tracking.
  • Work closely with product and sales teams to align integrations or bundled offerings.
  • Monitor partner satisfaction, performance, and renewal opportunities.
  • Represent KantorKu in external events, business discussions, and B2B collaborations.
requirements:

  • 2–4 years experience in partnerships, business development, or B2B relationship management.
  • Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills.
  • Structured thinker who can manage multiple discussions and follow-ups.
  • Comfortable with outreach and building relationships from scratch.
  • Strong understanding of HR, payroll, or SaaS ecosystem (or eagerness to learn fast).
  • Fluent in Bahasa Indonesia; proficiency in English preferred.


Bonus Points

  • Existing network in HR, accounting, or tax service industries.
  • Experience in SaaS or startup partnerships.
  • Familiarity with contracts, pricing structures, and revenue-share models.


Why Join

You’ll help shape how KantorKu grows its B2B ecosystem — turning external partnerships into long-term value for clients. This is a fast-moving role with direct impact: every partnership you close helps companies work smarter across Indonesia.

FIT HUB adalah perusahaan Health & Wellness dengan misi membuat hidup sehat lebih mudah diakses oleh semua orang di Indonesia. 💪🇮🇩

Sebagai brand gym terbesar di Indonesia dengan 130+ cabang, FIT HUB menghadirkan fasilitas dan program kebugaran yang terjangkau namun tetap berkualitas di berbagai kota.

Kami percaya bahwa perubahan besar dimulai dari mereka yang menemani perjalanan member setiap hari. 🤝

Didukung oleh ratusan karyawan, setiap peran di FIT HUB memiliki dampak nyata bagi pengalaman dan perkembangan member.

Sebagai perusahaan yang terus bertumbuh dan didukung oleh investor, FIT HUB menawarkan jenjang karier yang jelas serta benefit karyawan yang kompetitif di industri gym. 🚀

Kami membuka peluang bagi setiap individu untuk berkembang dan membangun karier jangka panjang di dunia kebugaran.

responsibilities:
About the Role

You’ll bring ideas to life—turning campaigns, events, and partnerships into unforgettable brand experiences. Equal parts planner and marketer, you’ll manage timelines, coordinate stakeholders, and ensure every project makes noise in the right way. If you love seeing your work out in the world and thrive in fast-moving environments, this role’s for you.


What You’ll Do

  • Plan, execute, and optimize marketing campaigns for key events and projects.
  • Coordinate with vendors, partners, and internal teams to ensure flawless execution.
  • Manage timelines, budgets, and creative assets across multiple campaigns.
  • Support event promotion through digital, social media, and community channels.
  • Track performance metrics, analyze results, and recommend improvements.
  • Brainstorm creative activations and partnerships that drive visibility and engagement.
requirements:
What We’re Looking For

  • 1–3 years experience in marketing, event management, or project coordination.
  • Organized, proactive, and detail-oriented with strong multitasking ability.
  • Strong communication skills in English and Indonesian.
  • Creative thinker who understands brand, design, and audience engagement.
  • Comfortable using tools like Notion, Canva, Trello, or Google Workspace.


Bonus Points

  • Experience running campaigns for large-scale events or communities.
  • Familiarity with social media marketing and performance analytics.
  • Passion for crafting experiences that people remember.


Why Join

You’ll be part of a team that blends creativity and precision—where every project tells a story, and every event drives growth. You’ll get ownership, visibility, and the chance to turn great ideas into real impact.

responsibilities:
About the Role

You’ll work side by side with the CEO and leadership team on strategic projects that drive Dealls’ growth. This role is perfect for someone who’s curious, fast-learning, and eager to see how a high-growth startup operates from the inside. You’ll touch everything from strategy and operations to marketing and partnerships—no two days will look the same.


What You’ll Do

  • Support the CEO in daily operations, research, and special projects.
  • Conduct market and competitor analyses to support strategic decisions.
  • Prepare reports, presentations, and briefing documents for leadership meetings.
  • Coordinate with cross-functional teams to track OKRs and project timelines.
  • Assist in partnership outreach, event preparation, and internal communications.
  • Identify inefficiencies and propose improvements to existing workflows.
requirements:
What We’re Looking For

  • Final-year student or fresh graduate from a top university (business, economics, management, or related fields).
  • Highly organized, analytical, and proactive.
  • Excellent communication and writing skills in English and Bahasa Indonesia.
  • Fast learner with strong attention to detail.
  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.


Bonus Points

  • Experience in consulting, startups, or student organizations.
  • Passion for tech, talent, and building impactful products.


Why Join

You’ll gain firsthand exposure to how a fast-scaling company is built from the top down. Working directly with Dealls’ CEO, you’ll learn how decisions are made, strategies are executed, and ideas turn into impact—while building the foundation for a future career in business or startups.

company_desc: BRI Life is a national Life insurance company subsidiary of the largest bank in Indonesia, Bank Rakyat Indonesia (BRI). As a company that has been operating in the life insurance industry in Indonesia for more than 30 years, BRI Life is always oriented towards customer satisfaction, one of which is manifested in meeting the needs of the Indonesian people for self and family protection, both now and in the future. These various life insurance products offer protection; Life and Health, Critical Illness, Protection and Investment, Education and Old Age are provided to the public through their multiple channels, consisting of; Agencies (Individual life insurance products), Corporations (Group Life Insurance products), In Branch (Bancassurance Life Insurance Products) and Alternative Distribution (Micro Life Insurance Products and Digital Products).

company_desc:
Gree Electric Appliances Indonesia adalah perusahaan pembuat pendingin udara internasional yang memadukan riset dan pengembangan, pemasaran, serta layanan terpadu. Gree Indonesia masuk ke Indonesia pada bulan Juli, 2015 dan berkantor pusat di Jakarta.

Gree Indonesia memiliki 12 cabang yang tersebar di Pulau Jawa, Bali, Sumatera dengan kantor cabang di Jakarta, Bekasi, Bandung, Semarang, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, Bali, Lampung, Pekanbaru, Medan dan terus berkembang di beberapa kota besar di Indonesia.

Gree merupakan merek industri pendingin udara asal China yang dinobatkan menjadi "World Brand" (merek dunia) dan satu-satunya perusahaan pendingin udara yang masuk ke dalam "China Top 100 Listed Company" oleh majalah Fortune selama 12 tahun berturut-turut.

Pada Mei 2020, Gree Electric Appliances masuk dalam daftar Forbes yang menempati urutan ke-246 dalam daftar 2.000 perusahaan terbesar dunia dan merupakan produsen AC terbesar di dunia.

Memiliki total 14 pabrik yang tersebar di China, Brazil dan Pakistan, Gree telah mendapatkan kepercayaan konsumen atas kualitas produknya dengan tetap menjadi pilihan 400 juta pengguna global di 160 negara.

Berbagai kategori produk yang dimiliki oleh Gree antara lain RAC (Residential Air Conditioner), LCAC (Light Commercial Air Conditioner), CAC (Commercial Air Conditioner), HA (Home Appliances). Produk Gree sendiri juga telah digunakan dalam event internasional seperti FIFA World Cup, Russia Olympic Games hingga China Olympic Games.

Sejak masuk ke Indonesia, produk berkualitas Gree telah berhasil meraih berbagai penghargaan dalam negeri. Adapun penghargaan yang didapatkan, antara lain, The Best Air Conditioning of the Year, Peraih Penghargaan Pertama di Indonesia, Peraih Penghargaan Pusat Rekor Indonesia, Top Innovation Choice Award 2020, Digital Popular Brand Award 2020, Indonesia Brand Champions 2020, Indonesia Best Quality Product, Brand Choice 2021 dan Rekor Muri Garansi Purnajual Terlama.

Garansi peraih "REBI Award" Platinum Warranty Gree, juga diyakini sebagai garansi purna jual terlama di industri pendingin udara di Indonesia, yaitu garansi satu tahun ganti unit baru, garansi 5 tahun servis dan suku cadang, ditambah 10 tahun untuk unit outdoor atau kompresor.

Selama berdiri di Indonesia, Gree telah meyakinkan pengguna di pasar Indonesia dengan memenangkan proyek-proyek besar di Indonesia, seperti Pabrik Chevron Pekanbaru, Grand Mercure & Hotel Ibis Yogyakarta, Menara Satoria di Surabaya, Landmark Pluit dan Sudirman Suites di Jakarta hingga banyaknya dealer yang tersebar di seluruh pulau Jawa, Bali dan Sumatera.

responsibilities:
Dealls is seeking a passionate and experienced Data Engineer to join our fast-growing team. In this role, you will play a pivotal role in building and maintaining our data infrastructure, ensuring the efficient and scalable collection, transformation, and analysis of data that drives our business decisions.

You will be the first Data Engineer in our team – so if you're someone who enjoys challenges & wants to be the pioneer of our data infrastructure, we will be eagerly waiting for your application!

Responsibilities:

  • Design, develop, and implement scalable data pipelines using technologies like Python, SQL, Spark, and cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP).
  • Extract, transform, and load (ETL) data from various sources including databases, APIs, and log files.
  • Implement data quality checks and monitoring systems to ensure data accuracy and consistency.
  • Optimize data pipelines for performance and efficiency.
  • Develop and maintain data models and data warehouses.
  • Collaborate with data analysts and scientists to understand their data needs and translate them into technical requirements.
  • Document data pipelines and processes for clarity and maintainability.
  • Stay up-to-date with the latest trends and technologies in data engineering.
requirements:
• Bachelor’s Degree (S1) in Computer Science or related field.
  • Min. of 2+ yrs of experience in a data engineering / data architect / software engineering role. 
  • Strong hands-on experience in java, python is required. Must have shipped multiple projects with a major hands-on contribution to each project.
  • Experience in Big data technologies: Hadoop ecosystem (map-reduce, spark, Kafka)
  • Experience in different storage technologies: OLTP like Postgres, OLAP like Redshift, Google BigQuery, NoSQL like Redis, HBase, Kafka
  • Familiarity with machine learning algorithms and concepts (gradient descent, logistic regression) and software libraries like pandas, TensorFlow, etc.

role: Talent Acquisition Specialist (ex-headhunter or startup only)
responsibilities:
About Us

We’re building Indonesia’s leading ecosystem for careers, HR, and youth empowerment through three fast-growing platforms — Dealls, KantorKu, and SejutaCita — founded by Andhika Sudarman, Indonesia’s first Harvard Commencement Speaker and a 2023 Tatler Asia Gen.T honouree.


Dealls (backed by Y Combinator and Hummingbird Ventures) is Indonesia’s #1 job & mentoring platform, connecting millions of professionals with thousands of companies. KantorKu extends this mission by offering an all-in-one HRIS platform for payroll, attendance, and performance — designed for scale and trusted by growing enterprises nationwide. SejutaCita, the foundation of our ecosystem, is Indonesia’s largest youth empowerment platform and winner of Google Play’s Best App of 2021, reaching millions of students through leadership and global programs.


About the Role

You’ll help us bring in the best people to build Indonesia’s leading ecosystem for careers, HR, and youth empowerment — across Dealls, KantorKu, and SejutaCita. As Talent Acquisition Specialist, you’ll own the full recruitment cycle: sourcing, screening, interviewing, and ensuring every new hire fits both the role and our culture.


This is a role for someone who’s both analytical and people-oriented — you’ll balance speed, quality, and candidate experience to scale teams that move fast and deliver impact.


What You’ll Do

  • Manage end-to-end recruitment for assigned functions (tech, business, creative, etc.).
  • Partner with hiring managers to define job requirements and success profiles.
  • Source candidates proactively via LinkedIn and Dealls.
  • Screen, schedule, and coordinate interviews across teams.
  • Maintain accurate data in the ATS (Dealls) and track key hiring metrics.
  • Manage candidate experience — from first contact to offer acceptance.
  • Support employer branding through recruitment marketing and career events.
  • Contribute to continuous improvement of the hiring process and efficiency.
requirements:
What We’re Looking For

  • 2–4 years experience in recruitment or talent acquisition (agency or in-house).
  • Proven track record hiring across multiple functions.
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
  • Structured and data-driven; comfortable working with hiring metrics.
  • Organized and able to juggle multiple open roles simultaneously.
  • Fluent in Bahasa Indonesia and English.


Bonus Points

  • Experience hiring for tech or startup roles.
  • Familiarity with Dealls' ATS
  • Exposure to employer branding, events, or recruitment marketing.

Gree Electric Appliances Indonesia adalah perusahaan pembuat pendingin udara internasional yang memadukan riset dan pengembangan, pemasaran, serta layanan terpadu. Gree Indonesia masuk ke Indonesia pada bulan Juli, 2015 dan berkantor pusat di Jakarta.

Gree Indonesia memiliki 12 cabang yang tersebar di Pulau Jawa, Bali, Sumatera dengan kantor cabang di Jakarta, Bekasi, Bandung, Semarang, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, Bali, Lampung, Pekanbaru, Medan dan terus berkembang di beberapa kota besar di Indonesia.

Gree merupakan merek industri pendingin udara asal China yang dinobatkan menjadi "World Brand" (merek dunia) dan satu-satunya perusahaan pendingin udara yang masuk ke dalam "China Top 100 Listed Company" oleh majalah Fortune selama 12 tahun berturut-turut.

Pada Mei 2020, Gree Electric Appliances masuk dalam daftar Forbes yang menempati urutan ke-246 dalam daftar 2.000 perusahaan terbesar dunia dan merupakan produsen AC terbesar di dunia.

Memiliki total 14 pabrik yang tersebar di China, Brazil dan Pakistan, Gree telah mendapatkan kepercayaan konsumen atas kualitas produknya dengan tetap menjadi pilihan 400 juta pengguna global di 160 negara.

Berbagai kategori produk yang dimiliki oleh Gree antara lain RAC (Residential Air Conditioner), LCAC (Light Commercial Air Conditioner), CAC (Commercial Air Conditioner), HA (Home Appliances). Produk Gree sendiri juga telah digunakan dalam event internasional seperti FIFA World Cup, Russia Olympic Games hingga China Olympic Games.

Sejak masuk ke Indonesia, produk berkualitas Gree telah berhasil meraih berbagai penghargaan dalam negeri. Adapun penghargaan yang didapatkan, antara lain, The Best Air Conditioning of the Year, Peraih Penghargaan Pertama di Indonesia, Peraih Penghargaan Pusat Rekor Indonesia, Top Innovation Choice Award 2020, Digital Popular Brand Award 2020, Indonesia Brand Champions 2020, Indonesia Best Quality Product, Brand Choice 2021 dan Rekor Muri Garansi Purnajual Terlama.

Garansi peraih "REBI Award" Platinum Warranty Gree, juga diyakini sebagai garansi purna jual terlama di industri pendingin udara di Indonesia, yaitu garansi satu tahun ganti unit baru, garansi 5 tahun servis dan suku cadang, ditambah 10 tahun untuk unit outdoor atau kompresor.

Selama berdiri di Indonesia, Gree telah meyakinkan pengguna di pasar Indonesia dengan memenangkan proyek-proyek besar di Indonesia, seperti Pabrik Chevron Pekanbaru, Grand Mercure & Hotel Ibis Yogyakarta, Menara Satoria di Surabaya, Landmark Pluit dan Sudirman Suites di Jakarta hingga banyaknya dealer yang tersebar di seluruh pulau Jawa, Bali dan Sumatera.

company_desc:
OT is a consumer goods company that produces various kinds of daily necessities. Starting from a traditional health drink with high-quality standardized ingredients and processes. OT has grown more modern without leaving the positive and noble values ​​that were initiated by the company's founders.

Various products ranging from food and beverages, to personal care products, have long been part of the lives of Indonesian consumers. Some of them are Formula, Tango, Teh Gelas, MintZ, Blaster, Oops, and Kiranti.

In fact, because of their quality, OT products have been present in the international market and can be enjoyed by foreign consumers.

By staying focused on consumer needs and continuing to innovate, OT has launched superior products that have won various awards through survey institutions that are recognized nationally and internationally.

All of these achievements cannot be separated from the support of consumers, employees, and the values ​​that we believed in since the beginning. All the trust and hard work from various parties have shaped OT into a company that is highly committed to always trying to improve products and work processes to meet consumers' needs.

company_desc:
Sejak toko pertama dibuka pada Juli 2005, MR.DIY saat ini menjadi salah satu ritel perlengkapan rumah tangga terbesar dan berkembang pesat di Asia Pasifik, dengan komitmen menghadirkan perubahan yang berharga bagi konsumen.


Saat ini, MR.DIY memiliki lebih dari 1100 toko di Indonesia dan 3.500 toko di seluruh dunia. Dengan lebih dari 10.000 karyawan, MR.DIY siap melayani lebih dari 188 juta pelanggan setiap tahun.


Dengan mendukung konsep “Always Low Prices,” MR.DIY menawarkan kemudahan berbelanja lengkap dalam satu tempat dengan harga hemat, menyediakan lebih dari 18.000 produk dan 10 kategori seperti peralatan rumah tangga, kebutuhan sekolah, otomotif, perkakas, elektronik, hingga perhiasan dan kosmetik, menjadikan MR DIY pilihan Utama yang LENGKAP,HEMAT, dan DEKAT bagi jutaan pelanggan untuk kebutuhan rumah tangga sehari-hari.

company_desc:
FIT HUB adalah perusahaan Health & Wellness dengan misi membuat hidup sehat lebih mudah diakses oleh semua orang di Indonesia. 💪🇮🇩

Sebagai brand gym terbesar di Indonesia dengan 130+ cabang, FIT HUB menghadirkan fasilitas dan program kebugaran yang terjangkau namun tetap berkualitas di berbagai kota.

Kami percaya bahwa perubahan besar dimulai dari mereka yang menemani perjalanan member setiap hari. 🤝

Didukung oleh ratusan karyawan, setiap peran di FIT HUB memiliki dampak nyata bagi pengalaman dan perkembangan member.

Sebagai perusahaan yang terus bertumbuh dan didukung oleh investor, FIT HUB menawarkan jenjang karier yang jelas serta benefit karyawan yang kompetitif di industri gym. 🚀

Kami membuka peluang bagi setiap individu untuk berkembang dan membangun karier jangka panjang di dunia kebugaran.

company_desc:
Dealls is Indonesia's largest job portal & mentoring platform. We help people easily find jobs to top Indonesian companies for internship and full-time roles.


As you might have already heard about us, we are revolutionizing how Indonesian engage with employers. Many Indonesian students are talented, ambitious, but never found a better opportunity for themselves. Our team is driven by the vision to democratize information and knowledge, thus opportunities. We think what we build will allow Indonesian students to have a chance to self develop and have a better future.

Our founder is a Harvard graduate, and has gathered a strong team with burning passion to help Indonesian discover opportunities they deserve! 🚀 In 1 year, we amassed 2mio+ users, got funded by YCombinator, and awarded the Best App of 2021 by GooglePlay, beating 3 unicorns and tens of others.

We are looking for passionate and committed individuals who look forward to working in a fast-paced entrepreneurial environment. Join us to have the opportunity to make decisions to drive a huge difference and impact for Indonesia youths! Here in Dealls, you’ll work closely with our board members. We are preferably looking for applicants who are proficient in both Bahasa and English.

responsibilities:
• Analyze existing business processes and identify areas for improvement.
  • Develop scalable workflows, standard operating procedures (SOPs), and systems to enhance efficiency.
  • Develop and maintain dashboards and reports to track business performance.
  • Collect, analyze, and interpret data to provide actionable insights for various projects.
requirements:
• Min. 1 year of experience in B2B Sales or project management.
  • Experience using Google Sheets/Excel. Proficiency in data analysis tools (e.g., SQL, Python) is a huge plus.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

responsibilities:
About Us

We’re building Indonesia’s leading ecosystem for careers, HR, and youth empowerment through three fast-growing platforms — Dealls, KantorKu, and SejutaCita — founded by Andhika Sudarman, Indonesia’s first Harvard Commencement Speaker and a 2023 Tatler Asia Gen.T honouree.


Dealls (backed by Y Combinator and Hummingbird Ventures) is Indonesia’s #1 job & mentoring platform, connecting millions of professionals with thousands of companies. KantorKu extends this mission by offering an all-in-one HRIS platform for payroll, attendance, and performance — designed for scale and trusted by growing enterprises nationwide. SejutaCita, the foundation of our ecosystem, is Indonesia’s largest youth empowerment platform and winner of Google Play’s Best App of 2021, reaching millions of students through leadership and global programs.


About the Role

You’ll be the heartbeat of SejutaCita’s online presence—creating content that connects with millions of students and young dreamers. From planning posts to engaging with our community, you’ll help spread our mission of empowering youth through education and opportunity.


What You’ll Do

  • Plan, create, and publish content across Instagram, TikTok OR X.
  • Develop creative ideas that align with SejutaCita’s voice and youth-driven mission.
  • Support campaign launches for programs, scholarships, and events.
  • Manage community engagement—responding to comments, DMs, and audience feedback.
  • Collaborate with design, marketing, and event teams to deliver cohesive stories.
  • Track performance metrics and propose improvements based on analytics.
  • Stay updated on youth culture, trends, and social media best practices.
requirements:
What We’re Looking For

  • 1–3 years of experience in social media, content creation, or digital marketing.
  • Passion for storytelling, creativity, and youth empowerment.
  • Strong writing and communication skills in Bahasa Indonesia (English a plus).
  • Familiar with Canva, CapCut, or similar creative tools.
  • Organized, proactive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced team.
company_desc:
Dealls is Indonesia's largest job portal & mentoring platform. We help people easily find jobs to top Indonesian companies for internship and full-time roles.


As you might have already heard about us, we are revolutionizing how Indonesian engage with employers. Many Indonesian students are talented, ambitious, but never found a better opportunity for themselves. Our team is driven by the vision to democratize information and knowledge, thus opportunities. We think what we build will allow Indonesian students to have a chance to self develop and have a better future.

Our founder is a Harvard graduate, and has gathered a strong team with burning passion to help Indonesian discover opportunities they deserve! 🚀 In 1 year, we amassed 2mio+ users, got funded by YCombinator, and awarded the Best App of 2021 by GooglePlay, beating 3 unicorns and tens of others.

We are looking for passionate and committed individuals who look forward to working in a fast-paced entrepreneurial environment. Join us to have the opportunity to make decisions to drive a huge difference and impact for Indonesia youths! Here in Dealls, you’ll work closely with our board members. We are preferably looking for applicants who are proficient in both Bahasa and English.

responsibilities:
• Create visually appealing designs for various marketing and communication materials (UI landing pages, presentation decks, or social media posters) using tools like Figma and Canva.
  • Develop compelling copy for marketing campaigns, presentations, and other content.

  • Collaborate with other team members to align design and copy with project objectives.
requirements:
• Previous experience in graphic design or marketing is preferred.
  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Graphic Design, or a related field is a plus.
  • Proficiency in design software, primarily Figma and Canva. Familiarity with other design/wireframing software (e.g. Adobe Photoshop) will be a plus.
  • Strong copywriting skills.
  • Ability to work on multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlines.
  • Creative and pays great attention to detail.
  • Fast learner, easily adaptable, and able to meet deadlines.

responsibilities:
About the Role

You’ll be the connector that makes campaigns happen—from KOL selection and negotiations to tracking performance and managing budgets. This role blends communication, analytics, and strategic planning. If you enjoy organizing chaos, building relationships, and seeing campaigns go live flawlessly, you’ll thrive here.


What You’ll Do

  • Identify, shortlist, and manage KOLs and community partners for paid campaigns.
  • Handle negotiations, contracts, and briefing processes with creators.
  • Build campaign plans, timelines, and budget projections.
  • Monitor deliverables and ensure campaigns are executed on time and on brand.
  • Track key metrics (reach, engagement, conversions) and prepare performance reports.
requirements:
What We’re Looking For

  • 1–3 years experience in campaign, partnerships, or influencer management.
  • Excellent communication and coordination skills.
  • Comfortable with data, spreadsheets, and budget tracking.
  • Organized, detail-oriented, and execution-driven.
  • Strong negotiation skills and a solution-oriented mindset.


Bonus Points

  • Existing relationships with KOLs or influencer agencies.
  • Experience managing multi-platform campaigns (IG, TikTok, YouTube).
  • Understanding of performance marketing or media buying.


Why Join

You’ll be part of a high-energy team running campaigns that reach millions. You’ll learn how to plan, negotiate, and execute like a strategist—while owning end-to-end results from day one.

responsibilities:
About Us

We’re building Indonesia’s leading ecosystem for careers, HR, and youth empowerment through three fast-growing platforms — Dealls, KantorKu, and SejutaCita — founded by Andhika Sudarman, Indonesia’s first Harvard Commencement Speaker and a 2023 Tatler Asia Gen.T honouree.


Dealls (backed by Y Combinator and Hummingbird Ventures) is Indonesia’s #1 job & mentoring platform, connecting millions of professionals with thousands of companies. KantorKu extends this mission by offering an all-in-one HRIS platform for payroll, attendance, and performance — designed for scale and trusted by growing enterprises nationwide. SejutaCita, the foundation of our ecosystem, is Indonesia’s largest youth empowerment platform and winner of Google Play’s Best App of 2021, reaching millions of students through leadership and global programs.


About the Role

You’ll help us bring in the best people to build Indonesia’s leading ecosystem for careers, HR, and youth empowerment — across Dealls, KantorKu, and SejutaCita. As Talent Acquisition Specialist, you’ll own the full recruitment cycle: sourcing, screening, interviewing, and ensuring every new hire fits both the role and our culture.


This is a role for someone who’s both analytical and people-oriented — you’ll balance speed, quality, and candidate experience to scale teams that move fast and deliver impact.


What You’ll Do

  • Manage end-to-end recruitment for assigned functions (tech, business, creative, etc.).
  • Partner with hiring managers to define job requirements and success profiles.
  • Source candidates proactively via LinkedIn and Dealls.
  • Screen, schedule, and coordinate interviews across teams.
  • Maintain accurate data in the ATS (Dealls) and track key hiring metrics.
  • Manage candidate experience — from first contact to offer acceptance.
  • Support employer branding through recruitment marketing and career events.
  • Contribute to continuous improvement of the hiring process and efficiency.
requirements:
What We’re Looking For

  • 3+ years experience in recruitment or talent acquisition (agency or in-house).
  • Proven track record hiring across multiple functions.
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
  • Structured and data-driven; comfortable working with hiring metrics.
  • Organized and able to juggle multiple open roles simultaneously.
  • Fluent in Bahasa Indonesia and English.


Bonus Points

  • Experience hiring for tech or startup roles.
  • Familiarity with Dealls' ATS
  • Exposure to employer branding, events, or recruitment marketing.

  • Mengidentifikasi dan mengkualifikasi leads potensial.
  • Texting melalui LinkedIn dan WhatsApp kepada referal/leads tentang penawaran Dealls.
  • Monitoring dan analisis performa dan hasil dari text/prospect yang dilakukan.
requirements:
• Berpengalaman dalam sales, marketing/communication, client relations, atau bidang serupa.
  • Berpengalaman di industri jasa/produk HR atau SaaS (software as a service) adalah poin plus.
  • Mampu menulis pesan (texting/chatting/email) dengan jelas & engaging, dalam Bahasa Indonesia & Inggris
  • Terbiasa menggunakan LinkedIn & WhatsApp untuk menghubungi leads. Berpengalaman dengan sistem CRM atau software serupa adalah poin plus.
  • Rapi & perhatian terhadap detail.
  • Self-starter (mampu bekerja secara mandiri) dan mampu multi-tasking dengan efektif.

company_desc:
Perjalanan Bank Mega berawal pada tahun 1969, dengan nama PT Bank Karman di Surabaya. Kemudian bertransformasi menjadi Mega Bank pada tahun 1992, dan berpindah lokasi ke Jakarta. Pada tahun 1996, Chairul Tanjung dengan PARA GROUP, yang kini dikenal dengan CT Corpora, mengambil alih dan membuat gebrakan dengan menghadirkan logo baru untuk mengukuhkan Mega Bank sebagai lembaga keuangan kepercayaan masyarakat.

Tahun 2000 menjadi tahun yang penting, kala Mega Bank mengganti nama menjadi PT Bank Mega Tbk dan melaksanakan Initial Public Offering dan pencatatan di BEJ dan BES. Hingga kini, PT Bank Mega Tbk berpegang pada azas profesionalisme, keterbukaan dan kehati-hatian dengan struktur permodalan yang kuat serta produk dan fasilitas perbankan terkini.

Mengusung visi untuk menjadi Bank Kebanggaan Indonesia, Bank Mega berkomitmen dalam mewujudkan hubungan baik yang berkesinambungan dengan nasabah, melalui layanan perbankan inovatif dan sinergi dengan didukung oleh ekosistem yang terintegrasi, sumber daya manusia yang profesional serta kemampuan kinerja organisasi terbaik untuk memberikan nilai tambah yang tinggi bagi seluruh stakeholder.

Bank Mega menjunjung tinggi Dynamics, Entrepreneurship, Trust, Ethics, Commitment, Synergy sebagai nilai dan budaya perusahaan yang dibangun dalam setiap lapis organisasi perusahaan sehingga tercipta lingkungan kerja yang harmonis, dinamis, dan nyaman.

Pencapaian terbaru Bank Mega:

- CNBC Indonesia Awards 2022 - The Best Performing Big Bank - CNBC Indonesia

- Top 20 Financial Institution Awards 2022 - Top 20 Financial Institution 2022 Aset Rp100 Triliun < Rp500 Triliun - The Finance

- Best of The Best Awards 2022 - The Best 50 Public Listed Companies 2022 - Forbes Indonesia

- Tempo Financial Award - The Best Bank in Financial Resilience Kategori Bank Umum Konvensional (KBMI 3 dan 4) dan masih banyak lagi pencapaian Bank Mega lainnya...

company_desc:
Gree Electric Appliances Indonesia adalah perusahaan pembuat pendingin udara internasional yang memadukan riset dan pengembangan, pemasaran, serta layanan terpadu. Gree Indonesia masuk ke Indonesia pada bulan Juli, 2015 dan berkantor pusat di Jakarta.

Gree Indonesia memiliki 12 cabang yang tersebar di Pulau Jawa, Bali, Sumatera dengan kantor cabang di Jakarta, Bekasi, Bandung, Semarang, Yogyakarta, Surabaya, Bali, Lampung, Pekanbaru, Medan dan terus berkembang di beberapa kota besar di Indonesia.

Gree merupakan merek industri pendingin udara asal China yang dinobatkan menjadi "World Brand" (merek dunia) dan satu-satunya perusahaan pendingin udara yang masuk ke dalam "China Top 100 Listed Company" oleh majalah Fortune selama 12 tahun berturut-turut.

Pada Mei 2020, Gree Electric Appliances masuk dalam daftar Forbes yang menempati urutan ke-246 dalam daftar 2.000 perusahaan terbesar dunia dan merupakan produsen AC terbesar di dunia.

Memiliki total 14 pabrik yang tersebar di China, Brazil dan Pakistan, Gree telah mendapatkan kepercayaan konsumen atas kualitas produknya dengan tetap menjadi pilihan 400 juta pengguna global di 160 negara.

Berbagai kategori produk yang dimiliki oleh Gree antara lain RAC (Residential Air Conditioner), LCAC (Light Commercial Air Conditioner), CAC (Commercial Air Conditioner), HA (Home Appliances). Produk Gree sendiri juga telah digunakan dalam event internasional seperti FIFA World Cup, Russia Olympic Games hingga China Olympic Games.

Sejak masuk ke Indonesia, produk berkualitas Gree telah berhasil meraih berbagai penghargaan dalam negeri. Adapun penghargaan yang didapatkan, antara lain, The Best Air Conditioning of the Year, Peraih Penghargaan Pertama di Indonesia, Peraih Penghargaan Pusat Rekor Indonesia, Top Innovation Choice Award 2020, Digital Popular Brand Award 2020, Indonesia Brand Champions 2020, Indonesia Best Quality Product, Brand Choice 2021 dan Rekor Muri Garansi Purnajual Terlama.

Garansi peraih "REBI Award" Platinum Warranty Gree, juga diyakini sebagai garansi purna jual terlama di industri pendingin udara di Indonesia, yaitu garansi satu tahun ganti unit baru, garansi 5 tahun servis dan suku cadang, ditambah 10 tahun untuk unit outdoor atau kompresor.

Selama berdiri di Indonesia, Gree telah meyakinkan pengguna di pasar Indonesia dengan memenangkan proyek-proyek besar di Indonesia, seperti Pabrik Chevron Pekanbaru, Grand Mercure & Hotel Ibis Yogyakarta, Menara Satoria di Surabaya, Landmark Pluit dan Sudirman Suites di Jakarta hingga banyaknya dealer yang tersebar di seluruh pulau Jawa, Bali dan Sumatera.
